Peter, I hate to reach out on the weekend, but here at Team Ritchie we’re experiencing what we call the **“Sunday Scaries.”**

I just checked our fundraising and we’re $1,024 short of where we need to be, _with just 4 hours until tonight’s weekly fundraising deadline!_

**Here’s the truth, Peter:** If we fall behind on fundraising, we won’t have the resources we need to support Ritchie as he takes on the big fights — from LGBTQ+ rights to affordable housing to Social Security & Medicare and _so much more._

**[With _unprecedented_ levels of MAGA chaos _and_ Republicans in the majority, Ritchie needs your support now more than ever! As one of our top grassroots supporters, I have to ask: Will you chip in $10 to support Ritchie? Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Tony Evers
subject: We can’t fall short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
| Derek,

Time is running out before my deadline at midnight tonight, so I'll get right to the point.

Here's the bottom line: We need to raise another $2,397 before midnight, or we won't be able to counter Republican spending and invest in winning Wisconsin — which is likely to come down to just a few votes in 2024.

Our democracy, abortion rights, and personal freedoms are on the ballot. We can't fall short.

[That's why I'm asking you to click this link before midnight and make an important investment in our collective future. With our freedom at stake, every donation matters.](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2166?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231022_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_mmfr.3.10&t=5&akid=6445%2E1827488%2EJWCU_5)

Onward,

Tony

---
* * *
Listen, even Republicans’ own witnesses admitted there’s no evidence that President Biden committed a crime! **WOW!**
**IF** we expose the sham impeachment inquiry for what it is – _a partisan witch hunt with no basis in reality_ – then we can stop it in its tracks!

**BUT IF** we sit back and do nothing, Republicans will continue to lie and tarnish President Biden’s reputation – **_ensuring another Trump Presidency._**
[**_So we need to know that you agree with Rep. Jamie Raskin: Add your name if you agree with Raskin that MAGA Republicans’ impeachment inquiry is about NOTHING »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/agree-w-raskin-Oct?source=FFR_20231022_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20316%2E4449941%2E2XGVq3)

Thank you for speaking out,

– Fight for Reform

name: Adam Schiff
subject: One of the best nights of my career
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hi Derek,

I was taking a trip down memory lane and I stumbled across this picture.
I’ll never forget this night, when I flipped a red seat blue and won my
first congressional election.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]Adam and Eve celebrating

This was one of the most incredible nights of my life. But it wasn’t an
easy race. Far from it.

Derek, all eyes
were on our district as I took on a nationally recognized Republican
incumbent and Clinton impeachment manager in the most expensive
congressional race ever at the time — it was a true slugfest until the
very end. (And a bit afterwards, too).

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]Schiff claims victory, Rogan doesn't concede headline from November 8,
2000

But at this moment, it was bliss. We won. And we were heading to
Washington. (The downside? So were George W. Bush and a Republican House.)

Here’s the thing: My congressional race wasn’t the first time I ran for
office — and at this point, I had lost a few times running for State
Assembly, and won once for State Senate. After those losses, I used to
quote Winston Churchill a lot. When he was unceremoniously thrown out of
office near the end of World War II, he remarked how people kept telling
him that his loss was a blessing in disguise. “At the moment,” he replied,
“it seems a blessing very effectively disguised!”

During my State Senate term, I was urged to run for Congress, even though
no Democrat had won in our district since Franklin Roosevelt. Despite the
challenge, I embraced the opportunity to be part of a historic Democratic
takeover of the House.

My opponent, a well-known Republican named Jim Rogan, made our race a
national spectacle due to his role as an impeachment manager in Bill
Clinton's trial.

While my opponent opted for aggressive national tactics, bombarding the
media with attack ads and mailers, I focused on door-to-door campaigning,
and addressing pocketbook issues like healthcare costs, public safety, and
jobs.

In the end, we took on the most well-funded campaign in the country and we
beat it.

Skip to the present, where I’m running for the Senate in our country’s
most populous state. I never could have imagined this. Not in a million
years.

But through it all, my values and my unwavering commitment to uphold
American democracy and tirelessly advocate for the issues affecting my
community have never changed.

There is lots of work that needs to be done, and I'm prepared to play my
role in leaving Californians in a better state than before and fixing our
damaged democracy. But just like back then, I can't achieve this alone; I
need support.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=oct2023_abs_em.TYf9-c&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]Derek,
we’re less than 5 months away from the primary election. Can you
contribute $5 to help us build the momentum to win this race?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1040?c0=oct2023_abs_em.VpyBRd&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=oct2023_abs_em.JN6O-P&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=oct2023_abs_em.WRlR3Y&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=oct2023_abs_em.PgaZxK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=oct2023_abs_em.RMwRmo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Your support means the world to me — and hopefully will lead to more
memories like the one in that photo when I knew I’d be heading to Congress
to represent Californians.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=oct2023_abs_em.p2naon&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231022_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=4280%2E5257348%2Esn0du_ ]Privacy Policy

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | I’m proud to offer my endorsement and my vote | In case you missed it,** Friend - I recently endorsed Liz Murrill for Attorney General of Louisiana! I’m proud to offer her my endorsement and my vote, and I hope you’ll do the same. Early voting for the General Election begins on November 3rd, so don’t forget to make a plan to vote early and vote Republican! Louisiana Strong, Bill Cassidy, M.D. | | Bill Cassidy United States Senator, Louisiana | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate?** Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | Louisiana Strong (via Bill Cassidy) PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA == \-

name: Katie Porter
subject: Guess what industry gave $26M to candidates?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
🍽️
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31891%2E3422442%2EGt1-nd)
**In 2022, three global food companies made more than $10 BILLION in combined profit. That’s double what these corporations made in 2020, or any year before then.**
Meanwhile, we have record numbers of families going hungry. It’s a rigged system that allows kids to go without fruits and vegetables while a handful of already wealthy individuals get even richer.
Big corporations are using their monopoly power to price-gouge people at the grocery store, and it’s a real problem that Congress must address. But there’s a reason many of my colleagues are willing to ignore this issue: **Agribusiness PACs contributed nearly $26 MILLION to candidates in the 2022 cycle** , with money landing in both Democrat and Republican bank accounts.
Derek, I’m running for the U.S. Senate to shake things up. We must finally get corporate greed in check and lower costs for consumers. That’s why I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money—I’m fighting for you, not these big corporations. [**But I need your help if we’re going to win this thing. Can you help me out and make a donation of $5 today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231022-2?refcode=EMAM22_2_AGR_20231022_V1_F&refcode2=31891_3422442_Gt1-nd&akid=31891%2E3422442%2EGt1-nd)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231022-2?refcode=EMAM22_2_AGR_20231022_V1_F&refcode2=31891_3422442_Gt1-nd&akid=31891%2E3422442%2EGt1-nd)
Thanks a ton!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM22_2_AGR_20231022_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=31891_3422442_Gt1-nd&akid=31891%2E3422442%2EGt1-nd)**

subject: It’s looking “OMINOUS” for Crooked Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
And we all know what the Left does when they’re LOSING...| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=47a8ac6e504846008d3471dca7233ef9&_e=dDz2nx1GiVrwCNK5KilyHpT_ng8ZMeUih4QUatO7_c728P2alPC5W0Abpd-_TUtmTGjDCIcJNJRgSf-Hp6xuVxVXc9XdyRW7ac4mXQQMY15W4tJlC0pUj_SWqZUSSSSKAAKtPMmw4G6JfeHqWbLh7VvRX8r7VpUmf675mi88iLCHGW07LGLpF0dMY1X2MDpEeHYxpaRvID0vXT02-HdqKB7-GXk45dq4gbEYGhWS8W6G-goJmKlzCyks2PYULeu9icTzWlPFFnKZKtQSSJ5HqsDodmmDcQEK4U40k2rcSdvn6vMk711saMftX1XSFTQ9YSxA4rjtzdNy5X945rVreYbn_xSKREvaOuAlsu0Ts5Yi4GTl2f83HzujaY7x1Wh_c1Ey5aOHRxZ0fc1XQ6C6tYthTNKciAPc0huZ6HDWAf9AdxhEXNcG0VSBQZI7-KlTnv82Bkk2e6gO_5SJpOSKxd6tSepgJKJZo1o3LMejwUgD8EJBd97FVsN9mXNzVgbt)
---
Patriot,

---
Yesterday, I emailed you to let you know about _another_ new poll conducted by Bloomberg/Monmouth that shows us crushing Crooked Joe in the biggest battleground states of 2024.
---
As Bloomberg put it, this poll is downright **_“OMINOUS”_** for Biden.
---
But when things are looking bleak for Crooked Joe, we all know what that means...
---
**The never-ending witch hunts are about to heat up like never before!**
---
_Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats know they can’t beat us in a free and fair election, so they’ve dragged me through four sham indictments, four unjust arrests, a mugshot, a potential lifetime in prison, the “corporate death penalty,” and now, even a gag order to censor me._
---
I can’t say with certainty that I know exactly what vile witch hunt Crooked Joe and his Deep State accomplices will cook up next...
---

clean_body: And we all know what the Left does when they’re LOSING...| | | Patriot, Yesterday, I emailed you to let you know about another new poll conducted by Bloomberg/Monmouth that shows us crushing Crooked Joe in the biggest battleground states of 2024. As Bloomberg put it, this poll is downright “OMINOUS” for Biden. But when things are looking bleak for Crooked Joe, we all know what that means... The never-ending witch hunts are about to heat up like never before! Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats know they can’t beat us in a free and fair election, so they’ve dragged me through four sham indictments, four unjust arrests, a mugshot, a potential lifetime in prison, the “corporate death penalty,” and now, even a gag order to censor me. I can’t say with certainty that I know exactly what vile witch hunt Crooked Joe and his Deep State accomplices will cook up next... But what I do know above all else, is that no matter what they throw at us, with patriots like YOUby my side – who will NEVER SURRENDER our country to tyranny– no witch hunt will EVERbreak us. If you’re struggling right now due to the disastrous policies of the Crook currently occupying the White House, then please don’t even think about donating. I mean it! | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Isaiah Martin
subject: (Action Needed) Fight voter suppression
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.isaiahmartin.org/f/a/kYhD10UfSH1QFxyIXASVBA~~/AAPPAAA~)
---
Friend, I was recently at Texas Southern University registering folks to vote. Take a look: [](http://clicksp.isaiahmartin.org/f/a/kYhD10UfSH1QFxyIXASVBA~~/AAPPAAA~) You all know that Republicans like Greg Abbott use every tool at their disposal to chip away at our bedrock freedom to vote. That's why, as I look ahead to continue registering voters, I want to take a moment to check in with you about voting rights. The way I run my campaign is informed by on-the-ground, real-time input from folks across Texas. **[So, I'm asking: Will you click here to complete this critical Voting Rights Survey?](http://clicksp.isaiahmartin.org/f/a/kYhD10UfSH1QFxyIXASVBA~~/AAPPAAA~)** | | [BEGIN SURVEY >>](http://clicksp.isaiahmartin.org/f/a/kYhD10UfSH1QFxyIXASVBA~~/AAPPAAA~)
---
Here are a couple of reasons why I'm choosing you to participate in this survey:
1. 1\. My district's voter turnout rate is only 25%. That's unacceptable.
2. 2\. It's a _travesty_ how many hoops working people have to jump through simply to cast a ballot.
3. 3\. MAGA extremist governors keep passing voter suppression laws that restrict absentee voting, limit poll hours, and even purge folks from rolls without warning.

My team is personally tracking and recording responses. We're only asking top supporters to complete this brief survey to inform how we fight back.
**[Please spend a minute telling us about your experience with voting in your area:](http://clicksp.isaiahmartin.org/f/a/kYhD10UfSH1QFxyIXASVBA~~/AAPPAAA~)**
| [BEGIN SURVEY >>](http://clicksp.isaiahmartin.org/f/a/kYhD10UfSH1QFxyIXASVBA~~/AAPPAAA~)
---
Thanks for fighting the good fight with us,
Isaiah

| | Isaiah Martin is a native Houstonian, lifelong Democrat, and community organizer running for the open seat in Texas’ 18th Congressional District. If elected, he will be the youngest member of Congress. He’s relying on grassroots support, not corporate PACs or special interests to power him to victory. Will you become a Founding Donor today?

We're only asking top supporters to complete this brief survey to inform how we fight back. | Thanks for fighting the good fight with us, Isaiah | | Isaiah Martin is a native Houstonian, lifelong Democrat, and community organizer running for the open seat in Texas’ 18th Congressional District. If elected, he will be the youngest member of Congress. He’s relying on grassroots support, not corporate PACs or special interests to power him to victory. Will you become a Founding Donor today? | ~ ~ ~ ~~ | PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 53843 701 San Jacinto St. Houston, TX United States, 77002 | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20For=20Congress?=
subject: DEMOCRATIC PARTY OVERWHELMINGLY VOTES TO ENDORSE DAVE MIN
body:
Min, endorsed by outgoing incumbent Katie Porter, receives over 70% of the California Democratic Party's pre-endorsement election | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b9172e65d0d4/democratic-party-overwhelmingly-votes-to-endorse-dave-min-15664116?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** October 22, 2023
**Contact:** press@davemin.com
**DEMOCRATIC PARTY OVERWHELMINGLY VOTES TO ENDORSE DAVE MIN**
_Min, endorsed by outgoing incumbent Katie Porter, receives over 70% of the California Democratic Party's pre-endorsement election and is placed on the consent calendar for the Party's formal endorsement_
**IRVINE, CA —** Dave Min, the leading Democratic candidate for California's 47th Congressional District, has officially been placed on the consent calendar to receive the endorsement of the California Democratic Party, after receiving over 70% in the election of Democratic party activists and club representatives in the district. With a [record of legislative accomplishment](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=af5b8948cc&e=7017cc100e), [strong public polling](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=0a32d4e5f3&e=7017cc100e), a commanding [coalition of support](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=d93ade0754&e=7017cc100e), and status as the [top fundraiser](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=8ec8a00de9&e=7017cc100e), Democrats who know CA-47 best resoundingly believe that Min is the strongest and most qualified candidate to be the party’s nominee and keep this seat blue.

**“I am so grateful to our local Democratic activists for all they do,”** said Dave Min. **“These are the teachers, nurses, lawyers, bus drivers, and retirees who carry our party forward, not only during our election cycles but also during those times when no one else is paying attention. I’m honored to have received such a broad and sweeping coalition of support from the people who know this part of Orange County best. I know that with their support, we will be in a strong position to win next November and to help elect Hakeem Jeffries as Speaker of the House, and end the cycle of incompetence, insurrection, and Trumpism that have paralyzed Congress over the past nine months.”**

The Democratic Party’s strong recommendation for endorsement follows the Orange County Labor Federation endorsement, and endorsements from the powerful Service Employees International Union of California,California Federation of Teachers, Teamsters, the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW), the Los Angeles Police Protective League (LAPPL), the International Union of Painters and Associated Trades (IUPAT), the Carpenters, the Laborers, the Pipe Trades, the California School Employees Association (CSEA), and many others.

Min has also enjoyed unified support from local elected officials, with the endorsements of more than 60 local leaders. He also enjoys the most important endorsement in this race– that of outgoing incumbent Katie Porter, who is vacating the seat to run fior U.S. Senate– as well as from over 150 key federal, state, and local leaders, including California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, State Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricard Lara, and Superintendent of Public Schools Tony Thurmond. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=d804d7eeac&e=7017cc100e). ###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---
| | **Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/about?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=aed0a83c1a) [unsubscribe from this list](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=aed0a83c1a) [update subscription preferences](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=aed0a83c1a)
Dave Min For Senate * PO Box 5959 * Irvine, CA 92616-5959 * USA

subject: Can’t we all just get along—like Republicans and Democrats in Congress?
body:
The corporate political parties have yet again found common cause wherever it supports Wall Street & the Pentagon.

# [Can't we all just get along--like Republicans and Democrats in Congress?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138206548&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4MjA2NTQ4LCJpYXQiOjE2OTgwMjM4OTksImV4cCI6MTcwMDYxNTg5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.M_7IqRfUHIzt1rQU4ql790zL-0CF0PkJcidNvCEnzi0)
### The corporate political parties have yet again found common cause wherever it supports Wall Street & the Pentagon.
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/8a24bb6c-8427-4bf9-a41f-938a0cf3b8c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Oct 23| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8a24bb6c-8427-4bf9-a41f-938a0cf3b8c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138206548&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4MjA2NTQ4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY5ODAyMzg5OSwiZXhwIjoxNzAwNjE1ODk5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.E6Q4V-AzeVxBfZyB8CSivCIu-x_Tf-8GXlhf1uEAa4w&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138206548&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4MjA2NTQ4LCJpYXQiOjE2OTgwMjM4OTksImV4cCI6MTcwMDYxNTg5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.M_7IqRfUHIzt1rQU4ql790zL-0CF0PkJcidNvCEnzi0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138206548&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4MjA2NTQ4LCJpYXQiOjE2OTgwMjM4OTksImV4cCI6MTcwMDYxNTg5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.M_7IqRfUHIzt1rQU4ql790zL-0CF0PkJcidNvCEnzi0)
---
| | [](https://substack..gl-dzP0Nw4Lgnc_pFa-jb-1c0wQ17GmBc6HbTBZUKqs?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/cant-we-all-just-get-alonglike-republicans?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Washington's most revealing events often pass unnoticed, especially when the news cycle is crowded with serious crises--like the one unfolding in Gaza--that occupy the attention of casual observers of politics.
When [Biden teamed up with Republicans](https://substack.com/redirect/940a1760-2e2b-45b0-aa02-8a69cfab365a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to block labor rights last year, it represented an on-brand example of the bipartisan collaboration on which he [based his campaign](https://substack.com/redirect/a2f2ce41-c648-4660-ae4b-93eb74873ea6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the White House back in 2020.
We were offered another example this week, continuing a longstanding pattern of [bipartisan military industrial corruption](https://substack.com/redirect/82fe5952-1083-442b-aeab-7f3935d96ea7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1b32be8-d7b2-460d-b72e-4bee8d09c736?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### **Washington reveals its bipartisan priorities**
On Friday, Biden publicly requested [another $106 billion from Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/d9988e93-21bd-4488-9cc4-6f7108bdeb78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to spend on weapons for Ukraine and Israel. His request ignores mounting outrage around the world about mass human rights violations, as well as increasingly dire social needs across the U.S. from housing to healthcare.
He also jeopardized his own re-election campaign, by placing at risk his support in [key swing states](https://substack.com/redirect/1259b152-074a-471c-8b1a-7baee132636b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) like Michigan and across [critical demographics such as millennials](https://substack.com/redirect/cbb00c97-bff3-4494-b75a-1e06a9b12ce3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) across the political spectrum who have been forced to juggle financial crises while watching Wall Street profit from destroying their futures.
The response from Congress spoke volumes.
Want to continue informing yourself despite the disinformation routinely spread by journalists? Feel free to sign up for a free subscription.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..5fxR9C9Gshr1YMo8CtorBJMS21LGj7jH2Law5KJimfM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=138206548)
While Democrats and Republicans theatrically tear out each other's political throats, they tend to discover common ground whenever convenient for Washington or Wall Street.
There might be some solace to be found--and no shortage of irony to be observed--in Biden's request for another $106 billion dollars for the corrupt right wing regimes in Ukraine and Israel [falling on the shoals of Republican dysfunction in the House](https://substack.com/redirect/5e10e146-d4ca-45e4-ba8f-61e5253bcd6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
But while the House is paralyzed due to intraparty drama among Republicans, the institutional Republican Party--embodied in Senate majority leader Mitch McConnell--has predictably rallied to support Biden's request. [McConnell spoke in support of Biden's proposal today](https://substack.com/redirect/c83d623f-495d-4d49-a1a7-e568ca7fa684?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), setting aside the strident partisan rancor normally on display in Washington to instead close ranks around the Pentagon and weapons manufacturers whose corporate welfare takes the indirect form of dead & disfigured children.
We writers who challenge the corporate consensus supporting Wall Street & Washington are often obscured by social media platforms. Help break the filter bubble by sharing this post with your friends!
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138206548&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4MjA2NTQ4LCJpYXQiOjE2OTgwMjM4OTksImV4cCI6MTcwMDYxNTg5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.M_7IqRfUHIzt1rQU4ql790zL-0CF0PkJcidNvCEnzi0)
If you pay attention to journalists in America, you might come away with the impression that Democrats and Republicans in Washington are irreconcilably committed to war between the parties.
Ironically, anything related to warfare--or other dimensions of militarism, like [policing](https://substack.com/redirect/6d2695b8-f659-4a9f-a616-a4808e149623?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or [border security](https://substack.com/redirect/460b859e-0ddb-4c22-a235-f5ef49ce3894?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--is precisely what both corporate parties always agree on, whatever their campaign platform or espoused beliefs.
Reconsidering last week's news in light of the two corporate parties' zones of shared consensus reveals that they share a great deal in common: a commitment to [shielding war criminals](https://substack.com/redirect/b1bf3a46-c5c7-48b1-af6d-3e6a7099ebd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Washington, [empowering](https://substack.com/redirect/ce4061c3-794d-410d-957e-87e0decf2c8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) corporations, [disempowering workers](https://substack.com/redirect/940a1760-2e2b-45b0-aa02-8a69cfab365a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and their families, and [helping fossil fuel companies](https://substack.com/redirect/55cd936d-f66c-4ea2-9343-b8f3b2e83f06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) drive life on Earth to accelerating--and preventable--mass extinction.
They also share a commitment to [filling their bulging pockets](https://substack.com/redirect/97092131-dab1-4ce7-bcfa-37c5a61c9757?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Paid subscribers can access a further observation of hypocrisy among liberals who have themselves come to share some of my longstanding concerns about one branch of government after decades of unfortunate complicity. It's worth observing these parallels between institutions in order to excavate patterns that transcend rhetoric, yet usually escape the attention of writers focused on minutiae.
If nothing else, it can offer ammunition for debates with centrist friends who accept the lies of corporate Democrats while struggling to see through them...

If nothing else, it can offer ammunition for debates with centrist friends who accept the lies of corporate Democrats while struggling to see through them... clean_body: After all you’ve done for OUR movement... | | | | | Patriot, Given Crooked Joe’s incompetence, it’s no surprise he can’t wrap his head around how our beautiful movement grows STRONGER with each passing witch hunt. Biden and his Deep State accomplices have dragged me through four sham indictments, four unjust arrests, a mugshot, a potential lifetime in prison, and even the “corporate death penalty,”... And yet, every time Crooked Joe thinks he’s finally broken us, red-blooded Americans like YOU join me in looking directly into the face of tyranny and declaring “I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR COUNTRY!” Even now, after Crooked Joe’s corrupt DOJ just GAGGED and CENSORED me, Biden is left scratching his head as countless Americans have stepped up and pledged to AMPLIFY our voice – the voice of the Silent Majority – like never before. And for that, Patriot, I am eternally grateful! Because so long as there are patriots like YOU standing by my side, rest assured, we WILL save our country in 2024. And I can think of no better way to honor YOUR commitment to peacefully speak out against Crooked Joe’s Third World Marxist tyranny than to send you this shirt for FREE ... | | Thank you, Donald J. subject: Join Ron DeSantis on the tarmac, Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=888af583bbbdcd563271f44f836392225692289476b075884925f08c2a03c5850df746413e5c5652b2db4002e1b4c4eaae9bfe2824118cda98c734ba87aa0f3cf27f3cf4021c5802c2da2160f9242f77

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34ddb6c51725a8b98e7e94fa5ecbc5131edebd148f14462ab1b42223d7f5b45956ee53f6ffdccf104294874a5830c0c99e0bba462334afacfc82779a14af00f7

Friend,

Ron DeSantis is not pandering to "political correctness" or pretending that sending money to Gaza won't end up right in the hands of the Hamas terrorists.

DITCH THE ACTING 🎭 TAKE ACTION TODAY

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34ddb6c51725a8b911c62df5c2f5b7cc2cfcb793f61786509b3d0d322c2cfdb8e5c9648ed95af0d03fe4ae979fbcc9eac9dfdbd41f26552c917c848f934731b8
DONATE $15 TO RON DESANTIS NOW

Innocent Israelis and Americans are being held hostage. Does Joe Biden really think that millions of dollars are going to be kept away from the barbarians running the Gaza government?

As the instability across the world continues to become more and more dangerous, it's no secret: OUR COUNTRY IS CRYING OUT FOR A LEADER WITH HIS HEAD ON STRAIGHT.

Ron DeSantis is filling the void of leadership that Joe Biden has left and ACTING to keep Americans safe. While Biden toils away with reckless plans to disperse stranded Americans across Europe and empty words from behind a camera, the DeSantis Administration has sent plane after plane to bring hundreds of American families home AND shipped thousands of donated critical supplies to Israelis in need.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34ddb6c51725a8b98e7e94fa5ecbc5131edebd148f14462ab1b42223d7f5b45956ee53f6ffdccf104294874a5830c0c99e0bba462334afacfc82779a14af00f7
SUPPORT RON DESANTIS FOR PRESIDENT

There is one candidate in this race who leads when it matters most... and Ron DeSantis has proven this since his days serving in Iraq, serving in Congress, and serving as Governor.

We are not in denial: the world is keeping a very close eye on the vulnerabilities of our country. We need to put the mission first and get a real Commander-in-Chief we can trust back behind the Resolute Desk. We need your support NOW. There is too much at stake to stay on the sidelines of this election.

We are counting on YOU to help Ron DeSantis lead this nation. Don't let the United States of America down, friend.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34ddb6c51725a8b98e7e94fa5ecbc5131edebd148f14462ab1b42223d7f5b45956ee53f6ffdccf104294874a5830c0c99e0bba462334afacfc82779a14af00f7
Chip in what you can to right this country and reverse the disaster that the Democrats have RAINED DOWN since we let them take control.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34ddb6c51725a8b98e7e94fa5ecbc5131edebd148f14462ab1b42223d7f5b45956ee53f6ffdccf104294874a5830c0c99e0bba462334afacfc82779a14af00f7
RUSH IN WHAT YOU CAN TODAY

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34ddb6c51725a8b9a49ce109e0c8cf6fc333404ea59f847af14f5049384c525b0e09c3c5384b5abd56b1dbf4d8603bdd7509f64bd86aba165d4cad8237068b78
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34ddb6c51725a8b9b606a4669290f8fd06b5ad889efd2e1a2a8aec636f0ca3691b9f8526480a574c6d7c8b808d3cc6416c7c81d3080496fd12dcfcd416bfc2d4
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34ddb6c51725a8b98e7e94fa5ecbc5131edebd148f14462ab1b42223d7f5b45956ee53f6ffdccf104294874a5830c0c99e0bba462334afacfc82779a14af00f7

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34ddb6c51725a8b98e7e94fa5ecbc5131edebd148f14462ab1b42223d7f5b45956ee53f6ffdccf104294874a5830c0c99e0bba462334afacfc82779a14af00f7

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

While Biden toils away with reckless plans to disperse stranded Americans across Europe and empty words from behind a camera, the DeSantis Administration has sent plane after plane to bring hundreds of American families home AND shipped thousands of donated critical supplies to Israelis in need. SUPPORT RON DESANTIS FOR PRESIDENT There is one candidate in this race who leads when it matters most... and Ron DeSantis has proven this since his days serving in Iraq, serving in Congress, and serving as Governor. We are not in denial: the world is keeping a very close eye on the vulnerabilities of our country. We need to put the mission first and get a real Commander-in-Chief we can trust back behind the Resolute Desk. We need your support NOW. There is too much at stake to stay on the sidelines of this election. We are counting on YOU to help Ron DeSantis lead this nation. Don't let the United States of America down, friend. Chip in what you can to right this country and reverse the disaster that the Democrats have RAINED DOWN since we let them take control. RUSH IN WHAT YOU CAN TODAY In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. name: Robertson For Congress
subject: There's Something to be Said for Experience...Lessons we have learned!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
| | | |
---
# We Will Win This Time! Here's How...
---
As you know, last year was my first time running for public office. Although Republicans only make up 26% of registered voters in my district, I received almost 50% of the vote. Dina Titus won with just 51.5%. We did the best of the three Republicans running for Congress in Southern Nevada. We also received more votes in CD-1 than any Republican who ran for office. This includes Governor Lombardo, Adam Laxalt, and others.
My first election experience puts me in good company with Abraham Lincoln, Ronald Reagan, and Newt Gingrich--all of whom lost their first one, too. They didn't give up, and neither will I!
We learned a lot from our first run. I'm confident that we will win this time with the knowledge we acquired. The lessons include:

* Though we won the in-person voting by 20 points, Titus won the mail-in and ballot-harvested vote by 30 points. This cycle we will embrace early voting to include mail-in ballot

* Titus won by just 7,000 votes. There were 46,000 registered Republicans in my district who did not vote. We have each of their names, addresses, and phone numbers. We have volunteers who will contact them to offer assistance in voting.

* We won the vote in Henderson and Boulder City, but Titus won in Las Vegas and Clark County. We are recruiting precinct captains in these areas to continue to hold where we won and make gains in the areas we lost.

We have many things working in our favor, including:

* People now recognize my name. Over 107,000 people voted for me last time. Pundits and the media know who we are. Name recognition is a valuable asset in elections.

* We have an outstanding volunteer organization. We've kept volunteers from last year and have added to their ranks.

* I still have strong support from veterans, retirees, and the LDS community. These are three groups that have high voter turnout rates.

We are running a grassroots campaign. With your help and involvement, we will win the primary again and beat Titus in the general.
---
Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: One of your opponents, (name redacted), in the Primary claims that he got more votes than you in the last election. Is this true? -T.M.. A. I'm certain he realizes his mistake! According to the [Nevada Secretary of State's website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DJfG9wJp174pm_zZ8VHj5faJ4GE9xFBcLUhDN0RLyFi_jb32qIFMnFpzz8YUV10ZB3anAIOZaM2RM45_sOmDG3IxXDkXO3pc_EJPdpaVdJca3Cla2vaj9yhtpI8LsZwID1Mg6gE7bn4=&c=yPcPTvZ3vZyyyiKF54ezq9RTFdzrJgJ8wsSWrqPdhDsXvfijlCvQCw==&ch=5Qhi9aZ0XxUEmhiK0XVsMHEtyO7-KZkZvpzQ9nnWvohYu3sD3AZXuQ==), he received 10,066 votes, while I received 103,115. He ran in one assembly district, while I ran in 14 assembly districts. With the name recognition and goodwill I earned, I'm confident we will win this time.
Q. With the apparent unfair practices of the FBI and DOJ, what actions would you take as a member of Congress? -D.B. A. Congress has a constitutional duty to oversee the operation of the executive branch. I support the ongoing investigations of the FBI, DOJ, and other agencies. As a Representative of the people of Nevada's First Congressional District, I will do all I can to make government work for the people.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---
| [Visit our Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DJfG9wJp174pm_zZ8VHj5faJ4GE9xFBcLUhDN0RLyFi_jb32qIFMnP9B2VA8AbNFLkktrM8tZHT1qMhVvBkrEVw7BPM4aR4sGkXazhxrYF8inX5D1AoJfeagW7HneVM9AUHThZnLXwkMk6Vmk74BksS007pBXAun&c=yPcPTvZ3vZyyyiKF54ezq9RTFdzrJgJ8wsSWrqPdhDsXvfijlCvQCw==&ch=5Qhi9aZ0XxUEmhiK0XVsMHEtyO7-KZkZvpzQ9nnWvohYu3sD3AZXuQ==)

I'm certain he realizes his mistake! According to the ==, he received 10,066 votes, while I received 103,115. He ran in one assembly district, while I ran in 14 assembly districts. With the name recognition and goodwill I earned, I'm confident we will win this time. Q. With the apparent unfair practices of the FBI and DOJ, what actions would you take as a member of Congress? -D.B. A. Congress has a constitutional duty to oversee the operation of the executive branch. I support the ongoing investigations of the FBI, DOJ, and other agencies. As a Representative of the people of Nevada's First Congressional District, I will do all I can to make government work for the people. Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question. | == | == *Mark Robertson retired from the Army. Use of his rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Military.* | | | | | | | Robertson For Congress | PO Box 750433, Las Vegas, NV 89136 | | Sent by mailto:mark@robertsonforcongress.com

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: This isn't over ... yet
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsVoEt8i-N

American Cornerstone Institute

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to
undermine the Supreme Court...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osVoEt8i-N

Fellow
Patriot,

This is
Dr. Ben Carson-I'm writing to you personally because your name is
on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the
unborn. And today I need your help.

I know
you're as grateful as I am for the Supreme Court's decision to
overturn Roe. But I'm also concerned that the pro-life movement
will mistakenly think this ruling means the fight is won.

Nothing
could be further from the truth-the fight for life is only just
beginning!

Right
now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the
Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice
democrats and major media outlets to codify abortion-on-demand at
the expense of taxpayers like you.

We cannot
allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority
of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that
abortion should be unrestricted.

We must
stand together to defend a culture of life across America. If we
don't act now, I'm afraid that radicalized idealogues will
continue to seize positions of power and abuse their authority to
advance an anti-life agenda that is bent on the destruction of
the American family.

Today,
I'd like to invite you to join thousands of others who believe
the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to
the pledge I have linked below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62391767:sVoEt8i-N:m:3:2532013465:A2EB77FE07773CC68D398B69746CBF13:r

By
signing the pledge, you will join a thriving movement of
principled citizens who are uniting to protect the unborn and
refusing to be silenced by a vocal minority of radicalized
fanatics.

I will do
everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the
spread of the Left's anti-life ideology. Will you take a minute
to stand with me by signing this pledge now?

I'd like
to thank you for joining this critical effort. Together, we can
save thousands of lives from abortion over the next year.

Gratefully,
Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman
American
Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

Fellow Patriot, This is Dr. Ben Carson-I'm writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn. And today I need your help. I know you're as grateful as I am for the Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe. But I'm also concerned that the pro-life movement will mistakenly think this ruling means the fight is won. Nothing could be further from the truth-the fight for life is only just beginning! Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify abortion-on-demand at the expense of taxpayers like you. We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted. We must stand together to defend a culture of life across America. If we don't act now, I'm afraid that radicalized idealogues will continue to seize positions of power and abuse their authority to advance an anti-life agenda that is bent on the destruction of the American family. Today, I'd like to invite you to join thousands of others who believe the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to the pledge I have linked below: By signing the pledge, you will join a thriving movement of principled citizens who are uniting to protect the unborn and refusing to be silenced by a vocal minority of radicalized fanatics. I will do everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the spread of the Left's anti-life ideology. Will you take a minute to stand with me by signing this pledge now? I'd like to thank you for joining this critical effort. Together, we can save thousands of lives from abortion over the next year. Gratefully, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. # MONDAY, OCTOBER 23, 2023

## Migrants at Border Hit New High
A record number of "migrant encounters" were reported in September, with 270,000 migrants being handled by border agents, [more than any month previously.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2u4yAQQOGngY4IDza2C4pt3GXbLS1-xmFWGCI8ySpvv7q3vvUpjvT9ue93T4Xq47c_0fHRdh-Z3rgPWoFRYPZRJncgAhqJbrDrou0061lmN_kJAgQb0goxLTEEHwcbUrIRVrskSQ40mEGD0es0mvV2RJuG-QhHMna1AcWoMRG3fvvbqHLGo3zaG_sttlMWl5mflzC_BGwCNs6YqZSvJmB7tkLxI2CjytirZ2rVFwHbCHax06w6xtaTqq8zYFcnPbqvfKkLsSrP6movztirCq0n7Kr4i9XZKmcBm-wuPf9RKXTZWYz6cXr6Hkv-2eh_AAAA__-7-2se) That brings the total for 2023 to 2.47 million, also a record. Within that number were 18 encounters with [migrants on the terror watch list,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1yhCAUQOGnwQ4HQXEtKNLYbdqUDshFb8KPA-ySfftMUqc-zZnv477dNXqMx7sOoKpLm94rPmEbGOWCcrGNnVUOgIPoQA1yuTE5zWzuTjXpAWDQ1thxdgK0NDe7aA2TGAFubu9QccbFwLhgyzSKpXe7tMPsjLNCLtIAGRlYrCn3nwljPcH5V3pC7vcUOq_OWq9CxBvhK-Fra6136TtCK7-d8PVKHivuhfD1xOOkAY-sY6XxEQzkQk0G_UXDw1e8PNAMe8q20AiNGp8aNWghUpOyhUxLzbrC8eqysldD77HImYzsCBr931D93-cnAAD__0ThbDk) making a total of 169 for the year, yet another record and more than the last six years combined. In response, some Republicans renewed their calls to impeach Homeland Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. "_Secretary Mayorkas ' policies have failed,_" said House Homeland Security Chairman Mark Green.
## Nine Republicans Vie for Speaker Nomination
A new week of electioneering begins this evening in the House, with nine Republicans tossing their hat into the ring as candidates for Speaker. [Here's a rundown of who those nine are](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O6yAQRp8GOiI82BAXFLdxl9tuaWEzhEn4iQybaN9-ldTbfdInnSOdr8t6cZSoXP-7jLaHurq90xPXQQpQAtQ6cm8DIqDiaAc9n6WejDQ82uCnbdrcbLQzGw5Gmd1tMBk5aAhGKk4WJKhBgpLzNKr5FHbtBxO24JWe9YZslOip1-N0q1R6xJB-6hOP014zTzb2_mhM_WOwMFh6xEgpvT8GS6wZC77aZ343ZLCMoM0ZjOg1C8wZD3HHJxUR8Sgi0x3FrcbSahEu13IV7YHujofYXfHkXcc3jB_WP16UEjVt2Civ2dHHyfvfeX4DAAD__4RlZ9U). GOP legislators are [set to meet behind closed doors](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGO6yAUAE8D3Ysw2DgUFL9xl99uaWF4BBIwFrCxcvvVpt5upClGmq_bejMxxf3-32TU3ZfV2B5fuA4MuAAu1pE67RE5Cop6kOrK5DSzmQbNrRRqkp4pZG5zk3HOToOZjHR4FVdDo-aMi4FxwdQ0CnXxVrph9pt3Qiq5IRkZuthLvTxK3HtAn97lhfViS6ZJh96PRsQ_whfClx4wxJR-HeFLKBl3PNsHvxsSvoxcqnEQkK01tYc3bMY-G2DOWMGXCu1A88QKAeG5l7NBKCf0Aq5ADwiPshG-0KrdccaUYpMzGdk9m_iJ0v73n58AAAD__0uZaC0) for their candidate forum today at 6:30 p.m., then will move to an internal nomination election on Tuesday morning. The deadline for legislators to file their candidacies was Sunday at noon. It's expected to take [multiple rounds of voting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQBb_GdEbrNWegcJGG7tKmRMZeH5v4MMLOofx9ROp0r3jSjObjPt8dJ94e7-5JtsY8O1_5RbMCiVqinrsm2EiEpBuyyowDmFsPfbNa1fcRBkXaaA8KXcAQKQaDw7A4Q6Zhi4BaAWoYb50e2-hNUH1cYtBmNAuJDihwzUf7mXmrK8X0k190tD4_m2TXWvci9JvASeB0nme758SVfb4OAqeNziJwuigCJwXXRoHTI--y7OS-6JB-dbnIg_bvJbF3W5GLqzWRBFCIoxqaw4b95JS4mF508Hg6Tn8G9f8gvwEAAP__LYxgUQ) for any of the nine candidates to emerge as the winner. The vote then moves to the full House, and it remains unclear if any single candidate can unify the various Republican factions.
## Ranking America's Most Stressful States
Minnesota is [the least stressed-out state](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOgzAQBNCvMZ2RvQY7FC6uocu1V6LFXgefDER4E5S_PyX1dU8aaTSan-t0xVzydvvGlTynfcLA-UmTVhKMBDN1TfSJCMg05LUdLsr2Trlm8b1yDhWBnvsYkLpolDGDsw7DJWByTfagwGgFRg19Z4Y2BRu1S3OKxg52JtEpipn3o_3d88YLpfLan3S0YV-b4hfmexXmS8AoYDzPsw3bHN6hgPFdLWDU6m34SBbCyrLyQbVSlJWRqcq8SVzpyAHliaUQL49ZVn7EV7vwWprDx_uZS8nVOtGp24q5fBbw_4f8BQAA__8zYGGc) in the U.S., according to a ranking from WalletHub. The rankings use 41 metrics to measure stress across four key dimensions: work, money, family, and health. [Mississippi tops out as the most stressed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFvwyAUBOBfAxsWPDCuB4Yu3tK1o4XhEVNhE5mXWP33lTtnueWT7nTft_nmc8n7_ctv6CjV2QfKL5yVFKAF6Nnw6BIioObolB0_pO0HOfDVSdOnPiilQUUNg1pQqWii0Sb16EPk2YEErSRoOfZGj10KNqohLSlqO9oFmZEYM9Wj-6l5pxVT-a0vPLpQN17cSvRoTH8ymBhM53l2YV_ChQymq5rBpOQV4-W-FKT1uYitNhKNDmwNo2jkCZt4tm6lrfDDxceZS8nNDszI--Zz-d-j9_f_AgAA__9lfVsn) state due largely to money and work-related stress. New York and California weren't in the Top 10 of the most or least-stressed lists. WalletHub published its full 50-state ranking of the states. [Click here to see how stressful your state is.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFv8yAQgOFfA5sjuMNgDwzf4i3f2tHCcMRUOETmkqj_vmrnzq_0Ss_Hdb2GUsv99j8c5Dm3NUQuL1q1GgAHwNXI5DMREEry2s6TsqNTTu7ebW6cNgPjbPToYtRkISaLYJRy04SyeFCAWgGqeTQ4X3K0Sbu85YR2thsJoygVbufls5U775TrV3vReYntkNXvzI8u8J-ARcDyDrUS78_tpwpYKD0FLEfrPHQ-qff8rEPnwNQFLAigJ3n69HiXWku3Thh1O0Kpv3P-2_odAAD__79cVJY)

That brings the total for 2023 to 2.47 million, also a record. | | | | | | MONDAY, OCTOBER 23, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today marks the 40th anniversary of the 1983 suicide truck bombing in Beirut that killed 220 U.S. Marines sent there as part of a multinational peacekeeping force. Want to comment on a story? Head over to our . Concerned about how much personal data you have on the internet? Check out our sponsor, . | Migrants at Border Hit New High A record number of "migrant encounters" were reported in September, with 270,000 migrants being handled by border agents, That brings the total for 2023 to 2.47 million, also a record. Within that number were 18 encounters with making a total of 169 for the year, yet another record and more than the last six years combined. In response, some Republicans renewed their calls to impeach Homeland Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. "Secretary Mayorkas ' policies have failed," said House Homeland Security Chairman Mark Green. Nine Republicans Vie for Speaker Nomination A new week of electioneering begins this evening in the House, with nine Republicans tossing their hat into the ring as candidates for Speaker. . GOP legislators are for their candidate forum today at 6:30 p.m., then will move to an internal nomination election on Tuesday morning. The deadline for legislators to file their candidacies was Sunday at noon. It's expected to take for any of the nine candidates to emerge as the winner. The vote then moves to the full House, and it remains unclear if any single candidate can unify the various Republican factions. name: Jerry Evans
subject: Seven New Endorsements
body:
| | |
---
|

| Friend,
I want to share some exciting news. Today, we are announcing seven new endorsements, more evidence of our growing momentum to flip IL-11 from blue to red.
We are excited to announce endorsements from:
Josh McBroom Naperville City Councilman Rich Janor Naperville Park District Commissioner Nicole Prater Winfield Township GOP Chair and Winfield Township Supervisor Ed Bessner 5th Ward Alderman St. Charles Richard Artz Kane County Regional Board of Schools Trustee Shane Nowak Elgin Community College Trustee Cody Holt a Former U-200 School Board Member
These patriots, along with our other endorsers former IL Supreme Court Justice Bob Thomas, the Dupage Township GOP and the Dupage Township GOP Chairman Antonio Timothee, know the importance of electing a Republican to this seat. We are laying the groundwork for the type of campaign it takes to flip a seat from blue to red. Will you [join our team](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EfJKuiyQ2bHTe9g1ph41hNxRj2PuFFYGUZYjhg1DPA3rqfVIDY3yLiCshpcugQbfKUUOewUDFyZ1EnuQwQwd43pqKMCQ484Q0MlT8DPfaMwFuNgIKNW0VGUAyxXG8RKC7ay7vxjXJ2Nxz98LdeWCvIaNLk9kOcUyZOimyGJgWETAZkAmo55lBhK_RnOvaVhHZ4R4fNxFfqARcQsYWJCnHKRbEvCLi9XO8jQz352GHkZio5W7VE14l7ATcqvhUIxS&c=xN8Hwuq_zuaFl6_qJKP4JtHePrEJrpY2gMxX-3pLfQL5B69rMWttpg==&ch=SANUBp2YBo_K5MdTWQHX8d-7V533tRafpJV0dNdlUJHFmMBssjw0ww==)?
I want to thank you again for your constant support of this campaign. In just 19 days we were able to raise over $100,000 for our campaign! In the last few weeks alone, we have shown why we are the front-runner in this race. Our fundraising strength, endorsements, and our overall support from voters in the district show that our campaign is the one that will be victorious against Bill Foster in November!
While we are honored and thrilled to have received so much support, we know that more must be done to prepare for victory in the General Election. That is why I am once again asking for your support in our shared mission. By [donating here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EfJKuiyQ2bHTe9g1ph41hNxRj2PuFFYGUZYjhg1DPA3rqfVIDY3yLlm5dUvDXgTIxZ9MFPuZ3CbAunTYCW-cDU6uiBht6X68qMVH3FV2DINN9GpcGnekHASq5GVxPikqT21_Gdlde8x1EJu7krsme_EAzyGhuV2WsVchtacgSJ9BuVvA1dyrxCVofi8LD-UYJ0F1YkVt0Cc=&c=xN8Hwuq_zuaFl6_qJKP4JtHePrEJrpY2gMxX-3pLfQL5B69rMWttpg==&ch=SANUBp2YBo_K5MdTWQHX8d-7V533tRafpJV0dNdlUJHFmMBssjw0ww==) you can help us continue fighting for a new path forward in the 11th District and to finally bring back common sense to Congress. So please join us at [jerryevansforcongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EfJKuiyQ2bHTe9g1ph41hNxRj2PuFFYGUZYjhg1DPA3rqfVIDY3yLiCshpcugQbf_xq7LLhUel8QZcKR4oeB7zL3Mi8iJyIqRVwWYIxVW9BtGsdOH1l-RfvUIfgp4f4RrM_5wa4R2m5rjQIuEyzXRghrPywPt624&c=xN8Hwuq_zuaFl6_qJKP4JtHePrEJrpY2gMxX-3pLfQL5B69rMWttpg==&ch=SANUBp2YBo_K5MdTWQHX8d-7V533tRafpJV0dNdlUJHFmMBssjw0ww==) to learn more and [join](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EfJKuiyQ2bHTe9g1ph41hNxRj2PuFFYGUZYjhg1DPA3rqfVIDY3yLiCshpcugQbfv3ohJEitJbyxsrP4V96BloGP5KyeHWWjrGF2pJ_5Icd9icYpAOCUIhaX8mVvxU4D2XnAcWxAHL-Tmq6b2l5BSY_VXWdz0GCpTYmzaipEeIyE34dfWdUNhW93WbBgOYkO1WHeVsk1oq5qsXu2I5h9AOrFiBQR3NVeGdKI-PBSaWQdzvLMk5rSSVWXZj8k3wKO&c=xN8Hwuq_zuaFl6_qJKP4JtHePrEJrpY2gMxX-3pLfQL5B69rMWttpg==&ch=SANUBp2YBo_K5MdTWQHX8d-7V533tRafpJV0dNdlUJHFmMBssjw0ww==) our campaign today!
For the cause,
Jerry Evans
P.S. Do you want to add your name to the growing list of endorsements for the campaign? If so, email the campaign at info@jerryevansforcongress.com and we will get in touch with you.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: House Speaker Fight is NOT Over. Need your input.
body:
| | |
---
Thank you to everyone who made calls and engaged in the Speaker race for Jim Jordan last week. If you were not following our updates on X, please be sure to do so by following [x.com/jennybethm](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjpudWxsLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyMzI5Ni0wM2YwYjU1ZjRhYWM0NjE3OWIyMTdmOGY3MWY5ODA1MyIsInBoIjpudWxsLCJtIjpmYWxzZSwidWkiOiIwIiwidW4iOiIiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3guY29tL2plbm55YmV0aG0_bWlkPTQ2NTQ0JmlkPVQxN1VOVHNmWkp0d2tTeVRUQyJ9/ioavWO-z0LqFGqNIq6UM5g). Even if you do not have an X account, you can see the updates. It’s the fastest, most efficient way for us to keep you posted with this very fluid, fast-changing situation on Capitol Hill. **Please tell us if you want us to endorse Byron Donalds for Speaker, or someone else, or not. [Take our survey now.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._7g30ISdjlN9urgLpjqUw)**
---
Several congressmen told me the phones have not lit up like they did last week since Obamacare was moving through Congress. 200 congressmen heard you and voted for Jim Jordan. Unfortunately, many of those same Congressmen where less than transparent when they voted by secret ballot not to re-affirm Jordan’s nomination on Friday afternoon. While Jordan fell short in the end, having 200 who voted for him on the floor is so much more than what we have ever had in the past for a conservative Speaker, which is incredible. Thank you for taking the time to call. You love this country, our liberty, and our Constitition. Thank you for continuing to stand for liberty and remaining engaged in this process despite this disappointment of Jim Jordan failing in his bid for Speaker. Now is time we re-engage and fight the next set of skirmishes. _Noon Sunday was the deadline for Members of Congress to announce whether they were running for Speaker.__ __Today, Monday, the Republican House Conference will have a members only candidate forum.__ __Tuesday, they will likely begin voting. I do not know how many ballots it will take, but suspect it will be more than one ballot._ These are Congressmen who have announced they are running for Speaker:
* Jack Bergman (MI)
* Byron Donalds (FL)
* Tom Emmer (MN)
* Kevin Hern (OK)
* Mike Johnson (LA)
* Dan Meuser (PA)
* Gary Palmer (AL)
* Austin Scott (GA)
* Pete Sessions (TX)

---
**We would recommend you choose to endorse Byron Donalds.** He is a member of the House Freedom Caucus, aligns with our values, and honestly, I think he is one of, if not the best spokesmen for the GOP Conference. He explains why we need to address the national debt in clear, concise language that the average person can understand. I’ve seen many people on Capitol Hill who seem to be intimidated by big numbers and numbers with lots of zeros and commas - like $33,000,000,000,000. Congressman Donalds says he is running because he thinks he is the best suited to fix the issues of the House. As Speaker, Byron Donalds says he would:
* _Unify the Conference_
* _Get back to business_
* _Secure the border_
* _Fund the government responsibly_
* _Continue to layout the conservative vision for the people who sent us here_

clean_body: | | | Thank you to everyone who made calls and engaged in the Speaker race for Jim Jordan last week. If you were not following our updates on X, please be sure to do so by following . Even if you do not have an X account, you can see the updates. It’s the fastest, most efficient way for us to keep you posted with this very fluid, fast-changing situation on Capitol Hill. Please tell us if you want us to endorse Byron Donalds for Speaker, or someone else, or not. Several congressmen told me the phones have not lit up like they did last week since Obamacare was moving through Congress. 200 congressmen heard you and voted for Jim Jordan. Unfortunately, many of those same Congressmen where less than transparent when they voted by secret ballot not to re-affirm Jordan’s nomination on Friday afternoon. While Jordan fell short in the end, having 200 who voted for him on the floor is so much more than what we have ever had in the past for a conservative Speaker, which is incredible. Thank you for taking the time to call. You love this country, our liberty, and our Constitition. Thank you for continuing to stand for liberty and remaining engaged in this process despite this disappointment of Jim Jordan failing in his bid for Speaker. Now is time we re-engage and fight the next set of skirmishes. Noon Sunday was the deadline for Members of Congress to announce whether they were running for Speaker. Today, Monday, the Republican House Conference will have a members only candidate forum. Tuesday, they will likely begin voting. I do not know how many ballots it will take, but suspect it will be more than one ballot. These are Congressmen who have announced they are running for Speaker: Jack Bergman (MI) Byron Donalds (FL) Tom Emmer (MN) Kevin Hern (OK) Mike Johnson (LA) Dan Meuser (PA) Gary Palmer (AL) Austin Scott (GA) Pete Sessions (TX) We would recommend you choose to endorse Byron Donalds. He is a member of the House Freedom Caucus, aligns with our values, and honestly, I think he is one of, if not the best spokesmen for the GOP Conference. He explains why we need to address the national debt in clear, concise language that the average person can understand. I’ve seen many people on Capitol Hill who seem to be intimidated by big numbers and numbers with lots of zeros and commas - like $33,000,000,000,000. Congressman Donalds says he is running because he thinks he is the best suited to fix the issues of the House. As Speaker, Byron Donalds says he would: Unify the Conference Get back to business Secure the border Fund the government responsibly Continue to layout the conservative vision for the people who sent us here , please tell us if you want us to endorse Byron Donalds for Speaker, or someone else, or not at all. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | | | | | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. | | © 2023 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314, Woodstock, GA 30189 | mailto:support@teapartypatriots.org?subject=Unsubscribe%20Request "support@teapartypatriots.org"

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2bc41e3324834a1a9187c73e7a74c1cf8c83ecfc640cc75498bcc1fc159dc21912031a95e20a580155bdd0421fc5ee19a183d9fdcaa8db613f5c0194ae39e023
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2bc41e3324834a1a05131570d6385ea774feedf205efe539b481969985485990da0930d0ee3cc5dfd74a2950e568f7553f305b45cd8c3c05120e45e8e0982d1e

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2bc41e3324834a1a05131570d6385ea774feedf205efe539b481969985485990da0930d0ee3cc5dfd74a2950e568f7553f305b45cd8c3c05120e45e8e0982d1e

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

We need your help to get the job done. Donate today. Don't miss Ron DeSantis' 🎥 message In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. Outsider Populist Candidate Heads To Runoff Election In Argentina

Argentina’s right-wing populist presidential candidate Javier Milei
will head to a run-off after failing to win the first round of the
presidential election on Sunday. Milei and former security minister
Sergio Massa will face off again in November in a runoff vote,
according to the New York Times.

Illegal immigration at the northern border increased roughly 347% from
2022 to 2023, according to recently updated Customs and Border
Protection (CBP) data. The data shows that Border Patrol encounters of
migrants crossing the U.S.-Canadian border jumped from 2,238 in 022 to
10,021 in 2023. Illegal immigration surpassed 2 million encounters
nationwide in each of the aforementioned years.
