name: Costello for Senate Newsletter
subject: Costello for U.S. Senate Campaign Update
body:
Dear Friend, ____
I just wanted to share with you a few of our campaign’s recent X posts (formally tweets), even though we are not fans of Elon Musk, to encourage you to sign on to (and possibly share) our X and Instagram posts: [www.instagram.com/costelloforsenate](http://www.instagram.com/costelloforsenate) and [www.twitter.com/costello4senate](http://www.twitter.com/costello4senate).
__
We plan to do more posts in the coming months to amplify our message that Washington is broken (too much gridlock and dysfunction). That our democracy and personal rights and freedoms are being undermined and that our most pressing problems (i.e., climate change, shoddy infrastructure, underperforming schools, inadequate health care, insufficient retirement security, economic inequality, escalating gun violence, etc.) are being unaddressed. And that only through the enactment of long-overdue (_and sensible)_ legislative and constitutional reforms will real change and progress be achieved.____
Recent posts:____
____
Washington is broken! GOP-imposed gridlock abounds and our imperfect democracy is in danger of becoming even more flawed. To fix Washington we need to substantially reform our governing practices and institutions. For real change and progress:[www.costelloforsenate.com](http://www.costelloforsenate.com/) ____
____
Fixing Washington: To strengthen the legitimacy, popularity, and authority of presidents we should abolish the Electoral College and establish a system of directly electing presidents and include ranked choice voting (RCV) when there are more than two candidates. #democracy ____
____
Congress is unquestionably broken! The fix: restructure the House so that it is comprised of 200+ non-gerrymandered, multi-winner districts, with 600+ proportionally elected multi-party representatives. More democratic, accountable, and effective! #uscongress #mainepolitics ____
____
The U.S. Senate is detrimentally dysfunctional and obscenely undemocratic! Time to end the filibuster and nominee holds and restructure its allocation of political power to be more in line with a state’s population and the principle of one person one equal vote. #USSenate #MainePolitics ____

If it is something you can afford, your contribution, no matter the amount, can make a difference in ensuring that our message of reform, real change, and progress is heard.

[Donate here >>](https://secure.actblue.com/entity/fundraisers/145994)

As always, check out our website ([www.costelloforsenate.com](http://www.costelloforsenate.com)) for updates about the campaign.

Thank you and best always,

Grace Costello

Border Patrol encounters of illegal immigrants from China at the U.S.-Mexico border increased more than 1,100%, according to recently updated federal data. Encounters of Chinese migrants crossing illegally jumped from 1,970 in fiscal year 2022 to 24,048 in fiscal year 2023, according to U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP).

name: Michael B. Moore for South Carolina
subject: "On Message" From Michael B. Moore
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104585/images/Logo_white_rectangle.jpg]
On Message
from Michael B. Moore
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
Welcome to our campaign newsletter.
We're happy you're here.
We'll use this space to keep you updated on all the latest stories, events and opportunities related to Michael's run for South Carolina's 1st congressional district.
Stay tuned — we'll be in your inbox every Monday.
See you on the trail.
Join our movement [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
In the news
https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401 [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401]
POLITICO [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401]
The national media is paying more and more attention to our race every day. Last week, POLITICO [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401] reported that Democrats "are entertaining a once-unlikely prospect: retaking the House majority by winning in the South."
The story specifically highlighted the SC-01 racial gerrymandering case that will soon come before the Supreme Court [https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/17/2181780/-My-swing-district-has-its-date-before-the-Supreme-Court] .
Per POLITICO: "It's impossible to know how many seats could become competitive, but the party is hoping a handful may come into play and that new maps could even threaten the likes of ... Nancy Mace."
https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/ [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/]
Roll Call [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/]
Roll Call [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/] ran a story explaining how new congressional maps "could be drawn in time to change the electoral landscape in 2024, when Democrats need a net gain of just five seats to take control of the House."
According to Roll Call, the SC-01 Supreme Court case "may also impact the federal redistricting litigation in Florida, which involves similar racial gerrymandering claims."
https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/ [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/]
Charleston City Paper [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/]
And back home in the Lowcountry, the Charleston City Paper [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/] published an editorial calling on the Supreme Court to redraw the lines of SC-01 — so that the map "reflects the true electoral nature of our lower coast, not a district that the GOP bleached by moving thousands of Black voters to other districts."
On the picket line
https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/25/2183281/-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers [https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/25/2183281/-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers]
Union of Southern Service Workers [https://ussw.org/]
Michael expressed solidarity with the workers of the Waffle House on Garners Ferry Road in Columbia, South Carolina, who began a three-day strike [https://twitter.com/RaiseUptheSouth/status/1677737443145949184] on this month after delivering to management their petition to organize.
As a business executive with nearly four decades of private sector experience — including several years as a leader in South Carolina's food industry — Michael knows firsthand that employees throughout any organization deserve fair pay and safe working conditions.
https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/ [https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/]
Holy City Sinner [https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/]
Michael steadfastly stands behind the striking Waffle House staff as they seek sensible concessions from management and strive for a better quality of life for restaurant workers in South Carolina.
He also urged Nancy Mace — who often mentions her past experience as a Waffle House waitress [https://twitter.com/NancyMace/status/1451926458994151427?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1451926458994151427%7Ctwgr%5Eb80d1ca7caee292360b8edb17aecebf62c52def8%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dailykos.com%2Fstories%2F2023%2F7%2F25%2F2183281%2F-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers] on the campaign trail — to similarly endorse the demands of those on strike.
In the arena
https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486 [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486]
Rep. Nancy Mace [https://twitter.com/RepNancyMace/status/1684928879235072000?s=20]
Nancy Mace attended a POLITICO event [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486] last week, where she warned that Republicans need to refocus on "child care, maternal care, prenatal care [and] abortion" if they want to keep control of the House.
It was more cheap talk from Mace, who — time and again — has flip-flopped on the issues that matter most to women and working families.
https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans?emci=9f4780c9-692d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid= [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans?emci=9f4780c9-692d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
The Guardian [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans]
Here are the facts:
*
In
2019,
Nancy
Mace
voted
for
a
six-week
abortion
ban
[https://www.scstatehouse.gov/votehistory.php?KEY=16575]
in
the
South
Carolina
legislature.
*
In
2021,
she
voted
against
the
expansion
of
the
child
tax
credit
[https://mace.house.gov/media/press-releases/mace-so-called-american-rescue-plan-was-never-about-covid-19-relief]
in
the
American
Rescue
Plan.
*
In
January,
she
co-sponsored
H.R.
7
[https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/5/2179435/-My-opponent-is-co-sponsoring-another-extreme-bill]
,
which
would
make
health
coverage
that
includes
reproductive
care
ineligible
for
federal
funding.
*
In
July,
she
voted
for
an
NDAA
amendment
that
makes
it
harder
for
servicewomen
to
access
health
care
[https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/17/2181768/-Nancy-Mace-called-it-an-asshole-move-Then-she-voted-for-it]
—
a
policy
she
herself
called
an
"asshole
move."
Nothing about Nancy Mace's record is pro-children or pro-women. She should stop pretending otherwise.
On social media
https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore [https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore]
Michael surpassed 6,600 Twitter followers [https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore] this week! Can you help us reach 7,500 followers before the end of the month?
And if you aren't already, make sure to keep up with our campaign on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/MichaelBMooreforCongress] , Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/mbm_sc01/] , Threads [https://www.threads.net/@mbm_sc01] , LinkedIn [https://www.linkedin.com/company/moore4sc/about/] and TikTok. [https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelbmoore4sc]
From the trail
https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/ [https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/]
Michael had a fun weekend at San Diego Comic-Con, where he helped some talented artists promote a forthcoming graphic novel [https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/] about his great-great-grandfather: Civil War hero and Recontruction-era Congressman Robert Smalls.
https://screenrant.com/defiant-the-story-of-robert-smalls-sdcc-interview/ [https://screenrant.com/defiant-the-story-of-robert-smalls-sdcc-interview/]
At a time when Republican politicians like Ron DeSantis are seeking to rewrite our nation's history [https://www.msnbc.com/the-reidout/reidout-blog/ron-desantis-florida-slavery-curriculum-rcna96052] — exploiting partisan divides at the expense of our children's education — Michael believes it's more important than ever for leaders to embrace the totality of America's legacy.
https://blackgirlnerds.com/the-creative-team-behind-defiant-the-robert-smalls-story/ [https://blackgirlnerds.com/the-creative-team-behind-defiant-the-robert-smalls-story/]
Part of that important work is elevating the stories of lesser-known patriots like Robert Smalls, who — in the face of unfathomable hardship — never stopped working to make America a more perfect Union [https://www.nps.gov/people/robert-smalls.htm] .
Michael is proud to be seeking the same House seat that his great-great-grandfather held nearly 140 years ago.
On our team
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
There's so much work to do, and we're only just getting started.
Join us in our fight to flip this swing district.
Together — indivisible — we'll build a brighter future for South Carolina.
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter] Volunteer [https://www.michaelbmoore.com/volunteer]
https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore [https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore] https://www.facebook.com/MichaelBMooreforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/MichaelBMooreforCongress] https://instagram.com/https://www.instagram.com/mbm_sc01/ [https://instagram.com/https://www.instagram.com/mbm_sc01/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/moore4sc/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/moore4sc/] https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelbmoore4sc [https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelbmoore4sc]
Copyright (C) Michael B. Moore for South Carolina. All rights reserved.
Michael B. Moore for South Carolina
3022 South Morgans Point Road Suite 295
Mount Pleasant, SC 29466
United States

Nancy Mace." [] Roll Call [] Roll Call [] ran a story explaining how new congressional maps "could be drawn in time to change the electoral landscape in 2024, when Democrats need a net gain of just five seats to take control of the House." According to Roll Call, the SC-01 Supreme Court case "may also impact the federal redistricting litigation in Florida, which involves similar racial gerrymandering claims." [] Charleston City Paper [] And back home in the Lowcountry, the Charleston City Paper [] published an editorial calling on the Supreme Court to redraw the lines of SC-01 — so that the map "reflects the true electoral nature of our lower coast, not a district that the GOP bleached by moving thousands of Black voters to other districts." On the picket line [] Union of Southern Service Workers [] Michael expressed solidarity with the workers of the Waffle House on Garners Ferry Road in Columbia, South Carolina, who began a three-day strike [] on this month after delivering to management their petition to organize. As a business executive with nearly four decades of private sector experience — including several years as a leader in South Carolina's food industry — Michael knows firsthand that employees throughout any organization deserve fair pay and safe working conditions. [] Holy City Sinner [] Michael steadfastly stands behind the striking Waffle House staff as they seek sensible concessions from management and strive for a better quality of life for restaurant workers in South Carolina. He also urged Nancy Mace — who often mentions her past experience as a Waffle House waitress [] on the campaign trail — to similarly endorse the demands of those on strike. In the arena [] Rep. Nancy Mace [] Nancy Mace attended a POLITICO event [] last week, where she warned that Republicans need to refocus on "child care, maternal care, prenatal care [and] abortion" if they want to keep control of the House. It was more cheap talk from Mace, who — time and again — has flip-flopped on the issues that matter most to women and working families. = [=] The Guardian [] Here are the facts: In 2019, Nancy Mace voted for a six-week abortion ban [] in the South Carolina legislature. In 2021, she voted against the expansion of the child tax credit [] in the American Rescue Plan. In January, she co-sponsored H.R. 7 [] , which would make health coverage that includes reproductive care ineligible for federal funding. In July, she voted for an NDAA amendment that makes it harder for servicewomen to access health care [] — a policy she herself called an "asshole move." Nothing about Nancy Mace's record is pro-children or pro-women. She should stop pretending otherwise. On social media [] Michael surpassed 6,600 Twitter followers [] this week! Can you help us reach 7,500 followers before the end of the month? And if you aren't already, make sure to keep up with our campaign on Facebook [] , Instagram [] , Threads [] , LinkedIn [] and TikTok. [] From the trail [] Michael had a fun weekend at San Diego Comic-Con, where he helped some talented artists promote a forthcoming graphic novel [] about his great-great-grandfather: Civil War hero and Recontruction-era Congressman Robert Smalls. [] At a time when Republican politicians like Ron DeSantis are seeking to rewrite our nation's history [] — exploiting partisan divides at the expense of our children's education — Michael believes it's more important than ever for leaders to embrace the totality of America's legacy. [] Part of that important work is elevating the stories of lesser-known patriots like Robert Smalls, who — in the face of unfathomable hardship — never stopped working to make America a more perfect Union [] . Michael is proud to be seeking the same House seat that his great-great-grandfather held nearly 140 years ago. On our team [] There's so much work to do, and we're only just getting started. Join us in our fight to flip this swing district. Together — indivisible — we'll build a brighter future for South Carolina. Donate [] Volunteer [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright (C) Michael B. Moore for South Carolina. All rights reserved. Michael B. subject: Sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws!

body:
If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY.

| |

---
| | | Friend -

Democrats are racing to undermine election integrity ahead of the most important election of our lifetimes.
- **FIRST:** Deep-blue cities like New York and DC made it LEGAL for non-U.S. citizens to vote in local elections.

- **THEN:** Joe Biden SUED red states for enforcing voter identification laws.

- **NOW:** Democrats are filing LEGAL ACTION to gut strong election integrity measures in the swing state of North Carolina.
_If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections ... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY._

_**[I’m personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24447%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R2RaycxC4N2%2btmA0hzZfxA&sysid=1 "I’m personally asking you

Look:

Last time the Democrats were in power, they attempted to fast-track an election-rigging scheme that would have irreparably undermined the security of our elections. They wanted to use your tax dollars to fund their campaigns, federalize our elections, and destroy voter ID laws NATIONWIDE.

**They called their election-rigging scheme HR 1 - meaning helping prevent Conservatives from winning elections was their FIRST PRIORITY when they controlled the House.**

If they think the American People are willing to turn a blind eye to this critical issue, it would only empower them to push harder.

**That’s where you come in.**

_**[We’re pleading with every Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws. Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections
once and for all.")**_

Can I count on seeing your name? _I hope so._

For America,

Steve Scalise

name: Scalise, Steve
subject: Sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY.

| |

---
| | | Friend -

Democrats are racing to undermine election integrity ahead of the most important election of our lifetimes.
- **FIRST:** Deep-blue cities like New York and DC made it LEGAL for non-U.S. citizens to vote in local elections.

- **THEN:** Joe Biden SUED red states for enforcing voter identification laws.

- **NOW:** Democrats are filing LEGAL ACTION to gut strong election integrity measures in the swing state of North Carolina.
_If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections ... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY._

_**[I'm personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zan0f1osti8bkbch3h3ck7921iv9ag1jfpaeblt8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm6o72c5h2bs "I’m personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.")**_
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME: FEDERALLY MANDATE VOTER ID LAWS](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7klv4la5no2st4dlvq7gjqkq0241kr5rm2g224o_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm6o72c5h2bs "ADD YOUR NAME: FEDERALLY MANDATE VOTER ID LAWS")
---
Look:

Last time the Democrats were in power, they attempted to fast-track an election-rigging scheme that would have irreparably undermined the security of our elections. They wanted to use your tax dollars to fund their campaigns, federalize our elections, and destroy voter ID laws NATIONWIDE.

**They called their election-rigging scheme HR 1 - meaning helping prevent Conservatives from winning elections was their FIRST PRIORITY when they controlled the House.**

If they think the American People are willing to turn a blind eye to this critical issue, it would only empower them to push harder.

**That 's where you come in.**

_**[We're pleading with every Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws. Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections once and for all.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztm2dvresn15p05s8fi7qtgl5oellacjrq7imcs0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm6o72c5h2bs "We’re pleading with every Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws. Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections once and for all.")**_

Can I count on seeing your name? _I hope so._

For America,

Steve Scalise

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jordan could be indicted and he is running for Speaker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend,
Jim Jordan isn’t just a far-Right ideologue: he continues to spread mis/disinformation about the 2020 election, he didn't protect the Constitution, and he didn't protect the students at OSU. In fact, he's accused of covering up serial sexual abuse while he was a wrestling coach at OSU. Worse yet, he could be an unindicted co-conspirator in one or more of Donald Trump’s many criminal cases.
At any moment, Jim Jordan could be indicted for his role in planning the treasonous attempt to overturn the 2020 election results. And now his far-Right extremist cronies are trying to make him the next Speaker of the House. This is a crisis of NATIONAL concern.
But here’s the deal— I can win. I will beat Jim Jordan and make sure he doesn’t return to Washington with your help.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson]
I need your support now more than ever. Jordan is extremely unpopular in this district, and his lust for power will be his downfall. People don't like that he's more concerned with getting on FOX News than working for us. I am doing the work required to win. I am out in the district meeting with people everyday. Jordan hasn't written any Bills in 16 years. I am currently writing 8!
Can I count on you to contribute $25 or more right now -- split with Serve America -- to help me and my team kick Jordan out of Congress once and for all? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson]
Things are moving quickly and Democrats cannot afford to wait even a minute while Republicans like Jordan plot the demise of our democratic system.
Thank you in advance for your support at this critical moment in American history.
Sincerely,
-Tamie Wilson
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson]
Tamie Wilson
Candidate for Congress (OH-4)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: The importance of a dollar.
body:
I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za05nn3asgb7qpfehebdksmq490f082huvj3ecag_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs)
---

I am a mom and an accountant, Friend, which means I know how to stretch a dollar.

That's why, on day one, I made sure our team knew that the success of our movement relies on grassroots supporters like YOU. With that, comes a responsibility to make every dollar count and spend your donations wisely.

Unlike other campaigns that are burning through money on private planes, fancy dinners, and country clubs, **we are a lean and mean operation.**

We stretch every dollar as far as it can go and know it's important to spend our money when it counts. But even covering basic expenses to host town halls and travel to battleground states to meet with voters adds up.

**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z372ggt2hnm5u37hnquh8sdv9eaiiphk4sgeiu60_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win! ")**

Here are just a couple meaningful ways your contribution has helped our team:

**-> TRAVELING:** From day one, I've prioritized meeting with voters, shaking every hand, and amplifying my message everywhere I can. In order to do that, my team and I are flying all over the country, and we're doing it while spending money wisely.

I can tell you firsthand, we're not out here lighting money on fire with private planes and extravagant luxury hotels like some campaigns. We're flying a lot of Spirit and JetBlue. We're getting to New Hampshire, Iowa, and everywhere else we need to go with the most affordable options we can find.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z57mt1gv4cncmo27p00cf84n35q74on007maaheo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs)
---

**-> EVENTS:** We're running a true grassroots campaign, and that means being on the ground, holding as many grassroots events as possible. Every time we hold a town hall in Iowa, South Carolina, or New Hampshire, it's an opportunity to share my vision, answer questions, and gain the confidence of voters.

But what you may not realize is that all of the costs can quickly add up to rent the event space, chairs, and sound equipment. In order to spend your money wisely, we're holding these events at places like bakeries, local venues, and farms.

---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztk7414m7g0krlumosaqvge3f4tcugqqlqsaaolg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2p2q2q8fd3ud4r4catip7dcvhsttkj1tirpsdd0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs)
---
At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day and spending every dollar wisely. But all of this still costs money, which is why we need your help.

Once the first-in-the-nation caucus is here, it's only a matter of time before the rest of the country begins to cast their ballots.

It's a marathon and we've got to stay on pace to win each and every day. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhg1jhibqtt5gh95k0nqii2bp13laleth9evtu60_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!")**

---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $20.24](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3l8cqk3ums0v0479oiiec5eoj9eqeh516ejv39g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs)
---

**It 's crunch time, Friend!** There's no room for holding back. With just **88 days** left until voting begins every single day matters which is why I appreciate your generous support today when it matters most.
---

My very best,

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs7nrb41saotks8g63d5sqk8gpnam83uoeth1rf0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z95d746fvdridqj7igs4epg3ieh751qfqq66jo2o_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlfrbs5ir30tu5t1cgv5orhrubn58cvgo44dmlto_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp31c404e2uk9mmvbu4j50nbph5tbg119rfc7cc0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcv0pcmg7icqi6fu362csj47t30bsd0bqm2kj978_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.
**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh39nfsns6r5me447d0nj2a3qo4u7p0qkel0a7f0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdl4iuh0dkqpimisubljl8ieblqsjllo6ecir2ro_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs "DONATE")
---
| | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvgjq4ncn1bm77ebrpmqh71inm5k0dctqv64lh80_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs)
---

**By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. [Terms and conditions](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9afivb5d44g4fsdm76f6djrhcl0crdqnk0uq9tg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs) and [Privacy Policy](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqcitlhgoagmi58ap9vquokgu1gk0i7jea4h9bo8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs).apply. You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. [Privacy Policy](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi0maj2r84hjn63j5dpdu6uaf40rgvp24lli9dp8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs). [Terms and conditions](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zka1pfege4k57rr51j1k4t0o62klevrh6o11pb80_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs).

Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

[Privacy Policy](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zusspqssl3ttq7ff5q58mbcsqt5mj4lmkgoudlro_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1jm1or6chh2bs)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: PROOF: Biden Bribe Check Enclosed
body:
Caught Red-Handed

| | Friend - The bombshell report that directly links President Joe Biden to foreign investments was just released. Joe Biden was personally paid via a **$200,000 personal check** for “loan repayment” by his brother James (Jim) Biden ON THE SAME DAY James received the EXACT same amount from a US Hospital chain by promising to secure a Middle East investor, bank records show.
---
| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35550%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h3Zana0n3fa8sDk8XyXQZA&sysid=1)
---
This is the direct evidence linking Joe Biden to the Biden pay-to-play schemes the **Democrats and their propagandists in the media said didn’t exist.**
**This is corruption at the highest level.**
We’ve released evidence on the Biden Crime Family before. Hunter’s business dealings. 10% for the “big guy”. . but NOTHING compares to what we’ve just uncovered - Direct payments to Joe Biden himself!
**And I have to tell you I am a bit worried. . .**
You and I know the DOJ, FBI and the media are going to try and suppress this information and sweep it under the rug.
WE CANNOT LET THEM.
| [ **DEFEND MTG - EXPOSE THE BIDENS** ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35551%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JD3R1mzP5VRaScDXKWBTEA&sysid=1)
---
I need you to share this information far and wide.
After you forward this information to everyone you know, I’m asking you to chip in $10, $25, or $50 so I can continue emailing, texting, and running ads to reach hundreds of thousands of like-minded people so we can **overwhelm any media/DOJ/FBI operation that aims to suppress this critical piece of evidence.**
**[Will you chip in here](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35552%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mgNMFIIJQa1rysc6YO%2b1Uw&sysid=1)? **
The Democrats have painted me Public Enemy #1 since the day I was sworn in.
I’ve been attacked in public. My home has been targeted. Angry leftist mobs have swarmed and surrounded me.
Even just this week, a Hamas terrorist sympathizer lunged toward me in the building where my office is located.
The Democrats, the angry mobs, and their lapdogs in the media will do anything to attack, smear, and shut me up. But I refuse to back down.
I need the resources on hand to immediately do a counter-offensive once the Democrat hounds come barking.
As you know, I have been leading the fight to have Joe Biden Impeached since the day he was sworn in because I knew Joe Biden was compromised.
It hasn’t made me any friends with the Uniparty. But it made me a lot of enemies.
I need to know you have my back.
**[Please rush an emergency donation right away to help me keep fighting](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35553%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UIbxBgt76bdJvtWOk3juyQ&sysid=1). **
Joe Biden sold out America for his own personal profit and to enrich his family like Hunter Biden.
You and I cannot let that happen.

name: American Update
subject: Another American Oil Titan Strikes A Major Deal
body:
And Illegal Immigration At Northern Border Increased 347% In Just One Year

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671985%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZdQ6fd573YjvIUWgablDJg&sysid=1 Another American Oil Titan Strikes A Major Deal

One of the largest oil companies in the U.S. has reached a deal to acquire a smaller competitor in the latest sign that a wave of consolidation may be sweeping over the American oil and gas industry. Chevron will be acquiring Hess for $53 billion in a stock-for-stock deal, the two companies announced Monday.

Illegal immigration at the northern border increased roughly 347% from 2022 to 2023, according to recently updated Customs and Border Protection (CBP) data. The data shows that Border Patrol encounters of migrants crossing the U.S.-Canadian border jumped from 2,238 in 022 to 10,021 in 2023. Illegal immigration surpassed 2 million encounters nationwide in each of the aforementioned years.

Argentina’s right-wing populist presidential candidate Javier Milei will head to a run-off after failing to win the first round of the presidential election on Sunday. Milei and former security minister Sergio Massa will face off again in November in a runoff vote, according to the New York Times.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: The importance of a dollar.
body:
I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8q41vr0vt4n4842g8fitr7dddm3mu9qf9t5fnbo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs)
---

I am a mom and an accountant, Friend, which means I know how to stretch a dollar.

That's why, on day one, I made sure our team knew that the success of our movement relies on grassroots supporters like YOU. With that, comes a responsibility to make every dollar count and spend your donations wisely.

Unlike other campaigns that are burning through money on private planes, fancy dinners, and country clubs, **we are a lean and mean operation.**

We stretch every dollar as far as it can go and know it's important to spend our money when it counts. But even covering basic expenses to host town halls and travel to battleground states to meet with voters adds up.

**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zei6m9vcad65gsvpm4e0crut4o4rmbbgu0b5ipog_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win! ")**

Here are just a couple meaningful ways your contribution has helped our team:

**-> TRAVELING:** From day one, I've prioritized meeting with voters, shaking every hand, and amplifying my message everywhere I can. In order to do that, my team and I are flying all over the country, and we're doing it while spending money wisely.

I can tell you firsthand, we're not out here lighting money on fire with private planes and extravagant luxury hotels like some campaigns. We're flying a lot of Spirit and JetBlue. We're getting to New Hampshire, Iowa, and everywhere else we need to go with the most affordable options we can find.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdragffjh389ci68hd6p9o0uchv0ekoj0i2q0d5g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs)
---

**-> EVENTS:** We're running a true grassroots campaign, and that means being on the ground, holding as many grassroots events as possible. Every time we hold a town hall in Iowa, South Carolina, or New Hampshire, it's an opportunity to share my vision, answer questions, and gain the confidence of voters.

But what you may not realize is that all of the costs can quickly add up to rent the event space, chairs, and sound equipment. In order to spend your money wisely, we're holding these events at places like bakeries, local venues, and farms.

---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgok3ppdpbue7d8rgfq8rtunbbdu73tlk1qi76m8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0nuor92u8120n0p0vidrlaqpmtu63a7ohfcgu0o_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs)
---
At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day and spending every dollar wisely. But all of this still costs money, which is why we need your help.

Once the first-in-the-nation caucus is here, it's only a matter of time before the rest of the country begins to cast their ballots.

It's a marathon and we've got to stay on pace to win each and every day. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq7mfvifonnb1ii4j2v2133d7g7hr2fjjkkmfu0g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!")**

---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $20.24](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ph2u6gatk40qkkamp9pf666t5tu1uo39hoqq2g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs)
---

**It 's crunch time, Friend!** There's no room for holding back. With just **88 days** left until voting begins every single day matters which is why I appreciate your generous support today when it matters most.
---

My very best,

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zancjo8vpr1v12bnkdb2e8s4rk2m83md8gb6bq1o_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv8pjl22394bdmc9sivebq29ec3jsfg50to1eke0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjkljc51sbg01srjldpvsa805ho266fo75se6ud8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2pbg36oumnbqur3272okl3gffgoaq6j8laranoo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zos22t41j88gtlj8miul642v9drpbl1330snntfo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.
**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z662soptdah5tjdrse2ra0c1pi1vc27qfco97bc8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z06u27r29bq2afr1na311q06go0g4jo7tmcllpl0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge0ob1clh2bs "DONATE")
---

Ukraine’s unrestrained approach toward sabotage and assassination
since Russia’s invasion is testing its deeply embedded relationship
with the CIA, officials from both countries said, according to The
Washington Post.

name: Jeff Sites
subject: The Republican Party is in disarray. They want my opponent as their leader.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
Hi, it’s Jeff Sites, the Democratic Army Veteran running for Congress against Jim Jordan.
The Republican Party is in shambles right now. There’s no other way to put it.
After ousting their own Speaker (the first time that has EVER happened), they’ve waffled on picking a Speaker nominee and allowed internal conflict to take over.
They’ve done all of this instead of working for the American people.
And now, they’ve chosen Jim Jordan, a Trump-backed right-wing extremist with lots of friends inside the MAGA caucus.
This is their fearless leader.
I don’t think I have to spell this out for you: Jim Jordan would be a useless leader for a completely unhinged party.
Our country deserves better than that.
That’s why I’m running to defeat Jim Jordan in the next election.
I’m Jeff Sites, and I’m a Democratic Army Veteran. I will stop Jim Jordan, but I need your help to do it. Please, donate whatever you can to my campaign today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-js]
Thank you,
Jeff
P.S. If you want to learn more about my background, please watch my campaign launch video [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-js] and consider pitching in a few bucks to help me spread the word:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-js [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-js]

name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: Do you believe in free and fair elections?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie for Congress
body:
Voting should be easy for eligible American citizens, and it should also be hard to cheat in elections. |
---
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=e742296e902943faa979fa03765cdaec&_e=OuaGimRTbOs_Gd2dfWNTtVdKQS_uBDgJVwzBQ9fD3anqaTekN-MpdRP_sfQ_a6hPQHkuRXn7atpdPkz0vP1Sf4JrtM3dHwPqbbXviywsxn2mfANgbY__O_ehag6E3s-xR1AiG-IpdpBuF9_B6Pe8NbfpxVGg_rB6_GZxflK49QmcKjDLkiW8-ixZSa2oNmNFh1daT9DmHPLAOiSPWbJPWeIsLBL6HqgZk7DSJ_LD301Rtnf1tZ6VjUg9y6nPHSsFnkr10VgwunugmujesUnSwHGtJ3hTeNTcndPSwB71jZ6eMTzwZIhCoc0r2kE8r5BQMfAedQDq00QjFaMwAXArqA1Glhv3a1iAjanWJMnyWrVAum4w2JMagiSiO7hoPWLlH5BArsJrcFcq-TtW_vB_GZ1tQSBKbyJ1NvyWCt-0Ik6dvc41dPCp3zEruMoiMSEe)
Fellow American,

The right to vote is the single most important right afforded by the United States Constitution. Voting should be easy for eligible American citizens, and it should also be hard to cheat in elections. These two things are not mutually exclusive.

That’s why I am committed to ensuring that all eligible Pennsylvanians and Americans can freely exercise that right with confidence in the fairness and integrity of our electoral process.

[**ELECTION INTEGRITY MATTERS**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=e742296e902943faa979fa03765cdaec&_e=OuaGimRTbOs_Gd2dfWNTtVdKQS_uBDgJVwzBQ9fD3anqaTekN-MpdRP_sfQ_a6hPQHkuRXn7atpdPkz0vP1Sf4JrtM3dHwPqbbXviywsxn2mfANgbY__O_ehag6E3s-xR1AiG-IpdpBuF9_B6Pe8NbfpxVGg_rB6_GZxflK49QmcKjDLkiW8-ixZSa2oNmNFh1daT9DmHPLAOiSPWbJPWeIsLBL6HqgZk7DSJ_LD301Rtnf1tZ6VjUg9y6nPHSsFnkr10VgwunugmujesUnSwHGtJ3hTeNTcndPSwB71jZ7rq5evI2Fy14zAabotTr2LZcsIuE7K0f5VwyxG1PNWWV34M4ow0FenV_0aiZ9ynSldv5UzSW9h8AeVOiMtJjXj0lknKr-WxhZDe5WXMHlVqRCIvh2KKbRwIAKQ52oby5Jrt7unZee0nyGO6wT9pqmY)
Fellow Patriot, I stand by my record and have voted for voter ID laws that would ensure integrity in our elections. For next year’s election, there can be no doubt or sense of being cheated when it comes to the results. I will continue my record of protecting our elections as a member of the U.S. House of Representatives!

[**If you support fair elections, please respond today!**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=e742296e902943faa979fa03765cdaec&_e=OuaGimRTbOs_Gd2dfWNTtVdKQS_uBDgJVwzBQ9fD3anqaTekN-MpdRP_sfQ_a6hPQHkuRXn7atpdPkz0vP1Sf4JrtM3dHwPqbbXviywsxn2mfANgbY__O_ehag6E3s-xR1AiG-IpdpBuF9_B6Pe8NbfpxVGg_rB6_GZxflK49QmcKjDLkiW8-ixZSa2oNmNFh1daT9DmHPLAOiSPWbJPWeIsLBL6HqgZk7DSJ_LD301Rtnf1tZ6VjUg9y6nPHSsFnkr10VgwunugmujesUnSwHGtJ3hTeNTcndPSwB71jZ6OdYj2s9FcajdtTOyF8BSiGYNNsQ4XBQbHsnJCuj_NzCRS7MrX-lnq55Ek-fsyJIfYdbhzsa40xUd6U4v1ueFMMSBQ6u0UZZ_UKRQIPzdDWf3C7HSGXdV4TnKrwjIxDSJV-VgXQT2gLXQfi08E6XQ-)

Thank you,

Ryan Mackenzie

[**SUPPORT FAIR ELECTIONS**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=e742296e902943faa979fa03765cdaec&_e=OuaGimRTbOs_Gd2dfWNTtVdKQS_uBDgJVwzBQ9fD3anqaTekN-MpdRP_sfQ_a6hPQHkuRXn7atpdPkz0vP1Sf4JrtM3dHwPqbbXviywsxn2mfANgbY__O_ehag6E3s-xR1AiG-IpdpBuF9_B6Pe8NbfpxVGg_rB6_GZxflK49QmcKjDLkiW8-ixZSa2oNmNFh1daT9DmHPLAOiSPWbJPWeIsLBL6HqgZk7DSJ_LD301Rtnf1tZ6VjUg9y6nPHSsFnkr10VgwunugmujesUnSwHGtJ3hTeNTcndPSwB71jZ7xpfIuGtQUiG7oyvMV5PwXKnbc6nARij5P5mfowxELnkfeFPcDV0NP-ZJ-6AEjO1mnadOJrzknLtTZJAtWo6NxrjTdSyBSa47ipJ8RHLJL5IEQgdS_-pWfd6jrIGsSfXxELVQ4ZdVe9hYpIm3Uk-NA)

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin."

In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Sponsor meals for our WWII heroes
body:
I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z45b2n9b3606c5d0djlo2gctnvk1nk6n5dfv1br8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge4oj2c1h2bs)
---
Fellow American, I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent. **This year, the American Veterans Center is expecting our BIGGEST gathering of World War II heroes for our Annual Veterans Conference in nearly 20 years.** And while the budget for this year's Annual Veterans Conference has already been spent, the American Veterans Center team is _still_ hearing from World War II veterans who would like to attend. The **Gary Sinise Foundation** is generously providing lodging ... **American Airlines** is providing flights ... and I hope that you, Fellow American, would consider helping to cover lunch and dinner for our World War II heroes during this year's Veterans' Conference.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs0635vhqe13nd6pb1ruelj5cfqntpkplkmrl90g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge4oj2c1h2bs)
---
**[Can I count on your urgent gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or more before Wednesday, October 25 to help cover the meals for our World War II heroes at this year's Conference?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z332geqknviq8ev10emke62qr2cnse6t0hcq4rsg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge4oj2c1h2bs)** On average, it costs $100 for each day of meals we provide to a World War II veteran. To make sure we can cover all the meals for the veterans we expect, I'm urgently raising $3,000 before Wednesday, October 25.
---
[Give $25 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Breakfast](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgmnnf5aj7otj9mdn619462v8nqvqd4p147p8thg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge4oj2c1h2bs)
---
[Give $50 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Dinner ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaus5ru5ae4upu4j8k49ut84rl1nfnm08b1s1rqo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge4oj2c1h2bs)
---
[Give $100 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Day](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf4n1evb65sch4vlsevetaugjcr0ua0g7q82mk4o_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge4oj2c1h2bs)
---
[Give ANY amount to help](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2kel7ch1teclbjn10tmnv40jfnr8a2tjqp6oi2g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge4oj2c1h2bs)
---
Every year, generous and patriotic Americans like YOU help the American Veterans Center honor our nation's heroes, from World War II to today, at the Annual Veterans Conference. At this special, one-of-a-kind event, veterans have the opportunity to share their stories with young people and military cadets in attendance. They can reconnect with their brothers- and sisters-in-arms. And, just as important, they can know that their stories are professionally recorded and preserved by AVC, so their legacy is passed on to the next generation.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpd4gv2uoaavkh5nrhaaog0i7j4i86b1dcfndth8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge4oj2c1h2bs)
---
The AVC Annual Veterans Conference is a monumental occasion for veterans of every generation. _But it's particularly moving for our World War II heroes, who will see firsthand how their service and sacrifices are still being honored, 80 years later._ **[Before Wednesday, October 25, the American Veterans Center is urgently raising $3,000 to provide all the meals to our World War II heroes at this year's Conference. If these WWII veterans can count on your support, please make your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo2jeh9ajp8icj45h2d6f41j3pi2nn5a3jp3ich8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge4oj2c1h2bs)**
---
[Support a WWII hero at AVC's Annual Veterans Conference](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z748m9mg2766tk8rc6e9vrk2q8tqi70ft247j8i8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge4oj2c1h2bs)
---
Your generosity today will ensure the Greatest Generation's legacy lives on, making their bravery immortal and safeguarding the firsthand accounts of their valor and service for generations to come. **[Please -- if you'd like to help support a WWII hero at this year's Conference -- make your most generous gift right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z26dpjt4bu43m9sar8iopbeokj1pc3sururnlit8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge4oj2c1h2bs)** Thank you for your support and thank you for playing a critical role in honoring our World War II heroes at this year's Conference. Tim HolbertPresidentAmerican Veterans Center P.S. Your contribution to this special mission doesn't just make a difference -- it makes history. Let's ensure every World War II veteran who wishes to attend this year's Annual Veterans Conference can have all their costs fully covered! **[Please make your most generous gift today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvdk6u7kdpfphda9lgcvop61tqv5ngimrgv9n9oo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge4oj2c1h2bs)**
---
[Support a WWII hero at AVC's Annual Veterans Conference](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp71evi6v15aubevlfop98secquamush63u7tt40_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge4oj2c1h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:
Friend, we'll be honest:
| | |
---
Friend, we'll be honest: **If we had a dollar for every voter Colin has met on his Texas tour, we wouldn't be writing this email.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72031961/434058512/1959928545?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk232-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Y4ZjM4MTEtYWI3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TZoxmGiyqa_CgXP6xab68l95bEbTZ_VdoAVNiWJphfw=)
We don't have to tell you that Colin's race to defeat Ted Cruz was already ___super_ competitive.
**But right now, 14% of Texas voters are still undecided. That means whoever can reach the most undecided voters will win this election.**
That's why Colin has been on the road nonstop these past few weeks, giving every speech, having every important conversation, and meeting voters where they are whenever he's able to.
**But, as Colin hits every corner of Texas to shake hands and win over voters, the costs are adding up****FAST — and if we don't raise $50,000 by our midnight fundraising deadline, our voter outreach efforts could be impacted.**

Big news, Peter: _Mississippi Today_ just reported on the latest poll of the Mississippi governor’s race — you’re going to want to read this: **_MT:_ "New governor’s race poll shows Reeves leading Presley by just one point"** We are just one point down with 15 days until voters head to the polls. We’re working around the clock to turn out the voters needed to fire Tate Reeves — but we can’t do it alone. **[Will you chip in right now to elect Brandon Presley the next governor of Mississippi? This race is neck-and-neck, so any amount makes a major difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72033142/434062753/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.cbf75792-ac71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cbf75792-ac71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2JmNzU3OTItYWM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ab9zErryfioK2wM62Cpm2wkhf9da5sbhDR4p0lKIhy8=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72033145/434062757/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.cbf75792-ac71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cbf75792-ac71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2JmNzU3OTItYWM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ab9zErryfioK2wM62Cpm2wkhf9da5sbhDR4p0lKIhy8=)**
---
There’s no way around it, being one point down is a great sign for us heading into the final stretch.
**But we aren’t shooting for consolation prizes — we’re trying to win this election on November 7th.**
Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we’ve turned a longshot campaign into one of the most competitive Mississippi gubernatorial elections in recent memory. Now, we need to close this race out by turning out every voter possible.
But voter mobilization is _expensive_. Getting folks to the polls, making sure their votes are counted, convincing last-minute hold-outs — it all adds up. And right now, we’re facing a $130,000 budget gap ahead of the end of the month.
Look: Tate Reeves has more money than we do. If we slow down for a second, all of the progress that we see in this poll could be wiped out.
**[Rush a $25 donation right now to expand Medicaid, clean up corruption, and move Mississippi forward. We can’t afford to take our foot off the gas with 15 days left.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72033146/434062758/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.cbf75792-ac71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cbf75792-ac71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2JmNzU3OTItYWM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ab9zErryfioK2wM62Cpm2wkhf9da5sbhDR4p0lKIhy8=)**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: The importance of a dollar.
body:
I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zotc4ut6feaele141sh6tkr4ttf4ft489roivumo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge2o32c1h2bs)
---

I am a mom and an accountant, Friend, which means I know how to stretch a dollar.

That's why, on day one, I made sure our team knew that the success of our movement relies on grassroots supporters like YOU. With that, comes a responsibility to make every dollar count and spend your donations wisely.

Unlike other campaigns that are burning through money on private planes, fancy dinners, and country clubs, **we are a lean and mean operation.**

We stretch every dollar as far as it can go and know it's important to spend our money when it counts. But even covering basic expenses to host town halls and travel to battleground states to meet with voters adds up.

**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5jlrndkgko9u97q8nug0f52oep7ktrgtkolld10_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge2o32c1h2bs "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win! ")**

Here are just a couple meaningful ways your contribution has helped our team:

**-> TRAVELING:** From day one, I've prioritized meeting with voters, shaking every hand, and amplifying my message everywhere I can. In order to do that, my team and I are flying all over the country, and we're doing it while spending money wisely.

I can tell you firsthand, we're not out here lighting money on fire with private planes and extravagant luxury hotels like some campaigns. We're flying a lot of Spirit and JetBlue. We're getting to New Hampshire, Iowa, and everywhere else we need to go with the most affordable options we can find.

---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3h0i15hn5firbnvdtkjnnv12v1i0uu17vq431og_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge2o32c1h2bs)
---

**-> EVENTS:** We're running a true grassroots campaign, and that means being on the ground, holding as many grassroots events as possible. Every time we hold a town hall in Iowa, South Carolina, or New Hampshire, it's an opportunity to share my vision, answer questions, and gain the confidence of voters.

But what you may not realize is that all of the costs can quickly add up to rent the event space, chairs, and sound equipment. In order to spend your money wisely, we're holding these events at places like bakeries, local venues, and farms.

---
| | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zflhc66874gs00eqmc5e3bt5pavr35l180o5jo4g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge2o32c1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj4bm4tn0varvanbalssur0vamdfa66vbh1nvd48_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge2o32c1h2bs)
---
At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day and spending every dollar wisely. But all of this still costs money, which is why we need your help.

Once the first-in-the-nation caucus is here, it's only a matter of time before the rest of the country begins to cast their ballots.

It's a marathon and we've got to stay on pace to win each and every day. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv8umotpgmeueamnkkkhll4fdqu5p6vvor2ig1g0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge2o32c1h2bs "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!")**

---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $20.24](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrnhjtp1p2sj09uae5tveibd90mafk258fj45t9g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge2o32c1h2bs)
---

**It 's crunch time, Friend!** There's no room for holding back. With just **88 days** left until voting begins every single day matters which is why I appreciate your generous support today when it matters most.
---

My very best,

---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuage26iodgflctd83p0gb7ln7hr54g7kf48n1lo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge2o32c1h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvte5bnt5nverrktti0u2ffou9sr28qi2b1m0qb8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge2o32c1h2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdshoacdboj6tvg3vjdhus9cbs85gnntlplanas0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge2o32c1h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv4304fovmmfn74c0plik750edep1mr9e28apfi8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge2o32c1h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztqoa908onkbbv597ueg8avsuf5673569nast2tg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge2o32c1h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.
**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvjm16n00u7ghjdv4iah14cno8cid5mugmhk84po_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ge2o32c1h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---

With that, comes a responsibility to make every dollar count and spend your donations wisely. Unlike other campaigns that are burning through money on private planes, fancy dinners, and country clubs, we are a lean and mean operation. We stretch every dollar as far as it can go and know it's important to spend our money when it counts. But even covering basic expenses to host town halls and travel to battleground states to meet with voters adds up. "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win! " Here are just a couple meaningful ways your contribution has helped our team: -> TRAVELING: From day one, I've prioritized meeting with voters, shaking every hand, and amplifying my message everywhere I can. In order to do that, my team and I are flying all over the country, and we're doing it while spending money wisely. I can tell you firsthand, we're not out here lighting money on fire with private planes and extravagant luxury hotels like some campaigns. We're flying a lot of Spirit and JetBlue. We're getting to New Hampshire, Iowa, and everywhere else we need to go with the most affordable options we can find. | -> EVENTS: We're running a true grassroots campaign, and that means being on the ground, holding as many grassroots events as possible. Every time we hold a town hall in Iowa, South Carolina, or New Hampshire, it's an opportunity to share my vision, answer questions, and gain the confidence of voters. But what you may not realize is that all of the costs can quickly add up to rent the event space, chairs, and sound equipment. In order to spend your money wisely, we're holding these events at places like bakeries, local venues, and farms. | | | | | | At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day and spending every dollar wisely. But all of this still costs money, which is why we need your help. Once the first-in-the-nation caucus is here, it's only a matter of time before the rest of the country begins to cast their ballots. It's a marathon and we've got to stay on pace to win each and every day. "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!" | | It 's crunch time, Friend! There's no room for holding back. With just 88 days left until voting begins every single day matters which is why I appreciate your generous support today when it matters most. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. name: Conservative Intel
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vszc-S8izN

In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oszc-S8izN

Dear
Friend,

In the
annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors-material resources, manpower,
pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in
determining the victors and the vanquished.

However,
as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that
surpasses conventional wisdom-a truth of extraordinary
significance.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the
remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated
by the savior generals-visionary leaders displaying unparalleled
expertise.

Today,
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite
your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian
and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has authored a
groundbreaking eBook-Victory and the Savior Generals-a
captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional
leaders.

You can
secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Inside
its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the
defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity,
contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into
seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict,
rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment
with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is
your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most
influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate
even in the present day.

Claim
your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now
through this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Wishing
you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover
Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

clean_body: President Trump: Today, I’m officially filing for 2024... | | | Patriot, Right now, I’m flying to the great state of New Hampshire – home of the FIRST PRIMARY OF THE 2024 ELECTION. But this isn’t any ordinary campaign stop... ...I’m traveling to OFFICIALLY FILE THE PAPERWORK TO APPEAR ON THE BALLOT. Today, I want to send a message to Crooked Joe Biden, the naysayers in the Fake News Media, George Soros, the DNC, the RINOs, and all of our many other enemies that no matter how hard they conspire to try and destroy us, I will NEVER DROP out of this race and I will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to Make America Great Again! But I’ll need YOU to echo that message. Along with our official filing, I want to report that we had a MASSIVE SURGE of grassroots donations today, showing just how many Americans are 100% committed to our mission and will NEVER SURRENDER our country to tyranny. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Fellow American,

**We are Americans.**

At the end of the day, that is our most unifying principle. That spirit of unity is a centerpiece of my campaign. We cannot establish a national identity without saying, "I am proud to be American."

A President can and should be the best example of that ideal. Someone who listens to every American, even if they disagree on issues or on how to make America stronger. That's exactly why I need to hear from you now, Fellow American.

**[Please share your year-end priorities and where you stand on the future of America.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8fc1b1a529d54bf3a8e62b1aa411a7cb&_e=IOLu4I2vcId9IBg91-4jQDzLGQgugUSfHZZgnYqAhCz5NG6Ls4YAa9ZJav7Sti_WezeI2S7Cyj3mNUYrsHaGs_cgJJ_oE8fvAUVkRCwhmw2Y0tx5PXCN52v6bWiIZ6RankeF8hfPqV1eF2Gdfdzx7vOQZH66gCr5riwpzTraU46aeD3cUCauK2u5NpnproH0D_1FUZYOlxNMGI_tgdQ3VEJLygwBqIyWPSoHqRnAG9jtM0CIYNlTiCLvASrJYUSITDcu4bnbwSubBtEWCUv-T7qPKrQEo4SyC8cUH7Ls-97aIrecvoTUIBYliD5r6UloFA0hOo7DNs0apogceZ0STNRPndwREwgY5HsSW08JI05fyru91F4z9sCoL3GZwU_z6LVAZquFAoCsC5pA-lNKCX-YsmyxXnJLUsNrFk8b1FjmzzBiAOYl1JG-x60nqH0uV-Pk4TInLjHkXs235dVdl-zCTqizTLfxHDsxwjUKUOTk5r4UUUxe_quUSptGfiV35bYR5ATRDeB5OYPtVrAEn_Y2ZHiI7pm3cmia7VnH6k8QtT0Raf0hSCBzWh2mGW-IgEGs9E_aPcsAoGzwfmWnPA%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.
