clean_body: Of all the skills of leadership, listening is the most valuable | | Fellow American, We are Americans. At the end of the day, that is our most unifying principle. That spirit of unity is a centerpiece of my campaign. We cannot establish a national identity without saying, "I am proud to be American." A President can and should be the best example of that ideal. Someone who listens to every American, even if they disagree on issues or on how to make America stronger. That's exactly why I need to hear from you now, Fellow American. | PRE-DEBATE ISSUES POLL 1\. ◯ Yes ◯ No 2\. ◯ Yes ◯ No ◯ Unsure 3\. ◯ State of the economy ◯ Standing with our allies ◯ Strength of our borders ◯ Big Tech and censorship ◯ Securing our elections ◯ Stance on "Woke" Issues 4\. ◯ Right ◯ Wrong ◯ Unsure 5\. Share your thoughts on how to save America | Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Friend,

We hope this email finds you well. We're thrilled to share the[ latest episode](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=74621128ab&e=567664f14c) of the "No Doubt About It" podcast with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti, and it's a must-listen!

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=847d57fe08&e=567664f14c)

[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=024aa3a3b5&e=567664f14c)

In this special edition, we have the privilege of welcoming Fox News contributor, Seattle radio talk show host and author of "What's Killing America," Jason Rantz. Jason delivers a compelling analysis of **how liberal policies, from Seattle to Albuquerque, are driving up crime rates and leading to an uncontrollable homelessness crisis.** He offers insightful solutions on how we can reclaim our cities from the grip of these failed policies.
| [STREAM EPISODE 46 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4c807e416c&e=567664f14c)
---
If you're concerned about the state of our cities and eager to hear solutions that can make a difference, this episode is a must-listen.

Best regards,
Mark and Krysty Ronchettti

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Sponsor meals for our WWII heroes
body:
I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq03fdfmnq5muv2bs489knbh7lcu9g57bqq5nbpg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)
---
Fellow American, I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent. **This year, the American Veterans Center is expecting our BIGGEST gathering of World War II heroes for our Annual Veterans Conference in nearly 20 years.** And while the budget for this year's Annual Veterans Conference has already been spent, the American Veterans Center team is _still_ hearing from World War II veterans who would like to attend. The **Gary Sinise Foundation** is generously providing lodging ... **American Airlines** is providing flights ... and I hope that you, Fellow American, would consider helping to cover lunch and dinner for our World War II heroes during this year's Veterans' Conference.
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlm1v3oqno1hq7r1hpubg6shv6s941kgcapdpnq0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)
---
**[Can I count on your urgent gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or more before Wednesday, October 25 to help cover the meals for our World War II heroes at this year's Conference?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdhmsnv7st7mcsdkdt4tbgrbr7hnh7inf6jass70_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)** On average, it costs $100 for each day of meals we provide to a World War II veteran. To make sure we can cover all the meals for the veterans we expect, I'm urgently raising $3,000 before Wednesday, October 25.
---
[Give $25 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Breakfast](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zothqb72dngt3afpg4iqhblf7kms76ngm62gu8uo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)
---
[Give $50 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Dinner ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjqb5jnngg985nn186re5fjdhn4a6tulfhluj7u8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)
---
[Give $100 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Day](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8tvjpqpmk54m4ssrl2k30r7a2m0n885flh0rjf0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)
---
[Give ANY amount to help](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhdh5m12k02kmjvju5e6vgq86rv8ne29g3i77df0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)
---
Every year, generous and patriotic Americans like YOU help the American Veterans Center honor our nation's heroes, from World War II to today, at the Annual Veterans Conference. At this special, one-of-a-kind event, veterans have the opportunity to share their stories with young people and military cadets in attendance. They can reconnect with their brothers- and sisters-in-arms. And, just as important, they can know that their stories are professionally recorded and preserved by AVC, so their legacy is passed on to the next generation.
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zivm4mau24e2cn44ogvm36mkq34a36qoclibdnsg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)
---
The AVC Annual Veterans Conference is a monumental occasion for veterans of every generation. _But it's particularly moving for our World War II heroes, who will see firsthand how their service and sacrifices are still being honored, 80 years later._ **[Before Wednesday, October 25, the American Veterans Center is urgently raising $3,000 to provide all the meals to our World War II heroes at this year's Conference. If these WWII veterans can count on your support, please make your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcs2c1csilu0v5ja57i68ionn5ogfe4tdu3521r8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)**
---
[Support a WWII hero at AVC's Annual Veterans Conference](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrrn9nte966m8l32udroosa5ujmbr7kbjvp6vf40_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)
---
Your generosity today will ensure the Greatest Generation's legacy lives on, making their bravery immortal and safeguarding the firsthand accounts of their valor and service for generations to come. **[Please -- if you'd like to help support a WWII hero at this year's Conference -- make your most generous gift right now.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu6aq5ggpamm2n0a1eahcrdl18elcoj4t5lqaep0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)** Thank you for your support and thank you for playing a critical role in honoring our World War II heroes at this year's Conference. Tim HolbertPresidentAmerican Veterans Center P.S. Your contribution to this special mission doesn't just make a difference -- it makes history. Let's ensure every World War II veteran who wishes to attend this year's Annual Veterans Conference can have all their costs fully covered! **[Please make your most generous gift today.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4gk5tj92bqqe8in20f3537ib9tdak60h1pmmt30_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)**
---
[Support a WWII hero at AVC's Annual Veterans Conference](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze71q993k1ppcgmen31mcatin1ergsojbha62erg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

American Briefing

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlvbfgna0t4bs9obmmf9b0os93kquc9cj2kt0ui8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chge2o37cph238h1e8he4933cjge0o75c3h6eoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp8j1oqaq6dt2ov7b2317qeno8hla7f69ma4mdcg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqvmsebircvqm6g2sl9p4selgfto9vpe0pql7a1g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geao72cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: CAPT Hung Cao & CPT Sam Brown
subject: Two veterans. One mission.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=cbb2b259e0fa4d2e95d10c53c02ed941&_e=X-Adv-2rTNP7-kMWrYviPWF7qLQmSJFW6g3kuiPFEOk5wJ0JZyyXsZY_YwCksWziAAFSyM8NQWyAzyiXdTtolLUP89uA32yY-VhFDoxtvmtAflfQsH3OLhvTYMc4mMSuSjtLFcIZWLFJz0l77NaIqHuFlCC9GOw1VLifvaKZePa-i30Pmm51W2rsz1W4jCoblbx4e2-D-d_OhhgKV2tFBS8rS8kKTBI93dCtpMlwrAYrJGKKEnCsj37fs1Jg5PZGtfJzjuOApGqlqo3w6ivI7IEiw4wxw666UrojFPre0l7Ln3HNCm3RFBEHOvCddNgbJ-LUP6PjEquhecKPs2ZFlKbbWrlg2RFKFhHTIULmsgfSZdhe-zkxRBT8OYA6un8E)

| | Peter, It’s Hung Cao and Sam Brown. We may have taken different paths to get to where we are, and we may come from different parts of the country, and we never agree during the annual Army-Navy football game, but we have a lot in common. We both put our lives on the line serving our country. We’re both husbands, fathers, and conservatives. **And we’re both sick and tired of the absolute disappointment that D.C. politicians have been.**

His opponent was a Republican Congressman who had held his seat for 11 terms. Colin and our team put everything we had into the campaign – but just 48 days from the election, **the polls gave Colin a 10% chance of winning, and the district was leaning Republican.**

In the last days of the campaign, Colin worked day and night to connect with Texans and earn their votes. He slowly chipped away at his opponent's lead as voters got to know him.

**By Election Day, he had a 37% chance of victory. And when the numbers finally came in, he won with 52% of the vote. ** **

Peter, this time around we're facing an even bigger opponent: Ted Cruz. But we're starting this race with much better odds. Polls show Colin just 5 points down with 14% of voters undecided.

**What's more, Ted Cruz only won reelection by 2.6% last time.

We have a clear path to victory, and all it's going to take is connecting with enough undecided voters. That's why Colin is on the road traveling to every corner of Texas, shaking every hand he can and listening to what voters have to say.**

[**But voter outreach on this massive scale is expensive. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter – when Colin ran for Congress in 2018, the odds were stacked against him. His opponent was a Republican Congressman who had held his seat for 11 terms. Colin and our team put everything we had into the campaign – but just 48 days from the election, the polls gave Colin a 10% chance of winning, and the district was leaning Republican. In the last days of the campaign, Colin worked day and night to connect with Texans and earn their votes. He slowly chipped away at his opponent's lead as voters got to know him. By Election Day, he had a 37% chance of victory. And when the numbers finally came in, he won with 52% of the vote. | | Peter, this time around we're facing an even bigger opponent: Ted Cruz. But we're starting this race with much better odds. Polls show Colin just 5 points down with 14% of voters undecided. What's more, Ted Cruz only won reelection by 2.6% last time. We have a clear path to victory, and all it's going to take is connecting with enough undecided voters. That's why Colin is on the road traveling to every corner of Texas, shaking every hand he can and listening to what voters have to say. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | ** \- Team Allred The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. body:
House Republicans pass a resolution to overturn Biden Administration’s new gun safety measure

| **HORRIBLE NEWS:
House Republicans passed a resolution to overturn Biden Administration’s new gun safety measure**

**❌ Rep. Kevin McCarthy
❌ Rep. Matt Gaetz
❌ Rep. Lauren Boebert
❌ Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene
❌And HUNDREDS more!** ALL these Republicans in the House just voted to repeal a rule that would tighten federal regulations on stabilizing braces for firearms, an accessory used in several mass shootings.

**These accessories transform firearms into more deadly weapons, making normal guns into assault-style weapons!**

These MAGA Republicans want more deadly weapons in our schools and communities. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: People ask me all the time: Do we really need a Constitutional amendment on guns?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
No gun law is safe. Not laws passed in California, not laws passed in Congress.

Friends -
People ask me all the time: Do we really need a Constitutional amendment on guns?
Yes. Yes we do.
Because as long as there are far-right judges overturning commonsense gun laws — no law is safe. Not laws passed in California, not laws passed in Congress.
Look at this — all in the last two months:
**Far-right judge overturns California's assault weapons ban.**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2944?t=1&akid=1624%2E4767699%2EjpQukh)
**Far-right judge overturns California's high-capacity magazine ban.**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2945?t=2&akid=1624%2E4767699%2EjpQukh)
**Far-right judges overturn California's bill stopping gun manufacturers from marketing weapons of war to our kids.**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2946?t=3&akid=1624%2E4767699%2EjpQukh)
Wake up.
Any gun safety law will continue to be thrown out by NRA-owned federal judges until we pass a Constitutional amendment to make our communities safer from gun violence.
\- Gavin
* * *
👉🏻 **Hi.** Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If it sounds worth it that Democrats fight back everywhere rights are under attack – even in Red States – we are asking you to contribute $20 to Gavin Newsom’s Campaign for Democracy today. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: My plan
body:
No more drama. No more chaos.

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | |
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk2LTA0MmEwMWExOThjOTRjOGZiNzM1YzJmNjI1ZWNjMDRjIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL3RlYW0tc3RhbmQtZm9yLWFtZXJpY2Evbmlra2lzLXBsYW4tdHY_)

Friend,

It's time we return to the days when America was STRONG and PROUD.

It’s time we return to leadership without the drama and without the chaos.

_**It’s time we elect a president who can WIN and get America back on track.**_

**[I have a plan to save our country, but I need your help. Once you finish looking over my plan for what I’ll do as president, I am humbly asking you to pitch in a generous donation of $5, $25, or even $47 or more today.](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk2LTA0MmEwMWExOThjOTRjOGZiNzM1YzJmNjI1ZWNjMDRjIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL3RlYW0tc3RhbmQtZm9yLWFtZXJpY2Evbmlra2lzLXBsYW4tdHY_ "I have a plan to save our country, but I need your help. Once you finish looking over my plan for what I’ll do as president, I am humbly asking you to pitch in a generous donation of $5, $25, or even $47 or more today. ")**

_**When it comes to our economy,**_ if 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards!

_**Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America,**_ let’s go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist.

We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels.

**When it comes to education, there should be complete transparency in the classroom.** You, as parents, should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what’s happening!

**We will put vocational classes back in our high schools and we will build things in America again!** In South Carolina, we put apprenticeships all over our state so that our young kids could learn how to build things. Let’s put them in every single high school so that our kids are building things for America.

**When it comes to our universities, we’ll tell them: you either take Chinese money or you take American money, but the days of taking both are over.** We will get that Chinese infiltration out of our universities once and for all.

**When it comes to crime, it's simple:** Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals.

_**We will bring law and order back!**_

_**When it comes to energy independence,**_ no more going hat-in-hand to Saudi Arabia, no more getting dirty oil from Venezuela! Let’s make sure we do things so that it’s our American producers supplying our American families.

_**When it comes to our enemies, we must stop giving money to countries that hate us!**_ Quit trying to buy friends, quit paying off our enemies!

_Last year we gave $50 billion in foreign aid._ Do you know who we gave it to? Pakistan, who harbored terrorists that tried to kill our soldiers. Iraq, that has Iranian influence that says death to America every day. Zimbabwe, the most anti-American African country out there. Belarus, who is holding hands with Russia in their war against Ukraine. We give money to Communist Cuba, who we named a state sponsor of terrorism.

And the one that is most embarrassing? **We give money to China! **

_Right now, we look weak. But that will change._

**When I am president, we will no longer give money to countries that hate America! **

We have the solutions. But I need your help to win so we can get to work and right this ship!

**[Please join me in the fight to save our country by pitching in a generous donation today.](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk2LTA0MmEwMWExOThjOTRjOGZiNzM1YzJmNjI1ZWNjMDRjIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL3RlYW0tc3RhbmQtZm9yLWFtZXJpY2Evbmlra2lzLXBsYW4tdHY_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMxMDIzX0FFLVNQTzIuMTA4NDc5X25pa2tpLWhhbGV5X3QxNDAzNDMzLTI2NjcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbHAmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1BRS1TUE8yLjEwODQ3OSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIzMTAyM19teS1wbGFuJmV4X3RpZD0yMDIzMTAyM19BRS1TUE8yLjEwODQ3OV9uaWtraS1oYWxleV90MTQwMzQzMy0yNjY3In0/o9VN_aGOFyjDZvQiULW8FA "Please join me in the fight to save our country by pitching in a generous donation today.")**

| | **More About Nikki Haley**

| [](http://trk.secureandprosper. "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://trk.secureandprosper. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: No more drama. No more chaos. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | | | | Friend, It's time we return to the days when America was STRONG and PROUD. It’s time we return to leadership without the drama and without the chaos. It’s time we elect a president who can WIN and get America back on track. "I have a plan to save our country, but I need your help. Once you finish looking over my plan for what I’ll do as president, I am humbly asking you to pitch in a generous donation of $5, $25, or even $47 or more today. " When it comes to our economy, if 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards! Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America, let’s go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist. We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels. When it comes to education, there should be complete transparency in the classroom. You, as parents, should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what’s happening! We will put vocational classes back in our high schools and we will build things in America again! In South Carolina, we put apprenticeships all over our state so that our young kids could learn how to build things. Let’s put them in every single high school so that our kids are building things for America. When it comes to our universities, we’ll tell them: you either take Chinese money or you take American money, but the days of taking both are over. We will get that Chinese infiltration out of our universities once and for all. When it comes to crime, it's simple: Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals. We will bring law and order back! When it comes to energy independence, no more going hat-in-hand to Saudi Arabia, no more getting dirty oil from Venezuela! Let’s make sure we do things so that it’s our American producers supplying our American families. When it comes to our enemies, we must stop giving money to countries that hate us! Quit trying to buy friends, quit paying off our enemies! Last year we gave $50 billion in foreign aid. Do you know who we gave it to? Pakistan, who harbored terrorists that tried to kill our soldiers. Iraq, that has Iranian influence that says death to America every day. Zimbabwe, the most anti-American African country out there. Belarus, who is holding hands with Russia in their war against Ukraine. We give money to Communist Cuba, who we named a state sponsor of terrorism. And the one that is most embarrassing? We give money to China! Right now, we look weak. But that will change. When I am president, we will no longer give money to countries that hate America! We have the solutions. But I need your help to win so we can get to work and right this ship! name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Last day to register to vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Hello friends!
We hope this special edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Last Day to Register to Vote Ahead of Nov. 7th Election
Graphic highlighting voter registration efforts as part of National Voter Registration Day [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/NPP%20Social_3.jpg]
Today is the last day to update your voter registration or get registered to vote in time to participate in the Nov. 7th municipal and judicial election! Click here [https://vote.pa/?org=npp] or scan the QR code in the image above to check on your voter registration status and make sure you're ready to vote in just a few short weeks!
Graphic highlighting voter registration efforts as part of National Voter Registration Day [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/2_2.png]
Already set and ready to vote? Can you contact three friends TODAY and ask that they check their registration status? Don't assume those in your network are ready to vote, a quick reminder can make all the difference.
Voter Protection Hotlines
ANY QUESTIONS OR ISSUES VOTING? Contact one of the voter assistance hotlines below with any questions about things like: envelopes included with your ballot, where to bring your ballot, if you have a negative experience at the drop box or polling place, or anything else you want to ask or report about your voting experience.
*
Voter
Protection
Hotline:
1-866-OUR-VOTE
*
DOS
PA
Voter
Hotline:
1-877-VOTESPA

*
Spanish/English
Hotline:
1-888-VE-Y-VOTA

*
Asian
Languages
Hotline:
1-888-API-VOTE

*
Arabic/English
Hotline:
1-844-YALLA-US
Graphic highlighting voter registration efforts as part of National Voter Registration Day [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/NPP%20Social%20copy.jpg]
PA ELECTION DATES:
Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023
Last day to register to vote : October 23, 2023
Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot : October 31, 2023
We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate.
Help us prepare for the upcoming municipal, judicial, and local elections in 2023!
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]
The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4), contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax-deductible.
https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject [https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject] https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania [https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania] https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-new-pennsylvania-project [https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-new-pennsylvania-project] https://instagram.com/newpennsylvania [https://instagram.com/newpennsylvania]
Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
New Pennsylvania Project
PO Box 443
West Chester, PA 19381
United States

subject: A View From The Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
As I continue my journey on the campaign trail to become your next Governor, I wanted to take a moment to share some of this week's highlights!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

As I continue my journey on the campaign trail to become your next Governor, I wanted to take a moment to pause and share with you the incredible experiences, meaningful connections, and ICYMI moments that I️ have had over the past week.

Read on for last week's highlights!

** Volunteer Callout! Join us on Election Day
------------------------------------------------------------

To sign up as a volunteer or to learn more about our Election Day efforts, please reach out to our volunteer coordinator at jp@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:jp@crouchforindiana.com?subject=Election%20Day%20Volunteer%20Callout) .

** In the News: I (https://www.wsj.com/articles/kim-reynolds-tax-cuts-budget-surplus-iowa-68853ed0?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) owa's Tax-Cut Triumph (https://www.wsj.com/articles/kim-reynolds-tax-cuts-budget-surplus-iowa-68853ed0?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

The Wall Street Journal highlighted Iowa's $1.83 billion surplus and economic growth, achieved through prudent tax policy and individual income tax rate reductions.

Indiana shares this success story, boasting a booming economy and a substantial surplus. By eliminating Indiana's individual income tax (https://crouchforindiana.com/axe-the-tax/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , we will not only continue to prosper but usher in a new era of financial empowerment, ensuring that Indiana's economy thrives and families keep more of their earnings. I am committed to making this vision a reality.
https://www.wsj.com/articles/kim-reynolds-tax-cuts-budget-surplus-iowa-68853ed0?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Read The Article (https://www.wsj.com/articles/kim-reynolds-tax-cuts-budget-surplus-iowa-68853ed0?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Elkhart County #AxeTheTax Roundtable
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

In our ongoing efforts to empower Hoosiers and create a more prosperous future for our state, I had the privilege of hosting an #AxeTheTax (https://crouchforindiana.com/axe-the-tax/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) roundtable in Elkhart County.

This event brought together voices from the community to discuss the pressing issue of reducing the tax burden on Hoosier families and businesses.

Your input and ideas are invaluable in shaping the policies and initiatives that will define Indiana's future.

** Shelbyville Sister City Dinner
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

At the Shelbyville Sister City Dinner we celebrated the remarkable partnership that has linked Shelbyville and Shizuoka, Japan, for nearly 34 years.

This enduring bond has been instrumental in attracting more than a dozen Japanese-owned companies to Shelbyville and laying the foundation for over 300 Japanese-owned businesses that now call Indiana their home.

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Today, Indiana boasts the highest Japanese investment per capita of any state.

This event was a testament to the power of international partnerships, trade, and the economic prosperity they can bring to our great state.

** Speaking with The Windsor Society
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I️ had a fantastic time speaking with the Windsor Society on Thursday! The discussion was filled with energy and excitement as we talked about my vision as Governor, including how I️ plan to lead the fight to #AxeTheTax (https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/axethetax?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZXM--Z9PTGX5KtbjQCBJ28Wfwcon7LPSgsPYoYEGwa86y4ZChpcDqed8XsROhNniVdIY6NOWgJlaSb1-LYUsMkElJFwFdbcvPGrdaJQSJPfNneE-POLTyf1a3ddN8JmWqchL1Nmg7EGjAfvE7zI0cmMbhbURyL6p8p28RtQ5uiqRdVPGa3mi3iBF_0w7bkO4Uk&__tn__=*NK-R&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

** Meeting Floyd County Business Leaders
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Family-owned businesses, like Huncilman Sheet Metal Fabrication, form the very core of Indiana's economic vitality. I recently had the privilege of visiting their New Albany facility. I️ was not only able to tour the facility, but it also provided a great backdrop for my meeting with Floyd County business leaders.

Our conversations centered on some of the most critical economic issues facing our great state, including my bold proposal to #AxeTheTax (https://crouchforindiana.com/axe-the-tax/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

** Women's Empowerment Lunch in Evansville
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I️ spoke at the Women's Empowerment Lunch in Evansville, supporting my friend Natalie Rascher's campaign for Evansville mayor.

With over 200 leaders in attendance, the atmosphere was electrifying. It's crucial that we continue to support and uplift women in leadership positions, and this event was a testament to the strength and determination of women across Indiana.

** Supporting Republican Municipal Candidates
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I️ did some door-knocking on Saturday to rally support behind Republican municipal candidates in Carmel and Lawrence. It was heartening to see the dedication and enthusiasm of our volunteers. Thank you to all who joined us!

** Owen County Reagan Chili Cook-Off
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I also attended the Owen County Reagan Chili Cook-Off on Saturday, which benefited the Owen County Republican Party. It was a wonderful opportunity to connect with fellow Republicans and supporters of our party's values.

The sense of camaraderie and unity was truly inspiring, and it reinforced the importance of local engagement in our political process.

** Great American Family Festival
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

The Great American Family Festival was a true celebration of community and family values. This delightful event was organized by Former Indiana State Rep. Woody Burton and current State Rep. Michelle Davis.

It provided a wonderful opportunity to connect with the fantastic people of Johnson County!

** Last Week's Endorsements
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“I know [Suzanne] will lead us into greater economic growth, a better tax climate, and all the while being a shining example for the future young lady leaders of our state. She is the best choice for Governor, and she has my full support!"

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I wholeheartedly endorse Suzanne Crouch for Governor! As a former Auditor of Spencer County, I have worked closely with Suzanne on many occasions when she was State Auditor and since she has been Lt. Governor. Suzanne has vast knowledge of how local and state government works and she has always been a pleasure to work with.”
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“As a County Commissioner, I know the importance of having leadership in government that understands the intricacies and skills necessary to be successful. Suzanne is personable, down-to-earth, approachable, and always willing to listen. I appreciate her candor and honesty in sharing her own family’s struggles with mental health issues and know that she understands the struggles that affect many Hoosiers. She also knows that helping keep Hoosiers healthy is paramount to keeping them happy and engaged in life and work.”

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

I am deeply grateful for your continued support and enthusiasm throughout this journey. Together, we are building a stronger, more prosperous Indiana. As I return to the campaign trail with renewed energy and determination, I carry with me the memories and conversations from this past week, knowing that our shared vision for Indiana's future is one worth fighting for.

Onward and upward,

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Twitter (https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Website (https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com)

** Get Involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more.
GET INVOLVED (https://crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers!
------------------------------------------------------------
Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future. If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events:
For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at:
heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) .

** Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise!
------------------------------------------------------------

As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)!
SHOP (https://shop.crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6bb683d07d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_19_09_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-6bb683d07d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Women's Empowerment Lunch in Evansville I️ spoke at the Women's Empowerment Lunch in Evansville, supporting my friend Natalie Rascher's campaign for Evansville mayor. With over 200 leaders in attendance, the atmosphere was electrifying. It's crucial that we continue to support and uplift women in leadership positions, and this event was a testament to the strength and determination of women across Indiana. Supporting Republican Municipal Candidates I️ did some door-knocking on Saturday to rally support behind Republican municipal candidates in Carmel and Lawrence. It was heartening to see the dedication and enthusiasm of our volunteers. Thank you to all who joined us! Owen County Reagan Chili Cook-Off I also attended the Owen County Reagan Chili Cook-Off on Saturday, which benefited the Owen County Republican Party. It was a wonderful opportunity to connect with fellow Republicans and supporters of our party's values. The sense of camaraderie and unity was truly inspiring, and it reinforced the importance of local engagement in our political process. Great American Family Festival The Great American Family Festival was a true celebration of community and family values. This delightful event was organized by Former Indiana State Rep. Woody Burton and current State Rep. Michelle Davis. It provided a wonderful opportunity to connect with the fantastic people of Johnson County! Last Week's Endorsements “I know [Suzanne] will lead us into greater economic growth, a better tax climate, and all the while being a shining example for the future young lady leaders of our state. She is the best choice for Governor, and she has my full support!" "I wholeheartedly endorse Suzanne Crouch for Governor! As a former Auditor of Spencer County, I have worked closely with Suzanne on many occasions when she was State Auditor and since she has been Lt. Governor. Suzanne has vast knowledge of how local and state government works and she has always been a pleasure to work with.” “As a County Commissioner, I know the importance of having leadership in government that understands the intricacies and skills necessary to be successful. Suzanne is personable, down-to-earth, approachable, and always willing to listen. I appreciate her candor and honesty in sharing her own family’s struggles with mental health issues and know that she understands the struggles that affect many Hoosiers. She also knows that helping keep Hoosiers healthy is paramount to keeping them happy and engaged in life and work.” Last but not least... I am deeply grateful for your continued support and enthusiasm throughout this journey. Together, we are building a stronger, more prosperous Indiana. As I return to the campaign trail with renewed energy and determination, I carry with me the memories and conversations from this past week, knowing that our shared vision for Indiana's future is one worth fighting for. Onward and upward, Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email! Facebook () Twitter () Instagram () Website () mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com) Get Involved! Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more. GET INVOLVED () Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers! Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future. If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events: For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at: heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) . Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise! As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)! SHOP () DONATE () ============================================================ Copyright © 2023 Suzanne Crouch for Indiana, All rights reserved.

name: Scalise, Steve
subject: Sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY.

| |

---
| | | Friend -

Democrats are racing to undermine election integrity ahead of the most important election of our lifetimes.
- **FIRST:** Deep-blue cities like New York and DC made it LEGAL for non-U.S. citizens to vote in local elections.

- **THEN:** Joe Biden SUED red states for enforcing voter identification laws.

- **NOW:** Democrats are filing LEGAL ACTION to gut strong election integrity measures in the swing state of North Carolina.
_If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections ... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY._

_**[I'm personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmio9c89cbukmtlbcq9ds7qiiiaslb7vf916f5q8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geeor4cdh2bs "I’m personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.")**_
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME: FEDERALLY MANDATE VOTER ID LAWS](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrcgual35r5o70emevqgebv556h93cn5f4b8adsg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geeor4cdh2bs "ADD YOUR NAME: FEDERALLY MANDATE VOTER ID LAWS")
---
Look:

Last time the Democrats were in power, they attempted to fast-track an election-rigging scheme that would have irreparably undermined the security of our elections. They wanted to use your tax dollars to fund their campaigns, federalize our elections, and destroy voter ID laws NATIONWIDE.

**They called their election-rigging scheme HR 1 - meaning helping prevent Conservatives from winning elections was their FIRST PRIORITY when they controlled the House.**

If they think the American People are willing to turn a blind eye to this critical issue, it would only empower them to push harder.

**That 's where you come in.**

_**[We're pleading with every Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws. Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections once and for all.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjq87q42m3sldmdsr9vu1snms2fhlv8pdoo1fdig_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geeor4cdh2bs "We’re pleading with every Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws. Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections once and for all.")**_

Can I count on seeing your name? _I hope so._

For America,

Steve Scalise

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zee0uvlequd6runm3332k05cf4etlnhhmrnnmfug_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geeor4cdh2bs)

In case you missed it, Bill underscored the pressing need to protect and preserve Social Security for future generations.
One paragraph from Bill’s op-ed, in particular, ought to be shouted from the rooftops:
“...the reality is that Social Security is hurtling toward a financial precipice, with only about nine years left before reaching the edge. By 2032, the Social Security trust fund will not have the necessary funds to fulfill its commitments, leading to a harsh 24% benefit cut for all recipients.”
Social security is a vital safety net for a senior who paid into the system their entire lives. But as Bill highlighted, we must act decisively to ensure its long-term stability.
**So, we wanted to ask you directly,****Friend.**
[**Do you think Congress is doing enough to save Social Security from the brink of collapse? →**](https://u34881959.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Myp6d5sqCDL1-2F-2FdAOHe9PGoZr9pAaWrPznezd1-2FvdEn7YQ5SniiJc108vhmX-2BBPtQ01V-2B9pwkPO1bcX6wB79OcEp-2FFxUTN1YYQNY6bL-2BtVZcdt84pYXeZ4aRSdgNA1H3WKCtARUCAYpnsaN-2FlP5f9d70Mm9F53fU-2BbAKkx8-2FijKMupR8F8qmoMbJ92APV88idxjGsyLS9uRRekhHbFvdzA-3D-3DnvF2_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdkLMmWeLnwK0KfPGgXzXHvoIGcfoQrAuI0Zkzwvv9dkHghc1ZFPh4s2VPIB-2BUJPR1ce1MwXOgEsQtpD9Vs-2BDtc3JBM1d1EK-2ByW2-2FAHk6oXR6RiEebiJu5qIrWuMUsySoyCcB1LZU1n-2Fnr4mWs4GR4FSSWYI3ufcpU9euwIB2c7jc8MIJNpmcO19xRT1TeIXgfOOIK46zoTu-2BtPILMNP5EZTaggmLuCL4exR0ylj3VP2b-2BliumLIa9I4nx-2BrgNhnxMVXc1fQbMow3xQSNLdKoSRrj6-2FL1oabRyOkZ-2F-2FBrUAXWpiJYSXXkb48wIVViiul9PNVVgpEKFjySTqw06kI-2Ber8FxDAr-2FAhH-2BllFvNruj1bMVUHfyNye0GHiIstXNo7OJKlp57v0beGQyk-2F5wvTDhnRH4IITnoyqFUbGuqUiZ-2FsyRo0gm890agt2IR5a4ZKO19uA3DO917hQMewX6SXP8plTqql77xPxmEaWDyYhB5GHBTs6cwR2PugRFHuDIF8WKwRmu85zzgiDiOI7KkiI-2FPZ4TW2kI5gfi9Ts5-2BYEDWsvtiDtX02gxKWCsUmCb3zWDPabVILLnEKC7kLM6l6-2BDuyP-2Bk-2BD2sfUhGk1TF0ECLzexqGFZ8PIvt8TOczrOHI-2F9qCaWPd6dXoEhPTKHwO6y8VHZkf3Gc0fhkN3J3BP9WQiKPdCbFHVfEHJHEzGPTzBNhaFINBZdQBcsEkOpvdMNiRCeHmVkA4avXhZabl1v0QUy0iPrluxCZB9psyRQ23vEGCdHdFbSTxObakfG9dQCIFem7amZ6Uh6NQF5BFJiWrEieZtcN0-2F2uzcMUo2S3e-2FxwmYNz8aed-2F6l4UammjpFXOAreY4dY-2BkRZfs-2B8-2FCiLPXOs4ZPNuO6rBOSwlcmUNXXrAWseXj38l61fdepqccpq9zlt24gX5qqCa6E-2BuFiFkdtkoq9QMVnH5Kb2nbA4ovQ)

clean_body: | | | | We want to hear from you → Did you happen to see Bill’s recent op-ed in the Washington Examiner, Friend? In case you missed it, Bill underscored the pressing need to protect and preserve Social Security for future generations. One paragraph from Bill’s op-ed, in particular, ought to be shouted from the rooftops: “...the reality is that Social Security is hurtling toward a financial precipice, with only about nine years left before reaching the edge. By 2032, the Social Security trust fund will not have the necessary funds to fulfill its commitments, leading to a harsh 24% benefit cut for all recipients.” Social security is a vital safety net for a senior who paid into the system their entire lives. But as Bill highlighted, we must act decisively to ensure its long-term stability. So, we wanted to ask you directly,Friend. | | With your help, we’ll ensure that this critical program gains the attention it deserves. Thank you for your support, Cassidy Digital Team Cassidy Digital Team PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA \- =

name: Bob Carlstrom
subject: They've been destroying America since 2008
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4lsvogepgo43r7pakv0k925935s6oidblqnii1g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geeor4cdh2bs)
---
Fellow American, Remember when gas prices were under $1.50 per gallon?Remember when there was peace in the Middle East and Europe and our allies and adversaries alike respected the United States?Remember when our southern border was secure, and law and order prevailed in our communities? _Now gas prices are at a 40-year high, the Ukraine has been turned into a warzone, and the crisis at our southern border is the worst it’s ever been. _But don’t be fooled... these things did not happen by accident.They’re a direct result of the Obama-Biden plot to destroy the Constitutional underpinnings of our country, to squash the States, and take over every aspect of our lives.And I’m afraid that if folks like you and me don’t immediately take action and stand up to them, America will be permanently weakened. **[That’s why I’m urgently asking you to join me and AMAC Action to save our country from being destroyed by today’s far-Left Democrats.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs0rl84d4a2aadlf1r9gtpv2coh4m04rbb4g2mko_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geeor4cdh2bs)** Fellow American, as you know we are not afraid of challenging Obama’s leftists plans for our country._We stood up to President Obama when he tried to socialize our healthcare system with “Obamacare” and “Medicare for All”..._ _We stood up to the Congressional Democrats’ repeated attempts to destroy Social Security and make it insolvent for our generation..._ _And now – with the slew of socialist policies flooding out of Washington D.C. – we’re standing up to the Obama-Biden led Democrat Party for trying to shred our Constitution._ Right now, our 75 AMAC Action chapters and 328 delegates are working hard to influence key members of Congress to vote on the issues that will make life easier for our 2.1+ million senior members and to protect our American values.And more than that, we’re in the trenches of state and local legislatures throughout the country to impact legislation that will prevent the radically liberal policies coming out of Washington D.C. from devastating our middle class.But that work is easier said than done. Because as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our traditional, conservative values is with the help of generous Americans like yourself. **[Will you help us fight for our America-first values in Congress with a one-time gift of $25, $50, $75, $100 or more to AMAC Action today?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm6fg7cjf4sh0v6b6t3s3othn6246v6frhvndvgg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geeor4cdh2bs)** Surely, America has seen her fair share of ups and downs, ebbs and flows._I saw it 40 years ago when I helped President Ronald Reagan bring our country back from Carter’s failed leadership – and I saw it a few years ago when I stood next to President Trump as he fought to bring our country back from Obama’s failed leadership._Obama and Joe Biden’s disastrous policies and actions have been causing:
---
| | • Record-high unemployment• Increased violent crime• Accelerating inflation • Runaway government spending to be supported by a monstrous and debilitating tax proposal• Fostering illegal immigration; drug smuggling; and human trafficking...
---
| | But that's not all.Behind the scenes, the Democrats are trying to fundamentally transform our Constitutional Republic into a socialist utopia by giving the federal government complete control over our state and local elections, weaking American strength at home and abroad, and helping Big Tech corporations censor anyone who does not share their far-Left world view. And if God-fearing, freedom-loving patriots like you and me do not take immediate action to fight for our beliefs, the country our grandchildren inherit will be radically different from that which we were so blessed to grow up in. **[So, can I count on you to help AMAC Action influence legislators to stop the Leftist Democrats’ unconstitutional power-grab with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100 or more today?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk0uphbtf964ssf68fnhp6il0cj36hmfjmnm04pg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geeor4cdh2bs)** Thank for your generous support.
---
Sincerely,
---
Bob Carlstrom, PresidentAMAC Action
---
[**DONATE**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdnm896a9eo2emg3j7bl91508d56fd7c4sk8d14o_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geeor4cdh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zokam68542putmiab0v9afl8ou9ngm11enug1fm0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1geeor4cdh2bs)
---

---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.

subject: Join Us TONIGHT for NEW Police State Film!!
body:
The growth of the police state is a threat to our Constitutional rights. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
| [WATCH POLICE STATE TRAILER](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=63018a9c12&e=a2af77507c)
---
As a nation, we face a significant threat due to **continuous violations of our Constitution.** The government has grown beyond its justified proportion, transforming our beloved land of the free into a police state.
Did you know that the average American unintentionally commits **three felonies** every day?
Dinesh D’Souza’s new film Police State documents this growing threat to our freedom.
**Knowing the threat is not enough.**
The Michigan Republican Party isn’t just committed to you understanding the threat but wants to empower you with ways to stop it.
The Good Neighbor Program is critical to the Michigan Republican Party’s strategy for winning elections and saving our nation from the growing police state.
We must recruit more Michiganders to Constitutionalism if we are going to save state and nation.
Join us **TONIGHT at the AMC theater in Auburn Hills** at Great Lakes Crossing Mall!
• 6 pm Good Neighbor Program discussion inside Bar Louie (appetizers and cash bar)• 7 pm Police State Movie Premier
Watch the trailer for police state above and purchase your tickets below.
| [PURCHASE POLICE STATE TICKETS HERE](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=232b586cbe&e=a2af77507c)
---
### PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States,
### SO HELP ME GOD.

body:
| Hey, I need to reach you right at the start of the week, because we still have a small number of membership spots left.

I’m shocked at how out of whack the House GOP’s priorities are—as we saw over the last few weeks with their second speakership battle of the year.

That’s why the NRCC’s misleading attacks against _my_ record are so completely baffling. They just launched a new one late last week, which is why getting our last membership spots filled today is so critical—we must show we have the grassroots momentum to fight back.

Will you click here to chip in $20 or whatever you can to claim one of the last spots?

By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between October 17, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on October 23, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) “Prize Winner” will receive a trip for two to a November 2, 2023 reception in Houston, Texas consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner’s residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the reception featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value (“ARV”) of the Prize: $8,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. body:
Protect the rich folks from paying their fair share and they’ll help you run a campaign out of the Ritz.
#

Peter,
Kyrsten Sinema put out another FEC report earlier this month that showed the “strength” of her campaign.
And by now, you might know what that strength is:
The deep pockets of her billionaire donors, many of them Republicans (like Harlan Crow — SCOTUS Justice Clarence Thomas’ benefactor and a max-out donor to Sinema).
But take a look at how she’s spent their money:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231023-1&t=1&akid=1367%2E734936%2EopHrJF)
It’s a grift as old as politics itself: Protect the rich folks from paying their fair share and they’ll help you run a campaign out of the Ritz.
But not here. Not with Ruben. This campaign isn’t funded by the wealthy and well connected. It is powered by people like you, chipping in to emails like this.
When Ruben goes to the Senate he will represent the people of Arizona — not some billionaire backers.
We know we send a lot of requests your way, but we hope you’ll take that as a sign of how important this really is. And of course, we don’t expect you to chip in to every email or text we send. But to power this campaign, we do need folks to take that very important step and make a donation when the time is right.
Today is one of those days. So we are humbly asking:

2. **This race is going to be _close_.** In a swing state like Pennsylvania, just a handful of votes from Cresco could be the difference between victory and defeat.

3. **We need resources if we want to win.** Look, traveling across the Commonwealth and reaching out to thousands of voters doesn’t come cheap — that’s why I’m counting on this grassroots team to help me spread my pro-labor, pro-choice, pro-democracy message to every corner of Pennsylvania.

I have a proven track record of getting things done for Pennsylvanians.
Still not convinced? Let me share with you three more reasons why I hope you can chip in to my campaign today:
1. **As your former two-term Auditor General, I stood up for sexual assault survivors by taking on police bureaucracy to reduce the backlog in untested rape kits.** That led to a 90% drop in untested rape kits and criminals being brought to justice.

2. **I fought for more money in our classrooms.** I called out corruption in our education system and cracked down on wasteful spending.

3. **I’ve taken on the big, greedy corporations – and won.** I demanded accountability from pharmaceutical companies that jacked up seniors' prescription drug prices and helped fuel the opioid epidemic.

If I convinced you that I’m in your corner for these important fights, then I need your support today.
[_**A donation of any amount helps our campaign →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72043404/434099724/-396087986?refcode=email_102323_3-reasons&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmM2YTIzYy1iZDcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gAz0kibJ4m7C2g9Pom1J76FVNrWb2hX568aFLYOf5JU=)
Thank you for your support!
– Eugene

name: THIS IS A CRISIS
subject: Hundreds of NON-citizens found on voter rolls across the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BILL PAC
body:
Demand a FULL AUDIT of voter rolls in all 50 states!

| |
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | In just a few short months, voters across the country will head to the polls to determine who will fill their state's empty congressional seats and decide the next President of the United States.

But to the astonishment of many - including us - it won't just be American citizens casting ballots in our elections.

**Breitbart News has just revealed that[HUNDREDS OF NON-US CITIZENS](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12c1558ce2974e7fa26ed48c2aba4b9d&_e=carVdNETTMz0y8T-MyXjjw9AJm3qRnpf_lDi_SDgMwlWJzeajcVus7FsQFb6N_eGdKOkPYSNs_42XUXKbCwp_uVXmMbDvS6fbLnSsvbqJEOJtSyjO0HfDj5DORblYZP_YFuCLGYD9ZYLVZC2HvARo4vYOzi_NU1k0YNsa6Io_Z8LOnhaEe7TN6GfQ3IumsRobqZj3Q-Z8SE-fmpxKnlNoR5upvsg0_3eNeWC73tyVWINEC49yYDkoNfASljRSMBqON67ydom3FtWU__DMBYa8mcKG826u6BQg7vlLeuCCrV0CP5cSU9REJF6xMnliTP7v4bqTyGyjOgodDDpRBIgwAcrjJTrvrqiy9FMky8T_EoRwwKwfu4151ZAh8v17KtHz6R1fDAIBccC8sZndT27yibMyBIFCDJZY_kZzEaIu2RRq5BkvN_UOiMy0MZoNeqaWWZJwDm9J30R23VXQtfhvrCVJ_Y1gnONGJxr96nnYOc1PVeEvpsdIo7l8BHQgbDO "HUNDREDS OF NON-US CITIZENS") were found on voter rolls in counties across the country.**

This is a crisis!

Voting rights should be reserved for American citizens and American citizens ONLY!!

With the help from votes by non-citizens, Democrats will gain sweeping victories the next election... and America will be doomed to another 2 years of total Democratic control.
**We can still stop this, but we need the help of every red-blooded American reading this right now >>**
---
| _**\- OFFICIAL GOP REQUEST -**_

After Congress did not extend the pandemic-era Child Tax Credit (CTC), California’s poverty rate for children rose from[ 7.5 percent to nearly 17 percent](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQmIPLxSd3KIiqc6PPe7qjp4LzHy4ZC_YQ8aT_JsMjS93I7QUcPOXDF7TnqZzibvQRYGKqI69OgQ44n5mzDA146bcvaP57VB8By3OVQqEezeKBMwvOx46hXnzL8fuvqXYmBFN7ei4EZ5JLx9FbG75A7-8MiSQ1usKi_REHP_jb4dhFR22boVzd5my1BjzSbdmW4v5AOG5Bqg_Y4vBH2MPcn8NrMaCTAhc29IqqYepzIRtH_4faahXmcVH8Tvs9KblyAUI6mq0rOYVOE_eRVkKrTXf2B1TBJadtaUgu0jnKT5vnsGlewlSD4H66R2A_UBTchXqpaSJyYFBk2KiZ60PToq86phzaeOFy8IGQyJVELPQA1VRMZNT2QVsw4mqf0r-ew/40o/lWUTVacfSf6A5D_dxjVucg/h2/RQnffkcS7UOYPqCxSAv67KON4iZfutECiS-8shkDqXg) in one year. California has the highest rate of child poverty in the nation affecting [nearly 1.4 million](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXa-tAvD2rVe1Vb5QSll2cgrUlOSE003qd9-5hhbw3OtsiMw4TQ_T8r9mBAlQzaRnLKi0blqRTDes7aHVS1Vk8OjLbP80TSM7iZhkm5Mv3GFuImBCKuDojqIs6Htd9j-GXUzxWxv1oF8UxGb2cP3N_vYWOk_8epvcAKMWlZ0iBy3CVadU8SeQpxNuOXhTiSbtphAS_fnR_mxj3BOrD5JURKllbYI1hBlwMrcPL7B8xCoIB3LYiAYHXUUN2IlNquFyNHPPuIJIuGpl9iMbBKFMnNkVtUYj_67reOxO2dseKGH56RkKekc5sYEMB1Lfr0aUvDX36v5kY6M69uartp02Q8o/40o/lWUTVacfSf6A5D_dxjVucg/h3/m1X5oKSu03LBA6zeQpReOEXPy6pJDFIAoH9quXcOUWI) children in the state.
More than [95% of families](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLoubPun62SdZnf0UvvVJoDNmx_kp2j5IAD47qkdWo9BTMdhkAMfFLCv4GSOoHckB-mVdGDSpl71BKaGgamfcd9lKn_o1xjOtufDZxUAcjYzR7kZFIVT5tM3CA1Hjh-RuMyu8M7e9exRtkGEsjfG_fHce_TgLtigrcfHYpF5S2iuWmdK9K3RRyrHTP8zq8igbncSJJ5QbmFAQVqZO4WKIxtyuisMgOyJyXaIRJ9NLqlzqjs7gzw_CcVhQJxVZNuA7q3fk4WjkzwmndSuEw2swLyNbHEGSQKM0Hb7tKzSFNOfOzlqQURL-aJP-zq-tBLpqzqBGm_-DJzajlNz74BOZj2iR-m7LTTfK1fOvHEkScrxq093eyF6WigEYBtBfJtx93zHvXRD42viJ5SzzX7bJxoaRm8h1Gk7aHxhpLKzpZ-d/40o/lWUTVacfSf6A5D_dxjVucg/h4/3vdjVr3yDq8zajE-olnfxgRPTnIR0H0yLqAAl4Fc7y0) who benefited from the CTC were either in the workforce, ill or disabled, elderly, or had a child under age 2.
**Congress squandered one of the greatest accomplishments in antipoverty policy when they let the Child Tax Credits (CTC) expire at the end of 2021.**
Derek Marshall is running for Congress to restore the CTC and fight poverty.
**[Stand with Derek’s campaign and sign on: restore the expanded Child Tax Credit.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mEywVBVZ82SM8_5YEeOs4BulZIxbsQ7zQATJW7_xrOayb1WiPDo6W6F0bg9ZuOE3vG2i6YGJbhyZASo0MqzAgdEFb187SyhaxPw76sakyRj0r7-o_sT5shTOJBGWVqezDYUvnxep1tL7vAawrU0L6SAH7eB57pvvenZMZnwOSEfs9ZbwYhxmiTSjqdwIMaQuB5fCXAzpggjLfOn--W2t6ZCfgjljD4tbIJsSJflwDYucrVANgbnt7XsKDPO939qF9tTnNw539ReJ8N5Ouhr7yoxtaIq-o1zO6thKFb-8cB2or65VLUs8imH64VojFHsyHn7k96hi-kH7bb6MGCW2EjEg8YN1yeuvoRzd36fpp0HpfHS5aqxsKIjPjORes2jgOwc9Afhg16pR9N4w9XXJ8VqzBvh5xncVaggdRUQ_cttcGdgPyZC2aNYqpcUMNrNG42aEqSVZvNV5mLzZFvExYjLCeyvfN6RXnb-MNVEt9w7KEkM1N78ixfpM49LasESQqhhd327B5QHg19zNOHE6gE0zKhhNGDyUp9xUxmyPXZBfumuFH9CvfyGzRQ24pJ_5g56stYBc4TxOqONQ0r_Dhkzffi3Uh8Pja2PBU96TK_yzKkHd74JALtximpJVJ40CW/40o/lWUTVacfSf6A5D_dxjVucg/h5/kXMR7DKEDgzKXaI1a2xkXyv7EDqw_jUqsFIBJJZJK4A)**

clean_body: | | | ** **Derek Marshall is running for Congress against a Republican that voted NO on expanding the Child Tax Credit. ** After Congress did not extend the pandemic-era Child Tax Credit (CTC), California’s poverty rate for children rose from in one year. California has the highest rate of child poverty in the nation affecting children in the state. More than who benefited from the CTC were either in the workforce, ill or disabled, elderly, or had a child under age 2. Congress squandered one of the greatest accomplishments in antipoverty policy when they let the Child Tax Credits (CTC) expire at the end of 2021. Derek Marshall is running for Congress to restore the CTC and fight poverty. the expiration of the policy, Black and Latinx Californians have been more likely to struggle with paying basic expenses, underscoring that the end of the pandemic support furthered racial inequities. Before these credits expired at the end of 2021, they were shown to reduce food insecurity and financial hardship for families while boosting the economy. Childhood poverty was cut almost in half! Kids who spend their childhood in poverty are five times as likely to live in poverty as adults. **** poverty causes lifelong harm. \- Derek Marshall for Congress is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 | | Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | | Sent via . Fall Fest Vote-A-Rama
https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588678/ [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588678/]
Saturday 10/28
Join us for an evening of FREE family-friendly fun! Come to the Signet Center Bowling Alley for free bowling and other games, free food, and more! There will be entertainment from local comedians, swag bags, and a trunk-or-treat for the kids. During the fun, you can find information on HOW and WHERE to vote and make a voting plan!
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588678/]
https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/580994/ [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/580994/] Saturday 10/28:
Join Freedom Virginia, Repro Rising, and Generation Ratify VA to help get Russet Perry across the finish line for SD 31! This is a crucial seat for us to win to protect abortion access for Virginia - come out and help us spread the word and get voters to show up!
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588180/]
https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588997/ [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588997/] Saturday 10/28:
Join South Asians for America, Democratic Asian Americans of Virginia, and Freedom Virginia to get out the vote for the amazing candidates we have here in Loudoun. Let's make sure voters are aware of how important it is to come out for this election and help get these champions for equity and affordability across the finish line!
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588997/]
https://www.mobilize.us/dpva/event/584107/ [https://www.mobilize.us/dpva/event/584107/] Canvassing For Clint Jenkins
Come knock doors for Nadarius Clark and Clint Jenkins! In such a close election, every vote counts! We'll be talking to Democrats about Early Voting and making a plan to get out and vote!
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/dpva/event/584107/]
https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588868/ [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588868/] Virtual PhoneBanking For Travis Nembhard
Call your neighbors to get the word out about HD-22's next Delegate Travis Nembhard! Travis Nembhard is an attorney, former financial regulator, and a former administrative law judge running for VA House of Delegates District 22.
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588868/]
At Freedom Virginia
We are dedicated to advancing economic security policies and creating a Commonwealth where all Virginians have the freedom to thrive and contribute to their community. We are working to ensure that hard work is respected and that all Virginians, no matter who they are, where they live, or what they do, can succeed for themselves and their families.
Visit our site [https://freedomva.org/]
