name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: This week in court
body:
Fair Fight/Stacey Abrams/Marc Elias/Biden DOJ v True the Vote et al
| | | October 23, 2023 | [Read Online](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/7lGnFEBV30RHklOg_mstw6N_-cQbeN93UNyrRA0hq11-Jh-Tdv1eej7OQn9zvOg3psxFgCluP-HqEuD3GEYZ9tJoAXE_QiPwxSFy3HluAz3WArxHvJLYjTaJ9jHG0v1zOjVLbLu9KhDEmwWjFWQl2vGJ71VwiX_hTONylwzoOt_zkZaJeeL95V-1VbGbgucUco5yISXbXgZYz8vM9hGMQJt3aVU9JifPYt5uPyZOanPhc1yWqccQq0gj5W2jl4poiSp5QHIHw0ahiGgHXHYiPz5aqH-dinXKnCoY2Y0FPsj9zR4gZVr1qxFo6SIRoSNCAarrcE_tIb3KcV5RKSq-Da1e4BFB0IbZW06G-K6TykY1g7a62-PUkWwKGFTt20zUup4G--jOcSWhUCk2OGJMvglHqtq0t07F4yDLLR0bVdun7df8gMyyqunH58wpF--k-n6BVzn4lez5fx__qhjJW3hnL8DIBMVm6w2EMJuSpEfGRqW8W6gd5RHkld0IGuTB1M88Rg9RwiOaK5Ssp2WNDGkx0xChYP6wIkl4h_ae6L4/40o/-Bmce62ZSJqjpURd2JWZ4A/h0/TfATxzJ9v1Ku_zq2yRdURrNGeJGQs9kAlnbdvI1fIyE)
---
| | | | [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HU-ZjMPOoUgTod6PLaUdnA5GaZR7KG2ALmK-VstuL5euthCQB9hJNwKiLyzJF5QT_STfqGHVmu2Eo0pKmjQNXVFRuowwU3Ytuuxth5FZpYzWgXO7oTs4Y3oFEoaZuRG74RBQTyKp5-3-dldeAh9_L-o/40o/-Bmce62ZSJqjpURd2JWZ4A/h1/dlPki6foyZxk8Oi57gef5dMOLgujE5-jQy4YOCKFi8g)
---
### This Week in Court
On Thursday, October 26th, True the Vote goes to trial in a lawsuit filed against us by Fair Fight, Stacey Abrams, and Marc Elias, with the Biden Justice Department having intervened. [This case has been ongoing since December 2020.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/Qvk83lMrxpyahZ2UDrJlsUUkzv6S5IbZaiCcmLVvdD9aspWv3_CzE1fXyaE6ysvHZQ9ujLX6pAqbaN_Gy3Bf-m9pyLdZHogCk1V8FXt_vnAWss6rZicR8gMiqaf6JptMDxJXQl8o_g7KNSm6l-WdPzwLmgNxVNj3KJ14EhK0Yd_sgf8gzPGd7uL3SR2yZkyReL2Gt1Y7mazQaTz0T14kOQ/40o/-Bmce62ZSJqjpURd2JWZ4A/h2/yAvxJ7pjONUpREOEFE18s2W1FuNsKLorDiMfaz1yiug)
A short background ... in 2020, True the Vote helped Georgia citizens lawfully provide information about ineligible voter records to their counties. Over 364,000 records were identified. For our efforts, Stacey Abrams, Marc Elias, and the Biden Justice Department sued me, True the Vote, and five Georgia citizens who I’d thanked by name in a press statement. After nearly three years in court, the case has finally progressed to trial, with True the Vote providing legal support for all defendants. In its lawsuit, Fair Fight alleged that True the Vote, by sending files to Georgia counties for their review in the interest of electoral accuracy, engaged in criminal acts tantamount to those of the Klu Klux Klan. [Here’s what Abrams is saying about us on her website.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/uzQsgEo9Z5ho0pninYwZF-kq8WG6OQwE_GXlBXJ8a4W4G9vKia-zZGKPJVWsSIDNhuxYRWjQiwW8hZE5RUcjee8y9qxmUy_1v6PsFCxxZBtNAgRQWzPtaeKKJRSl8b3L4-fVP0CMKDs1S98BkpIwKlapT_53W9klQlqQTLO-YPM/40o/-Bmce62ZSJqjpURd2JWZ4A/h3/QLsT1tJMVpfn01XDjBGeGTYtdHCKe5pgIzkFETDC_AI)
True the Vote is defending the rights of every American voter. This is a critical battle. We look forward to our days in court.
#### Beginning in Prayer
[This Monday night, 10.23, at 7p et](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HZ3JHW2d17DFn3FABtrwp5Q-XjLY53MR4pbOYRa3dh0OkaIGHECEa6kmKpiEdCAHqiPaKIo_m3S9J5xit-HHrsCAIuiqD8PPuR8PBB-df-ahoj8C2B_hi1k3_-2Xoy54zFjt3zeQ-_PaCQa3rLmEYGxC9C0z4SKZanS86yXhfVpVDiiY5_moIyPqsYFWHZlPBSz_ci6Y92LNJdQiUzlLr8AqWrzAGESEuUKdL-QZ-RdLjxBdc0oiAuBXSZQuSB-aHg/40o/-Bmce62ZSJqjpURd2JWZ4A/h4/FyB5MbJR9dNT2lgKBIoLQYO60QK-_GPWQdf11MC3uNo), please join me on the Live! podcast, for a time of prayer. clean_body: Fair Fight/Stacey Abrams/Marc Elias/Biden DOJ v True the Vote et al | | | October 23, 2023 | | | | | This Week in Court On Thursday, October 26th, True the Vote goes to trial in a lawsuit filed against us by Fair Fight, Stacey Abrams, and Marc Elias, with the Biden Justice Department having intervened. A short background ... in 2020, True the Vote helped Georgia citizens lawfully provide information about ineligible voter records to their counties. Over 364,000 records were identified. For our efforts, Stacey Abrams, Marc Elias, and the Biden Justice Department sued me, True the Vote, and five Georgia citizens who I’d thanked by name in a press statement. After nearly three years in court, the case has finally progressed to trial, with True the Vote providing legal support for all defendants. In its lawsuit, Fair Fight alleged that True the Vote, by sending files to Georgia counties for their review in the interest of electoral accuracy, engaged in criminal acts tantamount to those of the Klu Klux Klan. True the Vote is defending the rights of every American voter. This is a critical battle. We look forward to our days in court. Beginning in Prayer , please join me on the Live! podcast, for a time of prayer. I’m thrilled to announce that Dave and Kris Kubal, of , will be leading us, along with their army of prayer warriors from across the country. We’ll pray for Israel, for our world, for our trial, and for our country. If you’ve never been on an IFA call when they open the mics to pray, I promise you, it’s an event you won’t want to miss. To join, click the image below and it’ll take you straight to the event. | | | Though this update has focused on the Fair Fight lawsuit (one of many suits we’re involved in), there’s much more happening at True the Vote than just courtroom drama. Our roadmap is packed with new plans, new initiatives, and a heavy emphasis on engaging volunteers nationwide. We must fight, we must win ... and we must keep moving forward. Everything is on the line in 2024. Keep the faith. Never quit. Ever onward, with much love- | | P.S. name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Dementia doubled since 1970, here’s why…
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Dementia isn't new, but it's
hitting twice as hard nowadays and folks are getting it younger
and younger. Now we know there's a clear reason why dementia has
doubled since 1970.

One of America's top anti-aging
doctors has rooted out the cause, and discovered why it has
nothing to do with genetics, diet, exercise, or anything else
you're thinking of.

Thankfully he also stumbled on
the only method that counteracts the threat and gives your brain
an incredible, natural boost that can have it firing like when
you were in your 20s and 30s.

> How to fire up your brain and
avoid the scary rise in dementia cases.

If you're more forgetful than you
used to be or you're having any "senior moments," check this out
right away…

Fellow American,

**We are Americans.**

At the end of the day, that is our most unifying principle. That spirit of unity is a centerpiece of my campaign. We cannot establish a national identity without saying, "I am proud to be American."

A President can and should be the best example of that ideal. Someone who listens to every American, even if they disagree on issues or on how to make America stronger. That's exactly why I need to hear from you now, Fellow American.

**[Please share your year-end priorities and where you stand on the future of America.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f203d69e07674251a1a072fa26b0dec9&_e=Y5OcaKqDrOQr_9ZwCvN6Rnvf-DFL0zHbFP2QOwk2Ctz9dplUFiWVfSoPzcqKn2qeGBns8xWtWPO9KXZxPLaYgP3XI0o0uIcrtA8W5tgWTmDSUYeguHctvuIgziY0k0IB0HQac1nXBydVzB5FJDcaqIWRaNtyfdU9YvDoYWJfPWb8CVNygJvB3FbmJNZXGXQUpQPXm8F62wD-pRzar7fbV0uWh0XeZq_Vln3kCHFROsY6bpBUxrXZehwzlFcR35GoT3XW8t4j2uEWyzlD7N8IDD63JJT1qwbXeFWDaPRlZ7xHGZQTjnYf89fODHLAdFKqoTSH0CRscvLlP5SimXgP_P8OV4M-U_eLFmCr5j7rZpgp7Ib6LlxjQDiPw2OtL45o8EkGmzFwSGlki7MuByBABY8JuCmy_x6K994p5Yr3O_ePKm3b226j1pQdpfOt705fJKifXJ-xp17TNINo_ms-e7YqHF9XFrq3z2CWTp43xDXwCNOoePXHJtH1CFOSZ6lxFyf9RdZvNWTIoYvZaFZ-4JdSAl0Bqrsvoymij55bHkOA5v94-jVO6Ot5y8lAZnvCe78pIh3Wp8tNS8_7B-Lt2w%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Republicans in Virginia are poll watching...

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72045553/434106770/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDNiNjNlMy1iZjcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-ZBSxw2s8yCOWB1p3C84TjN0nbvlRFfNbKeDSVxxk8=&emci=7274c632-8a6f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=203b63e3-bf71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, _The New York Times_ recently released a fascinating story on Republican election activists and their so-called “poll watching”... [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72045555/434106777/1835003434?refcode=mw_em_231023_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDNiNjNlMy1iZjcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-ZBSxw2s8yCOWB1p3C84TjN0nbvlRFfNbKeDSVxxk8=) In 2021, when Republicans secured big wins in Virginia, they attributed their success partly to their “poll watchers.” These watchers were conservative activists who were trained to keep an eye on voters, inspect ballot machines, and look for evidence of voter fraud – _they’re actually taught to be as close as legally possible to the election workers_. They even wrote a memo, which they coined “The Virginia Model”, detailing their practices so other states can follow suit. This was all done under the claim of “protecting election integrity.” And now they’re at it again – recruiting more supporters to work ahead of the legislative elections next month. **Let’s call this what it is: The GOP, ever since Donald Trump lost the election in 2020, have been obsessed with convincing the American people that we should not trust the electoral system. These “poll watchers” are simply fueling the baseless claims that our elections are rigged.** __[**Republicans are sowing mistrust in our elections. Democrats are fighting to protect our democracy. clean_body: Republicans in Virginia are poll watching... | | | Derek, The New York Times recently released a fascinating story on Republican election activists and their so-called “poll watching”... = In 2021, when Republicans secured big wins in Virginia, they attributed their success partly to their “poll watchers.” These watchers were conservative activists who were trained to keep an eye on voters, inspect ballot machines, and look for evidence of voter fraud – they’re actually taught to be as close as legally possible to the election workers. They even wrote a memo, which they coined “The Virginia Model”, detailing their practices so other states can follow suit. This was all done under the claim of “protecting election integrity.” And now they’re at it again – recruiting more supporters to work ahead of the legislative elections next month. Let’s call this what it is: The GOP, ever since Donald Trump lost the election in 2020, have been obsessed with convincing the American people that we should not trust the electoral system. These “poll watchers” are simply fueling the baseless claims that our elections are rigged. = What we’re witnessing is a coordinated effort to cast doubt on our elections. Our elections next month have the potential to be a staging ground for outright election subversion down the line. We don’t need a party in charge of the Commonwealth that would rather cast doubt on our elections than get things done for Virginians. __=__ Democracy is literally on the ballot. Thank you, Team Warner ******=**** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

clean_body: Monica De La Cruz wants to cut Social Security | | | House Republicans are divided on MANY issues, but there’s one thing that unites them: destroying Social Security. From the Republican Study Committee’s pitch to raise the retirement age to 69, to the GOP proposed budget cutting nearly $2 trillion from Medicaid AND convening a closed-door commission to tear down Social Security and Medicare, the White House is right: Republicans have declared war on our abuelos and Monica De La Cruz is right there with them. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: | Don’t let her fool you, Peter: Monica De La Cruz is not on your side. Just days ago she voted for alt-right extremist Jim Jordan as Speaker of the House — a representative who has committed to slashing Social Security and Medicare if elected Speaker. She likes to talk a big game about getting to work in DC, but when you look at her track record, the only work she would get to is the business of harming hard-working Americans like us. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Team Vallejo | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

body:
See the information inside >>>
| | | Friend, It’s crunch time here at IN GOP Headquarters. _Indiana’s local elections are just days away, and we’re just weeks from the beginning of the 2024 election year. We have some close mayoral races in cities all across the Hoosier state that rely on your support to cross the finish line with a victory. _ That’s why we’re reaching out to our top supporters like you, Friend. We’d like to thank you for your support so far this year, but today, we need your help like never before. **Will you please match our average 2023 donation amount by chipping in $20 today?**

That's why, on day one, I made sure our team knew that the success of our movement relies on grassroots supporters like YOU. With that, comes a responsibility to make every dollar count and spend your donations wisely.

Unlike other campaigns that are burning through money on private planes, fancy dinners, and country clubs, **we are a lean and mean operation.**

We stretch every dollar as far as it can go and know it's important to spend our money when it counts. But even covering basic expenses to host town halls and travel to battleground states to meet with voters adds up.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. | | | | | | I am a mom and an accountant, Friend, which means I know how to stretch a dollar. That's why, on day one, I made sure our team knew that the success of our movement relies on grassroots supporters like YOU. With that, comes a responsibility to make every dollar count and spend your donations wisely. Unlike other campaigns that are burning through money on private planes, fancy dinners, and country clubs, we are a lean and mean operation. We stretch every dollar as far as it can go and know it's important to spend our money when it counts. But even covering basic expenses to host town halls and travel to battleground states to meet with voters adds up. "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win! " Here are just a couple meaningful ways your contribution has helped our team: -> TRAVELING: From day one, I've prioritized meeting with voters, shaking every hand, and amplifying my message everywhere I can. In order to do that, my team and I are flying all over the country, and we're doing it while spending money wisely. I can tell you firsthand, we're not out here lighting money on fire with private planes and extravagant luxury hotels like some campaigns. We're flying a lot of Spirit and JetBlue. We're getting to New Hampshire, Iowa, and everywhere else we need to go with the most affordable options we can find. | -> EVENTS: We're running a true grassroots campaign, and that means being on the ground, holding as many grassroots events as possible. Every time we hold a town hall in Iowa, South Carolina, or New Hampshire, it's an opportunity to share my vision, answer questions, and gain the confidence of voters. But what you may not realize is that all of the costs can quickly add up to rent the event space, chairs, and sound equipment. In order to spend your money wisely, we're holding these events at places like bakeries, local venues, and farms. | | | | | | At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day and spending every dollar wisely. But all of this still costs money, which is why we need your help. Once the first-in-the-nation caucus is here, it's only a matter of time before the rest of the country begins to cast their ballots. It's a marathon and we've got to stay on pace to win each and every day. "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!" | | It 's crunch time, Friend! There's no room for holding back. With just 88 days left until voting begins every single day matters which is why I appreciate your generous support today when it matters most. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. Mississippi's Attorney General has failed our state and created lasting harm for our country. Full stop.

Now, it's up to this team to make sure her time in office ends on November 7th. [Chip in $25 or any other amount today to make it happen:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72045979/434108261/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_231023_l1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTk0MjJlYjAtYzE3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JPbLYZo_KSJQs1ts7kkwjREfLAvF1ihzSLOAJyfkjzw=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72045980/434108263/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_231023_b1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTk0MjJlYjAtYzE3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JPbLYZo_KSJQs1ts7kkwjREfLAvF1ihzSLOAJyfkjzw=) Greta's running for office because Mississippi is her home, and she's dedicated her entire career to making it stronger and more fair for all of us. And she refuses to stand by while state leadership fails to act on corruption, Medicaid expansion, fair working conditions, and so much more.

| The last opportunity to register to vote is **_today_** , fellow activist – we need to act FAST.

We are working hard to register voters so we can **defend democracy**. Our courts will decide voting rights and will have a direct impact on what happens in 2024. And that’s not all. They will also play a key role in abortion access, healthcare decisions, environmental decisions, funding for education, and more. Voting this November will affect Pennsylvania voters' day-to-day lives.

The New Pennsylvania Project’s goal is to expand Pennsylvania's electorate so it reflects the Commonwealth's demographically changing population. We center Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth by conducting voter registration and providing education about the issues that matter most to ensure these newly registered voters vote in every election - twice a year.

[**Today is the LAST DAY to register voters ahead of November 7. Folks have until 11:59 p.m. to register. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project

name: Urgent Petition <via Left Action>
subject: Sign: NO Election Deniers for Speaker of the House! >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: NO Election Deniers for Speaker of the House! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T447b27bf-eba4-4f33-b95f-21d5847357d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | There’s no end in sight to House Republicans’ chaos and nonsense as they attempt to elect a new Speaker of the House. Now that Trump-fanatic Jim Jordan has been dropped as a nominee, NINE more Republicans have thrown their hat in the ring. And only [two](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2112105-e423-4621-8e95-cab935b4c64a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) of those nine voted to certify the results of the 2020 election. We can’t have an election denier as Speaker of the House. This is a powerful position that’s second in line to the presidency. And Republicans -- especially vulnerable ones in swing districts -- need to know that if they support an election denier, we will come for them HARD on Election Day. [Add your name to tell Republicans: NO election deniers for Speaker of the House! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94dbb0f0-8b76-460e-b8aa-d73a9d54b6be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Sean Feucht
subject: A night of HOPE for Israel
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=d6fc36e3f02a4180aebd50b43ab61a95&_e=_ilWeMJ38KBYaxBf57bBwF0mss7NcMM7vWh_gV8qbzPd7qURhbatHbgKybyWbhBq-w57vbp1eXjkXHn6ry2GrfEFuxTHSb8CEWeTb6gQp889pNUzsAltHihQ5k1nP4JOp6_vLDNNIrzxpUPe5tqmyik-XKq2RCN8DXH_c70UMeYIYjL2E6R2J4gC2oZOpcgTi-Od_65_2n_pIgAsGiwuupMDu55s9GbED0nAfn3N1bleAwIYVx-WK4JOT6zZDqyw0E-KyIARc3OIbOCsAe9eb9-0JSRgnW-fg9Xe7GO_lCPrziv5KOFUGLl-Hgakowp2OIbnOAP7_nfPhocEk6fayQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
The level of demonic attacks against Israel is staggering. In response to Hamas terrorists attacking, murdering, and kidnapping Israeli men women, and children, we've seen a defense of these terrorists at every level. From high school students holding walkouts in support of Hamas to college students signing letters denouncing Israel to even high-ranking democrat members of Congress cheering on the destruction of Israel. The animosity towards Israel is shameful. The defense of bloodthirsty terrorists is sickening and we must stand up and denounce it as loudly as possible!!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=d6fc36e3f02a4180aebd50b43ab61a95&_e=_ilWeMJ38KBYaxBf57bBwF0mss7NcMM7vWh_gV8qbzPd7qURhbatHbgKybyWbhBq-w57vbp1eXjkXHn6ry2GrfEFuxTHSb8CEWeTb6gQp889pNUzsAltHihQ5k1nP4JOp6_vLDNNIrzxpUPe5tqmyik-XKq2RCN8DXH_c70UMeYIYjL2E6R2J4gC2oZOpcgTuLj2ShVo5cE9SJPb5qNWql94YEd9EAdGvume_AXJABR7yjrW1ykMIPiLHpz2Z6I6Zlc8D6P13eOV6vgzNzObROleki9F4Kn6AyGnxCtSg7ZDlwQ0j8zMWePJ2rppakuWQ2j6XufNbdezMkIEGzONRw%3D%3D)
---
On Wednesday night, Hold the Line is partnering with Godspeak Calvary Chapel to hold "A Night of Hope For Israel." My friend Yair Levi is an Israeli musician and former Israeli Defense Forces captain who received _special_ permission from the Israeli Defense Forces to leave Israel and help lead worship at this event. We will gather in solidarity in support of Israel. We will pray, worship, and cry out to God on behalf of the nation of Israel and echo King David's prayer from Psalm 122, "Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: “May they prosper who love you. May peace be within your walls, And prosperity within your palaces."
---
Till All Hear,
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=d6fc36e3f02a4180aebd50b43ab61a95&_e=_ilWeMJ38KBYaxBf57bBwFyeD1gEKj34zY0HoBxC9AqRFizGCLUwMklsddtBn1Ep9Edi9lDnNndjdBudiO9NH6OanD7RTvPnWdvfoM38lyIp2agU4eW7k7WL1dIkpH1kwDHmlq5V9nzehYojQJK6m_ti1420uvodKzh8uTzYbjPi1GM_6DBNSXtZnkoPQhGOpWtOC2emIWmTdOCLLV8sPF-lwViRpiL-tshpGpkAJoMeGO-It9EPqkX-m50idpnq8St7NdxvGW4ftxhqClCUNcaWqXsZyy_A58Cg3HYQHqNAzYW4SOGxmieFlZj5Gyq2)
---
Sean Feucht
---
[**SUPPORT HOLD THE LINE >>> **](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=d6fc36e3f02a4180aebd50b43ab61a95&_e=_ilWeMJ38KBYaxBf57bBwF0mss7NcMM7vWh_gV8qbzPd7qURhbatHbgKybyWbhBq-w57vbp1eXjkXHn6ry2GrfEFuxTHSb8CEWeTb6gQp889pNUzsAltHihQ5k1nP4JOp6_vLDNNIrzxpUPe5tqmyik-XKq2RCN8DXH_c70UMeYIYjL2E6R2J4gC2oZOpcgTfOkoroMYxxXbflBUIaC7P80svOH7BGC_Cc2XaTeAGPlJDFS68qkkI6HMX2mHdOUgWmXLm0Fgn-uKp0wOL_P4W1WO85GzbitewS6i0m1GniDgRrJjXIXe1WNGEUj9bT7nIYV4ftTooXqdvtVKQaqp4Q%3D%3D)

A couple of weeks ago, New Jerseyans were asked who they would vote for if the election was today, and I was humbled to learn that most said me.

**[We're building the biggest grassroots movement New Jersey has ever seen, and we need you](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72046266/434109351/1594595015?refcode=2023-10-23-onemonth-positive&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b530ecd2-c271-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTMwZWNkMi1jMjcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4GTFOlfQOlDHcengKBS43hAQdyqU68v2Wphz2htBKNM=)[. New Jersey is ready for a change, and together, we can make it happen.
More soon,

clean_body: New Jersey is ready for a change, and together, we can make it happen. | | | | One month ago, I stepped away from my son's 8th birthday party (with his blessing, of course) and sent out a tweet sharing that I felt compelled to run for Senate. = And the response this past month has been incredible. That first week, people from every corner of New Jersey and the United States came together in support of our movement, and we raised nearly one million dollars. = I still don't take corporate PAC money – so that one million, it is all from thousands of grassroots donors like you. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = I've received so many calls, letters, texts, and emails from people across every corner of New Jersey who are enthusiastic about our campaign.New Jerseyans are excited to join a movement for good governance and to restore integrity back to this Senate seat. A couple of weeks ago, New Jerseyans were asked who they would vote for if the election was today, and I was humbled to learn that most said me. = I'm grateful for the outpouring of support and energized for the months ahead as we race toward the primary. = New Jersey is ready for a change, and together, we can make it happen. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I want to make sure you see this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=949f16367a399f0feacafab06c8961fb497daa1eecc05ae5cf6a2b0d1c343f1deadf80dfd0f6cfd33cc27d0e2dea19b6973edadcf51a095d4ae022b68aa35f563d914cf4952624723650086d42c6d151

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=186b7c5634dd17f6970225304c15cba46e19b209da1919595f161b6f29448ba9b743d838e32f1c4c47df92c02cfe13a3139e29d0cadb6fbfd865081c2972c244

Friend,

Recently, I sat down with Sean Hannity to talk about the actions I’m taking in response to the atrocities we’re seeing unfold in Israel. I made it very clear to the nation what my position is on absorbing the antisemitic and anti-American refugees fleeing Gaza.

I said I wanted NO PART in importing these toxic pathologies into the United States of America.

Sean and I also got to talk about a mission very personal to me and my administration: bringing hundreds of Americans—families and children—back home to Florida by deploying planes out to Israel and acting when Joe Biden let our people down yet again.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=186b7c5634dd17f6970225304c15cba46e19b209da1919595f161b6f29448ba9b743d838e32f1c4c47df92c02cfe13a3139e29d0cadb6fbfd865081c2972c244
Watch here

It was incredibly disappointing to see Joe Biden and the State Department neglect Americans stranded in harm’s way... I mean, illegal aliens come across our southern border, and the federal government will fly them all over the country for free. They'll put them up in nice hotels, taxpayer’s expense, free to the illegal alien. And yet, the best that they’re willing to do for Americans dodging rockets in Israel was to either dump them in Cyprus or in Greece, and then charge them for that. That’s just insane.

So, my wife and I went down to Tampa to welcome our first plane of people home and see the faces of 91 children who were safe and sound at home again. And if that’s not proof that leadership truly makes a difference, I’m not sure what does.

I want you to hear about my experience firsthand, friend.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=186b7c5634dd17f6970225304c15cba46e19b209da1919595f161b6f29448ba9b743d838e32f1c4c47df92c02cfe13a3139e29d0cadb6fbfd865081c2972c244
Click here to catch my talk with Sean:

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=186b7c5634dd17f6970225304c15cba46e19b209da1919595f161b6f29448ba9b743d838e32f1c4c47df92c02cfe13a3139e29d0cadb6fbfd865081c2972c244
See me live on Hannity

In Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=186b7c5634dd17f6970225304c15cba46e19b209da1919595f161b6f29448ba9b743d838e32f1c4c47df92c02cfe13a3139e29d0cadb6fbfd865081c2972c244

Ron DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=186b7c5634dd17f61e2c1f032701e6eb4d6589fc14bc3f84b3b79fea94d9e31f14af67fd6e2cc96e75d63a9d129af27542d3fc109699a70e37bdee106e310963
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=186b7c5634dd17f6325c84f4e2a1cedd499516eac95836595d3114a95d8113be37c26c9acdac2be6a224414c6a4746a9e1c778c44b17a9f4d985f4832177c9ad
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=186b7c5634dd17f6970225304c15cba46e19b209da1919595f161b6f29448ba9b743d838e32f1c4c47df92c02cfe13a3139e29d0cadb6fbfd865081c2972c244

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=186b7c5634dd17f6970225304c15cba46e19b209da1919595f161b6f29448ba9b743d838e32f1c4c47df92c02cfe13a3139e29d0cadb6fbfd865081c2972c244

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. ---
---
**Next, we need you all to melt the phone lines, just like you did for Congressman Jim Jordan. clean_body: | | | = In August, I shared that Defend Democracy PAC had disbursed $83,000 to Democratic candidates across Virginia. In September, I announced that our total had increased to $100,000. Now, I’m so honored to share that we’ve disbursed $280,000 – more than a quarter of a million dollars – to the candidates who need it most. This just keeps getting better and better, and we could not have done it without you. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Those contributions will help determine control of the State Senate and House of Delegates just a few weeks from now, and in turn, the fate of choice, workers’ rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and education in Virginia. Now, Gov. Youngkin and his allies may have far-right millions and the MAGA disinformation machine on their side. But all those millions can’t erase the fact that our ideals – democracy, equality, choice, freedom – resonate with the broadest coalition of voters across the state. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so, so much for making this possible. – Elaine Luria | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Nikki Haley
subject: The importance of a dollar.
body:
I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=271384018f174e2db91199d2b5570710&_e=q2__LhwimW-V8ZOWYNFcuKNXT0FikvkT3_5Jf6pytIclpjj9FtEiR9k0FzR2kFK-FX6ziosz_u3N01ucfAaX_C7cd9SZYzY_jmHRSyOrtYtfI4vRQgouz5QEcjjXdMno60fLFpHmYky9iNyg4BAA958xxzIwlDP9hLtE475is5wmdnXXgyzXch-ef20bxIQbRHCUjqA1zOsvGITVFiG5MOO_uqDvUcH1iEnTX-JYnt3nH_vI4ZaZ10iUTHHSUUFxdK_JIZ--PTxHLdeR6MRSOfXvddso1nKgA4oxcdiUXGxtfX3V13dPJPy8-xblmoQwHmE6LWg5zlezIvrOyiWjMu3WTmc3iCYXENC8qOgYK9tZ3MWBH3iFqlX7dPesK-NlYbt9RZxa3EgB_5u3dV8p6_QW2-eNjww2GfNXTbAtNFTUW3kuLM6_qIP7Lvhyg0QKetMyJOTpf9I5JrEw2Fy9yzCqeB9eW7eXrOsEa4U9qME6HoLA8InHJYBOM5YGz7eVRdRdGpWjdpPavIFzcFmgCPoUsjBKqro5K8cqXUsLvPpuiBAP0AQT2tr54c7fSfSOO5kd3z8wH2IfDNBJCmQGKT25zTvbyDFRtbmiE6c6_yHqS3ZXR7tS119C0wnlFAkk)
---

I am a mom and an accountant, Friend, which means I know how to stretch a dollar.

That's why, on day one, I made sure our team knew that the success of our movement relies on grassroots supporters like YOU. With that, comes a responsibility to make every dollar count and spend your donations wisely.

Unlike other campaigns that are burning through money on private planes, fancy dinners, and country clubs, **we are a lean and mean operation.**

We stretch every dollar as far as it can go and know it's important to spend our money when it counts. But even covering basic expenses to host town halls and travel to battleground states to meet with voters adds up.

**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=271384018f174e2db91199d2b5570710&_e=q2__LhwimW-V8ZOWYNFcuKNXT0FikvkT3_5Jf6pytIclpjj9FtEiR9k0FzR2kFK-FX6ziosz_u3N01ucfAaX_C7cd9SZYzY_jmHRSyOrtYtfI4vRQgouz5QEcjjXdMno60fLFpHmYky9iNyg4BAA958xxzIwlDP9hLtE475is5wmdnXXgyzXch-ef20bxIQbRHCUjqA1zOsvGITVFiG5MOO_uqDvUcH1iEnTX-JYnt3nH_vI4ZaZ10iUTHHSUUFxdK_JIZ--PTxHLdeR6MRSOfXvddso1nKgA4oxcdiUXGxtfX3V13dPJPy8-xblmoQwHmE6LWg5zlezIvrOyiWjMu3WTmc3iCYXENC8qOgYK9tZ3MWBH3iFqlX7dPesK-NlYbt9RZxa3EgB_5u3dV8p6_QW2-eNjww2GfNXTbAtNFTUW3kuLM6_qIP7Lvhyg0QKetMyJOTpf9I5JrEw2Fy9y5YhS7Zes5gpDwNCvQL6195iwfEWfvcpzwE8_fK2qI7BPC_5wJVgtsGgzUTS7bEIpwqxM8rHScCRDDxmPvT-1eQ1WolPnefk6qzK_JkEubtDrz_ZB7qE_UOkwc6U54YdYWZLejY9__SlQGIgQj2noxZOAxS-7w6gM28sZegb9OZVTt907O715HMDqJ22A_wzCg%3D%3D "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win! ")**

Here are just a couple meaningful ways your contribution has helped our team:

**-> TRAVELING:** From day one, I've prioritized meeting with voters, shaking every hand, and amplifying my message everywhere I can. In order to do that, my team and I are flying all over the country, and we're doing it while spending money wisely.

I can tell you firsthand, we're not out here lighting money on fire with private planes and extravagant luxury hotels like some campaigns. We're flying a lot of Spirit and JetBlue. We're getting to New Hampshire, Iowa, and everywhere else we need to go with the most affordable options we can find.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=271384018f174e2db91199d2b5570710&_e=q2__LhwimW-V8ZOWYNFcuKNXT0FikvkT3_5Jf6pytIclpjj9FtEiR9k0FzR2kFK-FX6ziosz_u3N01ucfAaX_C7cd9SZYzY_jmHRSyOrtYtfI4vRQgouz5QEcjjXdMno60fLFpHmYky9iNyg4BAA958xxzIwlDP9hLtE475is5wmdnXXgyzXch-ef20bxIQbRHCUjqA1zOsvGITVFiG5MOO_uqDvUcH1iEnTX-JYnt3nH_vI4ZaZ10iUTHHSUUFxdK_JIZ--PTxHLdeR6MRSOfXvddso1nKgA4oxcdiUXGxtfX3V13dPJPy8-xblmoQwHmE6LWg5zlezIvrOyiWjMu3WTmc3iCYXENC8qOgYK9tZ3MWBH3iFqlX7dPesK-NlYbt9RZxa3EgB_5u3dV8p6_QW2-eNjww2GfNXTbAtNFTUW3kuLM6_qIP7Lvhyg0QKetMyJOTpf9I5JrEw2Fy9yzCqeB9eW7eXrOsEa4U9qMGQmP-zFDL2q4KXs3poVoilu2h52NLNdxQrHfLrTZLJpoTyojVTTpBxkiqjfuaBZ2BE2gSlD5mH3mzOqT9a1h5Qwp0mMCTQRz44Am-TW9E90hWrkTrJz0PghkqHBS4ZpAM1HpS06JCCJIT9LG7Wx-W5)
---

**-> EVENTS:** We're running a true grassroots campaign, and that means being on the ground, holding as many grassroots events as possible. Every time we hold a town hall in Iowa, South Carolina, or New Hampshire, it's an opportunity to share my vision, answer questions, and gain the confidence of voters.

But what you may not realize is that all of the costs can quickly add up to rent the event space, chairs, and sound equipment. In order to spend your money wisely, we're holding these events at places like bakeries, local venues, and farms.

---

At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day and spending every dollar wisely. But all of this still costs money, which is why we need your help.

Once the first-in-the-nation caucus is here, it's only a matter of time before the rest of the country begins to cast their ballots.

It's a marathon and we've got to stay on pace to win each and every day. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=271384018f174e2db91199d2b5570710&_e=q2__LhwimW-V8ZOWYNFcuKNXT0FikvkT3_5Jf6pytIclpjj9FtEiR9k0FzR2kFK-FX6ziosz_u3N01ucfAaX_C7cd9SZYzY_jmHRSyOrtYtfI4vRQgouz5QEcjjXdMno60fLFpHmYky9iNyg4BAA958xxzIwlDP9hLtE475is5wmdnXXgyzXch-ef20bxIQbRHCUjqA1zOsvGITVFiG5MOO_uqDvUcH1iEnTX-JYnt3nH_vI4ZaZ10iUTHHSUUFxdK_JIZ--PTxHLdeR6MRSOfXvddso1nKgA4oxcdiUXGxtfX3V13dPJPy8-xblmoQwHmE6LWg5zlezIvrOyiWjMu3WTmc3iCYXENC8qOgYK9tZ3MWBH3iFqlX7dPesK-NlYbt9RZxa3EgB_5u3dV8p6_QW2-eNjww2GfNXTbAtNFTUW3kuLM6_qIP7Lvhyg0QKetMyJOTpf9I5JrEw2Fy9yzCqeB9eW7eXrOsEa4U9qMG7q_ItXfyVVQQXSHZpjZJ5TWNoVHRF9i3BKP3NSR6gVzZB3S_TYKnt9iZbiWsNS-oLYjb_6u2CKmA6-Dauj0h7qi4hTR8uNSy3R4FnIKnXpXIMhiNDZ7T5fqpIgO7kiwJd6YSs5JzQfD5jGQ3szDhL "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!")**

**It 's crunch time, Friend!** There's no room for holding back. With just **88 days** left until voting begins every single day matters which is why I appreciate your generous support today when it matters most.
---

My very best,

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.
**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=271384018f174e2db91199d2b5570710&_e=q2__LhwimW-V8ZOWYNFcuKNXT0FikvkT3_5Jf6pytIclpjj9FtEiR9k0FzR2kFK-Jqc1yShfw8g1T4Q9qA1GogL1FZglsWp7Z3FFHz7bKwi8Mn_ncVz1sDSRy-IXUYe_qxi2bv0-09WuXDqyVP9s22LVOZp0Py-kzTK_U4xK0_pp9k_P_XuQA1UlTO8h_2Iq4Y_6l_6k9xgclM3F5mOi4arCFsBy9PEDPqt0d01C9moMiPmdilmEHiDZUJTObMODdolcDq9SQBfK-S-MQS6uBmZsXT03Qp0hPtQvv2ajeVybkvAXt7TnkBqjR5uwSZZN8hQJTrSGh1nF7m2ACVQlc6_GH-e3hUhzt-SOh0jvmWfKkOlomvIqXG2QABZN5Yt93ZLbeFkQ1jakIqCRlAXT03nU_GAvJwu-3y47E8glIsx_IawLIBvOj17kiIn8LuEXOfqmBnggP4vDp4SefAxQo2VIFplyg_hxR2NdcfIBmMbaYrUe3Og8boQVv0knOknRa7_rpkFOZC1UBYq8Lr3SPg04ydvmyK-zE5IPZSIplqmJObp1HMqncLNxnmX0VXJEuzlMidZxmmjr98VOYYxqkvd3UVxz-NlNM7PPkYAEzQrANyLRMc8S3XaUOqwJ420JI_uLz4f8ikSVxE1A5xj8oA%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. | | | | | | I am a mom and an accountant, Friend, which means I know how to stretch a dollar. That's why, on day one, I made sure our team knew that the success of our movement relies on grassroots supporters like YOU. With that, comes a responsibility to make every dollar count and spend your donations wisely. Unlike other campaigns that are burning through money on private planes, fancy dinners, and country clubs, we are a lean and mean operation. We stretch every dollar as far as it can go and know it's important to spend our money when it counts. But even covering basic expenses to host town halls and travel to battleground states to meet with voters adds up. "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win! " Here are just a couple meaningful ways your contribution has helped our team: -> TRAVELING: From day one, I've prioritized meeting with voters, shaking every hand, and amplifying my message everywhere I can. In order to do that, my team and I are flying all over the country, and we're doing it while spending money wisely. I can tell you firsthand, we're not out here lighting money on fire with private planes and extravagant luxury hotels like some campaigns. We're flying a lot of Spirit and JetBlue. We're getting to New Hampshire, Iowa, and everywhere else we need to go with the most affordable options we can find. | -> EVENTS: We're running a true grassroots campaign, and that means being on the ground, holding as many grassroots events as possible. Every time we hold a town hall in Iowa, South Carolina, or New Hampshire, it's an opportunity to share my vision, answer questions, and gain the confidence of voters. But what you may not realize is that all of the costs can quickly add up to rent the event space, chairs, and sound equipment. In order to spend your money wisely, we're holding these events at places like bakeries, local venues, and farms. | | | | | | At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day and spending every dollar wisely. But all of this still costs money, which is why we need your help. Once the first-in-the-nation caucus is here, it's only a matter of time before the rest of the country begins to cast their ballots. It's a marathon and we've got to stay on pace to win each and every day. "That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $20.24 today to help fund my grassroots efforts so we can get my message out and win!" | | It 's crunch time, Friend! There's no room for holding back. With just 88 days left until voting begins every single day matters which is why I appreciate your generous support today when it matters most. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Sponsor meals for our WWII heroes
body:
I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent.

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqoa88effrdh5029fqklnr5ocrbrtjuacme6r50g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ie2o72c9h2bs)
---
Fellow American, I wouldn't ask for your help if it weren't urgent. **This year, the American Veterans Center is expecting our BIGGEST gathering of World War II heroes for our Annual Veterans Conference in nearly 20 years.** And while the budget for this year's Annual Veterans Conference has already been spent, the American Veterans Center team is _still_ hearing from World War II veterans who would like to attend. The **Gary Sinise Foundation** is generously providing lodging ... **American Airlines** is providing flights ... and I hope that you, Fellow American, would consider helping to cover lunch and dinner for our World War II heroes during this year's Veterans' Conference.
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbgb61jjd7mdhq1ii82i1gsp0rs1m80kghsl33d0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ie2o72c9h2bs)
---
**[Can I count on your urgent gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or more before Wednesday, October 25 to help cover the meals for our World War II heroes at this year's Conference?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrflmgh9hlhk23rcbr0660esoe7nnhvccitq1n60_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ie2o72c9h2bs)** On average, it costs $100 for each day of meals we provide to a World War II veteran. To make sure we can cover all the meals for the veterans we expect, I'm urgently raising $3,000 before Wednesday, October 25.
---
[Give $25 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Breakfast](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z84ferb1htm14ns1qu772dg5qfp9l4pj5rrdlpc0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ie2o72c9h2bs)
---
[Give $50 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Dinner ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0oju47mstvkhjuneq0d007psromuift8fl4pm70_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ie2o72c9h2bs)
---
[Give $100 -- Cover 1 Veteran's Day](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfen6n57tbp88tsfrfk0inf12ah3fctlc59hqvv8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ie2o72c9h2bs)
---
[Give ANY amount to help](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zifvm31kqsol2dcqiv0vlakl4ak4ffbc5mqi3j90_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ie2o72c9h2bs)
---
Every year, generous and patriotic Americans like YOU help the American Veterans Center honor our nation's heroes, from World War II to today, at the Annual Veterans Conference. At this special, one-of-a-kind event, veterans have the opportunity to share their stories with young people and military cadets in attendance. They can reconnect with their brothers- and sisters-in-arms. And, just as important, they can know that their stories are professionally recorded and preserved by AVC, so their legacy is passed on to the next generation.
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuie2mj2p7i428getsv3ag5osiim6370cesjvlf0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ie2o72c9h2bs)
---
The AVC Annual Veterans Conference is a monumental occasion for veterans of every generation. _But it's particularly moving for our World War II heroes, who will see firsthand how their service and sacrifices are still being honored, 80 years later._ **[Before Wednesday, October 25, the American Veterans Center is urgently raising $3,000 to provide all the meals to our World War II heroes at this year's Conference. If these WWII veterans can count on your support, please make your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeni46j34rvosiges194ntpgr1kgdld9sfr6gv2o_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ie2o72c9h2bs)**
---
[Support a WWII hero at AVC's Annual Veterans Conference](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2l3o9lskfjnpbqqqpc0p60o6drg2eon145svelo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ie2o72c9h2bs)
---
Your generosity today will ensure the Greatest Generation's legacy lives on, making their bravery immortal and safeguarding the firsthand accounts of their valor and service for generations to come. **[Please -- if you'd like to help support a WWII hero at this year's Conference -- make your most generous gift right now.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuuaas9j1mh9l03tmsn6k2t7me977h616089uve0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ie2o72c9h2bs)** Thank you for your support and thank you for playing a critical role in honoring our World War II heroes at this year's Conference. Tim HolbertPresidentAmerican Veterans Center P.S. Your contribution to this special mission doesn't just make a difference -- it makes history. Let's ensure every World War II veteran who wishes to attend this year's Annual Veterans Conference can have all their costs fully covered! **[Please make your most generous gift today.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhrvnqdnuug4fadjs8p9ms7al9vtu29femftd348_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ie2o72c9h2bs)**
---
[Support a WWII hero at AVC's Annual Veterans Conference](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdh1n2racfb44lshls5f2r2vl9tonkkjh9rv502o_rp22sh2s8i66p70s1ie2o72c9h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

subject: The GOP’s games are harming the republic
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Marcy isn't mincing words

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72049964/434116919/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=231023_team_politico&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWI3YmE5NS1jNjcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ImTbvSt5O3qHslXXlQWlapHerfUE8K6TgUSDsvUvGY=)
---
Hi team, Did you see POLITICO's coverage of what Marcy said about the Speaker's saga? She said that Jim Jordan is "harming the republic." **That's 100% right. ** 20 days after Kevin McCarthy was ousted as Speaker by his own members, the House is still without a Speaker. This is holding up important legislation such as aid for Israel and Ukraine, as well as the basic Appropriations bills that fund our government - in other words, the work that Americans want Washington to accomplish. In less than a month, the government is at risk of shutting down (again) due to the House being paralyzed and held hostage by extreme MAGA Republicans. Jim Jordan and his enablers don’t care to do the work, and America suffers for it. **[Marcy is a champion for the people of Northwest Ohio and she'll never put politics ahead of country and community. But the reality is that Republicans have a target on her seat and are planning to spend millions to defeat her. By chipping in whatever you can, you're helping us fight clean_body: Marcy isn't mincing words | | = Hi team, Did you see POLITICO's coverage of what Marcy said about the Speaker's saga? She said that Jim Jordan is "harming the republic." That's 100% right. 20 days after Kevin McCarthy was ousted as Speaker by his own members, the House is still without a Speaker. This is holding up important legislation such as aid for Israel and Ukraine, as well as the basic Appropriations bills that fund our government - in other words, the work that Americans want Washington to accomplish. In less than a month, the government is at risk of shutting down (again) due to the House being paralyzed and held hostage by extreme MAGA Republicans. Jim Jordan and his enablers don’t care to do the work, and America suffers for it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thanks for standing with Marcy — together, we will defeat the chaos that has subsumed Washington. \- Team Kaptur | Marcy Kaptur is the longest-serving woman in Congress. name: Scalise, Steve
subject: Sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY.

| |

---
| | | Friend -

Democrats are racing to undermine election integrity ahead of the most important election of our lifetimes.
- **FIRST:** Deep-blue cities like New York and DC made it LEGAL for non-U.S. citizens to vote in local elections.

- **THEN:** Joe Biden SUED red states for enforcing voter identification laws.

- **NOW:** Democrats are filing LEGAL ACTION to gut strong election integrity measures in the swing state of North Carolina.
_If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections ... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY._

This month, far-right Republicans plunged the House into chaos, grinding much of our Congressional work to a standstill. **That’s just not something you do if you truly understand how Congress’s actions impact real people’s lives.**
It’s not something you’d do if you understood, like me, what it’s like to work a register and wait tables to get through school.
_And it’s not something you’d do if you truly understood the struggle of everyday Americans who live paycheck to paycheck._
Coloradans don’t want a Congress that puts blind partisanship over the needs of working families — that’s why I’ve always been willing to work across the aisle to find bipartisan solutions that make a positive impact on CO-07 families.
But right now, far too many people’s needs are being overlooked by the far-right majority in the House — that’s why I wanted to ask:
[_**Will you chip in $10 to help me continue serving our communities in Washington? If we want to flip the House blue and deliver real progress across the country,_we can’t allow this critically important seat to flip red._**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72052321/434119187/-173908739?refcode=email_102323_Stories-like-mine&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmQ5ODEwNi1jODcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zCmffR6tva8O-p02yW16Omls69G7smHZU0MyJDyQjpY=)

name: Doug White
subject: RAU says Newhouse voting for chaos
body:
Central Washington's largest pro-Democrat action ever!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/95OjTY6F3/c?w=_jY5DgMhbTHS37OvwCvO4rBqUYmHVkyjn6yFZ7Bm63k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvLzk1T2pUWTZGMz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**

| | |
---
| |

| |
---
| | THIS WEEK RURAL AMERICA AMERICANS UNITED kicked off its first media campaign, to formally introduce ourselves to the people of Washington State. The campaign is the first step in our [innovative plan](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/95OjTY6F3/c?w=DrB0gHcbVYjminn8dqguwMQ4ggb8l-uCIXfOCOrhC2Y.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9kcml2ZS5nb29nbGUuY29tL2ZpbGUvZC8xeUtEd1p2TzJyRFhTdDQ4WTNES3dzY3k1a3V1VHc3cVgvdmlldz91c3A9ZHJpdmVfbGluayIsInIiOiI1YTgwYWU2Ny05OTE0LTQzZDQtOWQxNi1lNGQzMDU5N2Q4MjIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ) to turn the center of the state purple. Starting this week with a $350,000, 14-month media blitz, RAU will blanket the 4th District with 20,000 separate radio spots highlighting traditional Democratic Party values. The radio ads, in English and Spanish, are believed to be the largest public awareness campaign ever launched in the state. At this time, with right-wing messaging dominating public discourse, we estimate that 80 percent of the Central Washington population has never heard a positive Democratic message. We know it’s going to be a marathon, but this campaign will begin to change that. Along with advertisements, we have started a program of outreach to local newspapers, TV and radio stations, podcasts and blogs, beginning with our first news release, which you can read [here](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/95OjTY6F3/c?w=EcOktuLpF9YKkmZSFSSm_O29Pc8AKb-n8z4l3IMMMVU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9kcml2ZS5nb29nbGUuY29tL2ZpbGUvZC8xZEw2T2pycDRXMDFTS2ZxY2ZYTFg0VFBtT1E2N1N5RTIvdmlldz91c3A9c2hhcmluZyIsInIiOiI1YTgwYWU2Ny05OTE0LTQzZDQtOWQxNi1lNGQzMDU5N2Q4MjIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ). We will be following up on the release with personal visits to newsrooms around the district, to introduce ourselves and our program to journalists who for years have been spoon-fed Republican propaganda. Just as we were finalizing the news release, the 4th District’s venal Congressman Dan Newhouse blessed us with a perfect example of why Central Washington is so sorely in need of organizations like RAU, which can provide residents with what may be their first exposure to core Democratic values. Newhouse, who clearly doesn’t believe himself in any way accountable to his electorate, voted several times to choose bullying, election-denying Jim Jordan to be Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives — an office that is next in line to the presidency in the event the president and vice president are sidelined. (Fortunately for all of us, Jordan lost.) Jordan, as you know, is a far-right extremist who has been accused of [ignoring hundreds of sexual abuse claims](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/95OjTY6F3/c?w=YuaF_764WfZ4LStWt2ODfRTYGQoiVv3JqQN9-X08aR8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlZGFpbHliZWFzdC5jb20vZXgtb3N1LXdyZXN0bGVyLWFkYW0tZGlzYWJhdG8tc2F5cy1qaW0tam9yZGFuLWNhbGxlZC1jcnlpbmctYmVnZ2luZy10by1kZW55LWFidXNlLWNsYWltcyIsInIiOiI1YTgwYWU2Ny05OTE0LTQzZDQtOWQxNi1lNGQzMDU5N2Q4MjIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ) against Ohio State University team trainer Richard Strauss when Jordan was an assistant wrestling coach at the school. He was also among the leaders of the failed fascist Republican plot to overturn the results of the 2020 election. Let’s watch and see if he gets indicted. That Newhouse could vote for such a despicable human as Jordan to serve as the third-highest elected official in the land says a lot about Newhouse’s values — or lack thereof. A simple question we’d like to hear Newhouse answer: Is Jim Jordan the kind of man the people of your district should have as a role model for their children? In other RAU news ...
Listen for the pro-Democratic messages on these stations

| | Thank you Yakima Herald Republic for putting a spotlight on the exact issues that RAU will be working to combat. The Herald wrote: "School board members, for instance, aren’t supposed to be carrying out political initiatives — they’re supposed to be laser-focused on one thing: educating students. A fire commissioner’s guiding principle should be protecting district patrons’ safety and property, not advancing a social agenda. It’s basic civics. But apparently somebody needs to review all that down at the [Yakima County Republicans](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/95OjTY6F3/c?w=h74xyazpSZlGsh-u0kyN1g3X56dyW1AwnImoBD1dDbo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly95YWtpbWFjb3VudHlyZXB1YmxpY2Fucy5jb20vP3Y9NzUxNmZkNDNhZGFhIiwiciI6IjQzYTBmMDNiLTcyMmYtNDFlNi05OGM2LTA3YTZhYzAxMDIxNyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9) office, which seems to have a coordinated strategy for seizing control of as many local boards as possible." To read the full editorial click [here](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/95OjTY6F3/c?w=KCO8M9iT7u9nNTOksB78Dm7kJqCBhptcsJ2F5h4kses.)[.](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/95OjTY6F3/c?w=KCO8M9iT7u9nNTOksB78Dm7kJqCBhptcsJ2F5h4kses.)

| | Big news for Central Washington Democrats as Robin "Biden" Hood saves the day!
---
| | There were two big announcements last week greatly impacting Central Washington. The first [announcement](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/95OjTY6F3/c?w=3BDPvUnDN05qKE7U8UJsuMakS-QRMKnSKNqToBy4Ccc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlc3RhbmQub3JnLzIwMjMvMTAvdGhpcy1pcy1hLWJpZy1kZWFsLXBhY2lmaWMtbnctd2lucy1oeWRyb2dlbi1odWItZnVuZGluZyIsInIiOiI3MDA0M2M1Yi0wZDVlLTRjZTQtYTQ4ZS1kOGViMzQxY2NhYmUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ) was that PNW Unions working with Democrats have $1Billion for a hydrogen production plant to be built in Douglas County. It will be one of seven built around the country. This is another peg in the ground for Central Washington as we continue to lead the nation in renewable energy: Solar, Wind, Hydro, Hydrogen, Storage. Rep. Dan Newhouse's repeated attempts to "cancel" our sustainable energy industry have failed miserably. The second announcement is really just another announcement of additional money being spent on rural America, from Broadband to Small Farmers. As the money continues to roll in, it becomes increasingly important to have our elected officials fighting for our share. Unfortunately, the Republicans must, by party mandate, vote against any spending bills. They can only take credit for money coming into their districts after Democrats have fought hard to get it.

| | 2023 Central Washington Candidates (updated)

clean_body: Central Washington's largest pro-Democrat action ever! | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | | | THIS WEEK RURAL AMERICA AMERICANS UNITED kicked off its first media campaign, to formally introduce ourselves to the people of Washington State. The campaign is the first step in our to turn the center of the state purple. Starting this week with a $350,000, 14-month media blitz, RAU will blanket the 4th District with 20,000 separate radio spots highlighting traditional Democratic Party values. The radio ads, in English and Spanish, are believed to be the largest public awareness campaign ever launched in the state. At this time, with right-wing messaging dominating public discourse, we estimate that 80 percent of the Central Washington population has never heard a positive Democratic message. We know it’s going to be a marathon, but this campaign will begin to change that. Along with advertisements, we have started a program of outreach to local newspapers, TV and radio stations, podcasts and blogs, beginning with our first news release, which you can read . We will be following up on the release with personal visits to newsrooms around the district, to introduce ourselves and our program to journalists who for years have been spoon-fed Republican propaganda. Just as we were finalizing the news release, the 4th District’s venal Congressman Dan Newhouse blessed us with a perfect example of why Central Washington is so sorely in need of organizations like RAU, which can provide residents with what may be their first exposure to core Democratic values. Newhouse, who clearly doesn’t believe himself in any way accountable to his electorate, voted several times to choose bullying, election-denying Jim Jordan to be Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives — an office that is next in line to the presidency in the event the president and vice president are sidelined. (Fortunately for all of us, Jordan lost.) Jordan, as you know, is a far-right extremist who has been accused of against Ohio State University team trainer Richard Strauss when Jordan was an assistant wrestling coach at the school. He was also among the leaders of the failed fascist Republican plot to overturn the results of the 2020 election. Let’s watch and see if he gets indicted. That Newhouse could vote for such a despicable human as Jordan to serve as the third-highest elected official in the land says a lot about Newhouse’s values — or lack thereof. A simple question we’d like to hear Newhouse answer: Is Jim Jordan the kind of man the people of your district should have as a role model for their children? In other RAU news ... Listen for the pro-Democratic messages on these stations | | | | | | | | | Thank you Yakima Herald Republic for putting a spotlight on the exact issues that RAU will be working to combat. The Herald wrote: "School board members, for instance, aren’t supposed to be carrying out political initiatives — they’re supposed to be laser-focused on one thing: educating students. A fire commissioner’s guiding principle should be protecting district patrons’ safety and property, not advancing a social agenda. It’s basic civics. But apparently somebody needs to review all that down at the office, which seems to have a coordinated strategy for seizing control of as many local boards as possible." To read the full editorial click | | | | | | | Get involved! | | There are so many ways to get involved beyond donations. Here are a few: Yakima City #5 Sign waving and canvassing Sunday October 22nd 12 - 6 meeting at 40th and Summitview Klickitat Democrats canvassing Sunday Oct 20th in White Salmon. Contact (360) 607-3679 demsklick@gmail.com Irving Brown Pasco City Council has a sign up sheet for NCW Democrats (Douglas County) Post card writing. Please check out their for details. Yakima County Democrats are canvassing and phonebanking. The sign up schedule is Sunnyside Candidates schedule | | | | | | | | | Big news for Central Washington Democrats as Robin "Biden" Hood saves the day! | | There were two big announcements last week greatly impacting Central Washington. The first was that PNW Unions working with Democrats have $1Billion for a hydrogen production plant to be built in Douglas County. It will be one of seven built around the country. This is another peg in the ground for Central Washington as we continue to lead the nation in renewable energy: Solar, Wind, Hydro, Hydrogen, Storage. Rep. Dan Newhouse's repeated attempts to "cancel" our sustainable energy industry have failed miserably. The second announcement is really just another announcement of additional money being spent on rural America, from Broadband to Small Farmers. As the money continues to roll in, it becomes increasingly important to have our elected officials fighting for our share. Unfortunately, the Republicans must, by party mandate, vote against any spending bills. They can only take credit for money coming into their districts after Democrats have fought hard to get it. | | | | | 2023 Central Washington Candidates (updated) | | Rural Americans United offered to publish candidate information provided by the local Democratic parties. October 23rd, 2023 Bringing _you_ the latest news, updates and what you _need to know_ about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio **Happy Monday!**
---
|
---
# Four Things to Know This Week:
---
1. As LaRose stumbles and Moreno’s donor support declines, Dolan continues to expand his
cash on hand lead in the primary.

2. Dolan rallies with state GOP leaders in opposition to Issue 1.

3. Dolan takes a strong stand in support of Israel.

4. Matt Dolan is the Republican best positioned to defeat Sherrod Brown in 2024.

---
