As LaRose stumbles and Moreno’s donor support declines, Matt Dolan continues to expand his cash on hand lead in the GOP primary.
* Matt Dolan [maintained his strong fundraising momentum](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=801a137f0442425a9f49699f5c00a003&_e=7Zh8C4pMkl2v8BoGNANFkLSCyE70LX_hJrDagOn-_W9k7ANgGatHoaIQProVFYPVvltbbiCKLN6Mr3TW1oZvSyzMgHPLBecH0O1NmBif2ZKIayPrQMQoMJAAHqaunr98qkTOJPCDaXDYY53VXHRdNbSHAABEgQMnKID25MzBMnveC4d5J6LStzqUyP_pdRgrWuSLdID-lf1xhTypBSdxRHXBo8Z7UymYMr9R0EKSi06q6Krb8o_q8oEISrWDAQmu7vgD0yGdasRsB7lwS3a4OhZnAlkwz0hFUhHECYd4EasDp0jrcOj0nrSSGxNevTRPv7r9sx3iyuGSOJSQNriP9eMuhBcJjWRM776juahJQPFD_3xJAj4RmBn_hx6w4EZp-6C2DWo7FlaMs3PgfVF9LbqvKTm1OH1y-gy--FJu-XmrfTUGZh5UXYTRcpIXNnAe-t48XujayfqzxjRSrw135qahOGkwfrPNquehaMrRbWY%3D) in the 2024 Republican Primary race in the most recent filing period, leading his next closest opponent by $1.7 million in cash on hand and $2.2 million in primary money.

* LaRose’s significant fundraising struggles earned [state and national headlines](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=801a137f0442425a9f49699f5c00a003&_e=7Zh8C4pMkl2v8BoGNANFkLSCyE70LX_hJrDagOn-_W9k7ANgGatHoaIQProVFYPVIJaodiWrtlr88DhncUkC-qEx_gp_daxujheWhh4nMhxWON003ZMe7urLcqg7MHfbIUz0sCYQXitz27adB0y49hxcEf1mAqftKYlmorn1e4St1HE8JNCt_MJ9e1LK8C_Jo_JMcDH7_anokFW0hscQ4pqeVDKwD6-8zNTy3CbuMu0ls2qfUGV7YDoAATODaGyvaM-_CeCxbPXZEyJ-qOOG4TEnvsBW92JO9kwHaLjpXQQTDcux670mNm25ICy8ZaekXzuQYgOHrlntj3m3161A2GCOOOL2bi0xzqFAgyDOtuUfP_fEoy43cYawT7rXJ4GKdV6zBnDIYWiT51mtbdvxaOKyNCAT1t9L8s8Db5Rn4HqFkA3PgDFstI5lGwVW1IOeKqyla27BVEDCtWbOdkdP3c8w_2STTGGjtsZZWW8fmKM%3D) questioning his ability to run a well-resourced campaign.[](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=801a137f0442425a9f49699f5c00a003&_e=7Zh8C4pMkl2v8BoGNANFkIomA5zt9LtZuugR8NNKuX2XT7V_p70mr93xGl5UDbKidZtLqfgmnUHstzCvPUpPAx0xE_Yq4ewOFMpTn34W89gkacH-sndKaNOHyWbIFdEKhVRAy6lQk9M4a0aNsRP5YmtjzGhcxG-EoKWOtT9HgYY3kQAw4vdvNSLXIfA3oYPKj8DI8NpTPNgogQELzipkPw%3D%3D)

**
Matt Dolan rallies with state GOP leaders in opposition to Issue 1.
**
* The Dolan campaign recently took part in the March for Life in Columbus.

* Matt joined Governor DeWine, Ohio Republican Party Chairman Alex Triantifilou and other state GOP leaders at a rally to urge all Ohioans to vote early and VOTE NO on Issue 1.

* Matt has worked to advance pro-life legislation during his time in Columbus, co-sponsoring and voting for more than a dozen pro-life bills. The abortion rate in Ohio has declined by 37 percent since Matt was first elected to the state legislature.

* “Issue 1 would codify late-term abortion and even partial-birth abortion into state law,” Dolan said. “It simply goes too far. It’s too extreme for Ohio. I urge all Ohioans to VOTE NO on Issue 1.”

Matt Dolan takes a strong stand in support of Israel.
* During the Medina GOP Candidate Forum, Bernie Moreno said that “Israel doesn’t need America’s help to defeat Hamas.” Moreno also said America should not provide any further funding or aid support to Israel.

* Matt Dolan vehemently disagreed with this far-left perspective that would signal retreat in support of our strongest ally in the Middle East. Dolan said, “America must have Israel’s back with weapons, aid and humanitarian assistance to defeat Hamas and Iran’s terrorist proxies.”

---
| | |
---
Matt Dolan is the Republican best positioned to defeat Sherrod Brown in 2024.
* In a head-to-head matchup, Matt Dolan is leading Sherrod Brown 38% - 36%, according to an [Emerson College poll](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=801a137f0442425a9f49699f5c00a003&_e=7Zh8C4pMkl2v8BoGNANFkLSCyE70LX_hJrDagOn-_W9k7ANgGatHoaIQProVFYPVe_nUF6qVgHZj8XWN7TtUBgP7oIPsLzK_ilnPNnsO5BsiwywPNb4YAQfnDq5J_2gXZseSAyUi_356k1p8aHcwZsbRjejQ3vNvy-53oFK6uq9DYiANl1eVbt5p8IPYMVhc1MxRaFxtEba6T8dK6CgwPpYHkvIEsYqap5V9hzgL0Xe-Yt5VyOKI8DBF7gmkdqTGzX-zImJZlBKt5S1YUwCQLLvJuTb8aoSo7ApTLvVLDBkdMFFrqjWZSsd2fHA_cyeizBmILHXqxygFmg3Zc4Wvwhemb7tSb9awfo0RUZeroM3wxTE3HWpA9HvOXvrLTp9FBCuLYgl869xypauFomDz4JocKVeQ-IBdQNfXwTuvCjsJ7Q0DEkAYCqQvo6ql4a4VYudMAEF0rDq-c5XdREQIFmYApORvYcIBUwG-Ya8e4jk%3D) released October 10.

* Dolan’s two-point lead over Brown is the largest among any candidate running in the Republican primary field.

* As [The Hill reported,](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=801a137f0442425a9f49699f5c00a003&_e=7Zh8C4pMkl2v8BoGNANFkGt5Wd29VqbKGL0TsMjhTnH67XO8RHgg_zXyGGFSTiEg1OiaHnIvvXeYWZKaE7Ap2MBJmfmMilVhqrCp20x4pzw4Dj4eWc9F9T9EhXUussZHq_ADckrmwfUkJ_cMXFpjqSdLxgrepXQb8UOP2B9F7qnVlyZSkTZyHwI3xomjj7JVyIujl_Jzcskq7YX91yHw9TsokyLGPWk6a9bL-Bgaamgq-2spjWCmU3f-YUWpoZQkKHB2wv4A422rmeOX1qpDT1rwrMenVef6zP86x6Ztwq8%3D) the Ohio US Senate race will be one of the most important races in 2024 for determining which party controls the Senate, further highlighting the critical importance of Republican voters nominating a candidate best suited to beat Brown.

clean_body: | | | October 23rd, 2023 Bringing you the latest news, updates and what you need to know about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio Happy Monday! | Four Things to Know This Week: 1. As LaRose stumbles and Moreno’s donor support declines, Dolan continues to expand his cash on hand lead in the primary. 2. Dolan rallies with state GOP leaders in opposition to Issue 1. 3. Dolan takes a strong stand in support of Israel. 4. Matt Dolan is the Republican best positioned to defeat Sherrod Brown in 2024. Get up to speed... | As LaRose stumbles and Moreno’s donor support declines, Matt Dolan continues to expand his cash on hand lead in the GOP primary. Matt Dolan in the 2024 Republican Primary race in the most recent filing period, leading his next closest opponent by $1.7 million in cash on hand and $2.2 million in primary money. LaRose’s significant fundraising struggles earned questioning his ability to run a well-resourced campaign. | | | | | - | Matt Dolan rallies with state GOP leaders in opposition to Issue 1. The Dolan campaign recently took part in the March for Life in Columbus. Matt joined Governor DeWine, Ohio Republican Party Chairman Alex Triantifilou and other state GOP leaders at a rally to urge all Ohioans to vote early and VOTE NO on Issue 1. Matt has worked to advance pro-life legislation during his time in Columbus, co-sponsoring and voting for more than a dozen pro-life bills. The abortion rate in Ohio has declined by 37 percent since Matt was first elected to the state legislature. “Issue 1 would codify late-term abortion and even partial-birth abortion into state law,” Dolan said. “It simply goes too far. It’s too extreme for Ohio. I urge all Ohioans to VOTE NO on Issue 1.” | | | | | | | Matt Dolan takes a strong stand in support of Israel. During the Medina GOP Candidate Forum, Bernie Moreno said that “Israel doesn’t need America’s help to defeat Hamas.” Moreno also said America should not provide any further funding or aid support to Israel. Matt Dolan vehemently disagreed with this far-left perspective that would signal retreat in support of our strongest ally in the Middle East. Dolan said, “America must have Israel’s back with weapons, aid and humanitarian assistance to defeat Hamas and Iran’s terrorist proxies.” | | | Matt Dolan is the Republican best positioned to defeat Sherrod Brown in 2024. In a head-to-head matchup, Matt Dolan is leading Sherrod Brown 38% - 36%, according to an released October 10. Dolan’s two-point lead over Brown is the largest among any candidate running in the Republican primary field. As the Ohio US Senate race will be one of the most important races in 2024 for determining which party controls the Senate, further highlighting the critical importance of Republican voters nominating a candidate best suited to beat Brown. Furthermore, in an editorial this week, Matt Dolan’s electability, praising him for being the only Republican candidate with realistic, policy-based solutions when it comes to securing America’s southern border. | | | | | | | From the Trail | | | As Bernie Moreno fails to gain traction in the polls and Frank LaRose’s fundraising and ethical woes continue to mount, Matt Dolan has emerged as the only candidate for U.S. Senate with the resources, infrastructure and statewide grassroots support to win the primary and defeat Sherrod Brown. | | | Interested in joining Team Dolan? Matt Dolan needs your help to bring our conservative voices to the U.S. Senate, consider contributing below to help us WIN in Ohio! | | | Forward this email to a friend! Peter, Tate Reeves loves to _run_ his mouth and tout his record as governor, but you know the old saying — actions speak louder than words: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72055098/434121723/-935144756?refcode=ea.e5ae83cb-c971-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.e5ae83cb-c971-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTVhZTgzY2ItYzk3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3IwhQZgCAhtGxt-sxxJGxV_XD0gintFY4h8c_PSZsQ8=) Tate doesn’t care about his constituents. I know it. You know it.

Whether it's splurging millions of your hard-earned taxpayer dollars on sprucing up the governor's mansion with fancy stuff like lemon trees, ice makers, and a meditation garden.

Or wasting tens of thousands of taxpayer dollars traveling the country to rub shoulders with special interests on our taxpayer-funded plane.

And let's not forget about his involvement in Mississippi's biggest corruption scandal, not to mention his family benefiting from taxpayer contracts during his tenure. **It's as clear as day — Tate's got to go.

clean_body: But Mississippi deserves to know the truth. | = Peter, Tate Reeves loves to run his mouth and tout his record as governor, but you know the old saying — actions speak louder than words: = Tate doesn’t care about his constituents. I know it. You know it. Whether it's splurging millions of your hard-earned taxpayer dollars on sprucing up the governor's mansion with fancy stuff like lemon trees, ice makers, and a meditation garden. Or wasting tens of thousands of taxpayer dollars traveling the country to rub shoulders with special interests on our taxpayer-funded plane. And let's not forget about his involvement in Mississippi's biggest corruption scandal, not to mention his family benefiting from taxpayer contracts during his tenure. It's as clear as day — Tate's got to go. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Biden Victory Fund does not accept contributions from corporations or their PACs, unions, federal contractors, national banks, those registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA, SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies, or foreign nationals.

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Ultra-rich Republican Sinema donors
body:
Sinema went to bat for rich Republicans | | | Peter – BIG RED FLAG **🚩 🚩 🚩** Sinema’s latest fundraising report shows **contributions from huge Republican mega donors 🚩** **Sinema took nearly $200,000 from GOP donors who support Republican candidates and causes,** and whose donor histories outline thousands given to a super PAC aligned with Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell. These ultra rich right wingers fund negative ads against Democrats – so it begs the question: why are they helping Kyrsten Sinema? Either these GOP donors like that Sinema obstructs Democrats, or they know that if she runs for re-election, it helps Kari Lake. A win-win for them, and a lose-lose for Arizonans. **_[HELP US FIGHT BACK. Running for Congress isn’t easy. I know, surprising, right? And when we face times like we’re experiencing right now with chaos and uncertainty both at home and around the world – it can feel overwhelming.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=a3dcad2f66174440a75ea5869f218e13&_e=BCRmy4mW86q4RfFN2SsP8WKOVJpf1IRDrKHJLcSkTEnsZIcc1fHqUjGBxAU0SbExyHwruh8jsGz742QFIkGoKCg-jO81l8zl6LNijEljAe5qXoWACnoS_AhUZ1QKjQXuPXtqhLT3eQSQETeePIkdF_dYLldVHTcYsPVNRNQeFjAK0boeny8jqDSdkWWKIdk8EWpk8SrqWbiUqMRF--qg_G7dMcQ1_zoQMLf_GSDl73QiN6GYsbBYB2KM0gC9ZPUPO9Bmmk37_cr9PhheagNe357WjTxzD0KuL9KSvSRoILxCUNI2jTHE63LYwxxqavCDcJOjPcxCpnr772q4MP2KkOHyg2j87GcnDc5f6WD2WxHCELHAEJ86d7u92BJSmTCeJuIMXLFn7CYq_yuWcSOWdg%3D%3D) Hey folks, Running for Congress isn’t easy. I know, surprising, right? And when we face times like we’re experiencing right now with chaos and uncertainty both at home and around the world – _it can feel overwhelming._ I know I’ve been feeling the weight of everything, and I’m sure you have as well. I find that the best remedy for times like this is a nice stroll through the district with my amazing family. **They’re the ones I do this for, after all.** [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=a3dcad2f66174440a75ea5869f218e13&_e=BCRmy4mW86q4RfFN2SsP8WKOVJpf1IRDrKHJLcSkTEnsZIcc1fHqUjGBxAU0SbExyHwruh8jsGz742QFIkGoKCg-jO81l8zl6LNijEljAe5qXoWACnoS_AhUZ1QKjQXuPXtqhLT3eQSQETeePIkdF_dYLldVHTcYsPVNRNQeFjAK0boeny8jqDSdkWWKIdk8EWpk8SrqWbiUqMRF--qg_G7dMcQ1_zoQMLf_GSDl73QiN6GYsbBYB2KM0gC9ZPUPFsJFjSNyAnPsN88bQrNYCBukUx77i4SmuULlDUqdZvmtt2oD-b5nlJopBw206Edi1ONhs6l-k6W6OZ9zW9mjTtPac-ByqOGNfvXu2ktBUSzcY2ckqc5TZPH7uWNdeWrAEKYc95Idovj9N-EHp5k4wA%3D%3D) Things seem scary, but when I look at my wife and at my kids’ faces, I’m reminded of the beauty that exists in the world and the promise of a better future. But we have to work for that better future – and that’s exactly what I’m trying to do. **[Will you join me by pitching in a donation to my campaign today?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=a3dcad2f66174440a75ea5869f218e13&_e=BCRmy4mW86q4RfFN2SsP8WKOVJpf1IRDrKHJLcSkTEnsZIcc1fHqUjGBxAU0SbExyHwruh8jsGz742QFIkGoKCg-jO81l8zl6LNijEljAe5qXoWACnoS_AhUZ1QKjQXuPXtqhLT3eQSQETeePIkdF_dYLldVHTcYsPVNRNQeFjAK0boeny8jqDSdkWWKIdk8EWpk8SrqWbiUqMRF--qg_G7dMcQ1_zoQMLf_GSDl73QiN6GYsbBYB2KM0gC9ZPUPBsb-h-qpDK4QeJxtMyq3a71IcE9dJ0DlmeLX0F5vn-N32Nep0cVctXUs-ddYW0eQlFpGyxQi_C1jGtznEQtGqvgB2Pft8xeimzD70pt4yaWEvpolIu-wvU_z-2mCzIDRxsxXcMDrqjjRblKG8u6TqA%3D%3D)** Taking in the sights of our beautiful state and district has always calmed me and reminded me why I show up every day for my family each day. I mean, seriously, how can you not love Colorado? [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=a3dcad2f66174440a75ea5869f218e13&_e=BCRmy4mW86q4RfFN2SsP8WKOVJpf1IRDrKHJLcSkTEnsZIcc1fHqUjGBxAU0SbExyHwruh8jsGz742QFIkGoKCg-jO81l8zl6LNijEljAe5qXoWACnoS_AhUZ1QKjQXuPXtqhLT3eQSQETeePIkdF_dYLldVHTcYsPVNRNQeFjAK0boeny8jqDSdkWWKIdk8EWpk8SrqWbiUqMRF--qg_G7dMcQ1_zoQMLf_GSDl73QiN6GYsbBYB2KM0gC9ZPUPRrPJ1Dh6z_9jyHXWfqI7cGzIu2ZrxNoY3AdZvFbnw1ppKTOvLDay-vy2vqmIlxmpDFIGNWffexjrh21wtJ0v43M7erFc3K-MsXhaGxf-lA8g99VSAbvwH6NA8YgkaRw3wOm548CrUjlAeqehkTMvAw%3D%3D) **[So join me in protecting our kids’ futures and the future of our state by donating any amount to my campaign today.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=a3dcad2f66174440a75ea5869f218e13&_e=BCRmy4mW86q4RfFN2SsP8WKOVJpf1IRDrKHJLcSkTEnsZIcc1fHqUjGBxAU0SbExyHwruh8jsGz742QFIkGoKCg-jO81l8zl6LNijEljAe5qXoWACnoS_AhUZ1QKjQXuPXtqhLT3eQSQETeePIkdF_dYLldVHTcYsPVNRNQeFjAK0boeny8jqDSdkWWKIdk8EWpk8SrqWbiUqMRF--qg_G7dMcQ1_zoQMLf_GSDl73QiN6GYsbBYB2KM0gC9ZPUPYUZHgoNUKzdADlUQTt2lI03VfXZ6V-J4ouFFglalVZAFWaEpt5wcuUHpp08-V1zY9aIWrzAr0udtsQ6ErGVIefzoykSUNFKUw-VnzHPBP9YQOYpPrzpP_3XVpFpp6zvsKq7DQpZEIpBMb_W3HtCPNw%3D%3D)** Thank you. – John **My story is not unique.** I was born and raised in Pennsylvania in rural, blue-collar, and old coal mining communities. I'm a proud husband and father to three amazing children. I witnessed firsthand how both major political parties have neglected rural communities and left behind working families. I'm running to build a movement and a government that works for working families. [**Join me.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=a3dcad2f66174440a75ea5869f218e13&_e=BCRmy4mW86q4RfFN2SsP8QyOyA5bbXHg4W0eSaPpfy1czdpGrXDObWgNcXHD2kpL2gEsx06kADTUHN_P33QRkZx-Tn5FKF-pwujICoR5Thna6rR72RTM6hRWu_HrxnM9YOUvEyyGg_7auJKnLBRz3JyCnwZAre46ygHhN7RYYE4RKvbr6iNrE_cgfv4G4da944_IAgucPt-ujNAVqrmaaQ%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=a3dcad2f66174440a75ea5869f218e13&_e=BCRmy4mW86q4RfFN2SsP8WKOVJpf1IRDrKHJLcSkTEnsZIcc1fHqUjGBxAU0SbExyHwruh8jsGz742QFIkGoKCg-jO81l8zl6LNijEljAe5qXoWACnoS_AhUZ1QKjQXuPXtqhLT3eQSQETeePIkdF_dYLldVHTcYsPVNRNQeFjAK0boeny8jqDSdkWWKIdk8EWpk8SrqWbiUqMRF--qg_G7dMcQ1_zoQMLf_GSDl73QJhEvD6IOiTdy_IiFc06JLGU7PNReosbuMzGe9yvCOeAobp006KxDjSY7x6u5a8SzjS2YYXRqPcpmMxzLG8m8n7j8zT1JHh1FP_cdCKTNsUn4mnKZjpQ9MpsZtAZ1R9mQGywSfSMCdo_VrHK1quZcwAsDnJgFgjwZsr0Cks9Ic0arU5c3xONhGRAxL0Dp_oO0%3D) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Compare these Credentials to anyone else
body:
See which candidate is best in NV-01.
| | | | Hello Peter,
Mark Robertson is the best Candidate to represent the people of Nevada's First Congressional District. His Local, National, and International credentials prove it. Local: Taught at CCSD, Charter Schools, and UNLV; Appointed to the Senior Citizen Advisory Commission; Served local families as a Certified Financial Planner.
---
|
---
| National: Faculty member of the National Defense University; Served in the Pentagon; Member of the Library of Congress; Lifetime member of the Veterans of Foreign Wars; Admitted to represent Nevadans before the IRS.
---
|
---
| International: U.S. delegate to the Global Coalition against ISIS; Participated in Joint International Military Exercises worldwide; Deployed to 10 foreign countries, including NATO assignments and combat tours in Afghanistan, Iraq, and Kuwait.
---
|

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

clean_body: If our campaign volunteers and staff don’t have the money to gas up their tanks, we can’t personally reach the voters we need to win this election. | | Fellow Conservative, Campaigning in West Virginia isn’t easy. We’re one of the most mountainous states in the Country. Reaching voters in every town can take hours on long-winding country roads, eating up thousands of dollars in gasoline. That’s why gas for our cars can take up a large segment of our campaign costs. If our campaign volunteers and staff don’t have the money to gas up their tanks, we can’t personally reach the voters we need to win this election. The average price of gasoline in West Virginia is $3.50 per gallon. | I know it doesn’t seem like a lot, but these costs add up and Sincerely, Gov. Jim Justice Republican for U.S. Senate | MEET JIM Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: When you woke up this morning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=743%2E135344%2EOnLsD0)

Hey there --
We're sure you didn't wake up this morning, spring out of bed and scream "Today is the day I am going to donate to help Elissa Slotkin hold Michigan's Senate seat for Democrats!"
But we’re emailing in the hope that you will consider contributing today anyway. Here’s why:
Michigan is going to be one of the closest, most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country next year. Recent polling shows a dead-heat in both the Senate and the Presidential races, which means we have two competitive elections to win next year. And now there are two serious potential Republican opponents in the race who both support federal abortion bans with no exceptions for rape, incest, or common miscarriage.
This news makes it especially important that we’re doing the work to build an early foundation now. Donations a year from now – when we’re in the home stretch – are important. But donations now are even more important, because they allow us to map out a strategic plan and make decisions about when and how we reach voters.
**We also hope you will contribute because the latest FEC filings show that Republican megadonors like the DeVos family are going to throw everything they can at this race to flip Michigan red.** One of Elissa’s potential opponents, former Congressman Mike Rogers, received $46,200 from the DeVos’ – all made on a single day.
By contrast, the majority of the donations we receive come from people contributing significantly smaller donations than the DeVos family made to Mike Rogers: Our average email donation was $26 last quarter.
[**So while contributing to Elissa’s campaign for Senate might not have been at the top of your to-do list this morning, we would love it if you would consider donating $3 or whatever you can today. The amount is important, but not as important as the donation itself. It will add up fast when we're all chipping in.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231023-1-30&t=2&akid=743%2E135344%2EOnLsD0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-oct23.s_Ko7f&refcode=em231023-1-30&t=21&akid=743%2E135344%2EOnLsD0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-oct23.1KsVSv&refcode=em231023-1-30&t=22&akid=743%2E135344%2EOnLsD0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-oct23.bbeHIu&refcode=em231023-1-30&t=23&akid=743%2E135344%2EOnLsD0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-oct23.fqQJeL&refcode=em231023-1-30&t=24&akid=743%2E135344%2EOnLsD0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-oct23.oc0oAM&refcode=em231023-1-30&t=25&akid=743%2E135344%2EOnLsD0)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-oct23.GGwPD1&refcode=em231023-1-30&t=26&akid=743%2E135344%2EOnLsD0)**
---
****
Thank you,
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=743%2E135344%2EOnLsD0).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

With your support, our team led the fight to elect Pres. Trump in 2016. Now, we serve as the **nation’s leading anti-Joe Biden organization** and are working to elect Pres. Trump once again in 2024.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72064215/434135749/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzAxMjZiMS1kNDcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xmiX23xKH2NqDM2qIAO8n81dx-LeCNNOP_N3n-tEGSc=)
Peter,

I have some exciting news to share with you.

**This weekend, Democratic delegates in CA-27 _overwhelmingly_ voted to recommend my campaign for endorsement by the California Democratic Party.**

This virtually ensures we'll have the party endorsement against Mike Garcia, and as the ONLY Democrat in this race, I’m now considered the presumptive nominee in CA-27!

**[This is a major milestone, and it’s critical that we keep our momentum going. Please join the majority of local delegates in CA-27 unifying behind our campaign with a $3 donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72064216/434135750/-233825198?refcode=em-10.23.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzAxMjZiMS1kNDcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xmiX23xKH2NqDM2qIAO8n81dx-LeCNNOP_N3n-tEGSc=)**

With the election year nearing, we are gaining the traction we need to oust Mike Garcia:
* **I’m now the Democratic frontrunner in this race after our primary opponent bowed out and endorsed me.** I’m focused on unifying this district to beat Garcia and give our community the representation it deserves.

* **Last quarter, our campaign reported having more cash on hand than Mike Garcia -- for the third time in a row.** We have incredible support, and we need to keep building momentum.

* Community leaders and elected officials are supporting our campaign. **Former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Rep. Adam Schiff, Rep. Eric Swalwell, as well as a number of local Democratic leaders, environmental groups, and unions have endorsed our movement.**

Mike Garcia is in real danger of losing his seat, but we can’t afford to slow down now:

**[Help us flip CA-27 from red to blue -- and with it, control of the House majority. clean_body: | = Peter, I have some exciting news to share with you. This weekend, Democratic delegates in CA-27 overwhelmingly voted to recommend my campaign for endorsement by the California Democratic Party. This virtually ensures we'll have the party endorsement against Mike Garcia, and as the ONLY Democrat in this race, I’m now considered the presumptive nominee in CA-27! = | **= With the election year nearing, we are gaining the traction we need to oust Mike Garcia: I’m now the Democratic frontrunner in this race after our primary opponent bowed out and endorsed me. I’m focused on unifying this district to beat Garcia and give our community the representation it deserves. Last quarter, our campaign reported having more cash on hand than Mike Garcia -- for the third time in a row. We have incredible support, and we need to keep building momentum. Community leaders and elected officials are supporting our campaign. Former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Rep. Adam Schiff, Rep. Eric Swalwell, as well as a number of local Democratic leaders, environmental groups, and unions have endorsed our movement. Mike Garcia is in real danger of losing his seat, but we can’t afford to slow down now: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

body:
NOW LET’S WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE.| | | Patriot,

---
It is my great honor to tell you that I have officially filed the paperwork to be a candidate for President of the United States in the very first primary of the 2024 election – New Hampshire.
---
_**_NOTHING_**_** _CAN STOP THE GREATEST MOVEMENT IN HISTORY!_**
---
To prove that we truly are unstoppable, I’m calling on grassroots donors all across the nation to make a campaign contribution that will be _registered_ on the very same day our official presidential paperwork was filed.
---
**There will always be**** _time-stamped_****proof that you were with us on DAY ONE.**
---
_Of course, if you cannot give because of the corrupt and incompetent fool who we will soon FIRE from the White House, then please do not donate today! I know who my loyal supporters are – and even if there won’t be time-stamped proof, I will remember who was with us on Day One._

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

body:
And Trump Widens Lead Over Biden, Wins In Third-Party Matchups: POLL

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671926%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NaVCEiwg6nmNfSyZAOSWaw&sysid=1 Federal Judge Blocks Blue State Ban On Abortion Pill Reversal Drug

A federal judge blocked Colorado’s law banning clinics from providing women with a hormone that aims to reverse the abortion pill. U.S. District Court Judge Daniel Domenico, a Trump appointee, granted a preliminary injunction Saturday, siding with a Catholic pro-life clinic that sued in April to block Colorado’s law as a violation of their First Amendment rights to free speech and free exercise of religion.

body:
These local elections determine if our school boards will be fueled by radical ideologies from the left, or a return to teaching education skills. | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=2203f454d2&e=6a281f566d)
---
| | Washington Republicans --

Ballots for the 2023 local elections have been mailed out - **check your mailboxes** today to find your ballot **and vote early**!

These local elections determine if our school boards will be fueled by radical ideologies from the left, or a return to teaching education skills. Radical progressives running for city council will continue to dismantle law enforcement in your neighborhoods, unless we stop them. And allowing radical progressives to win local elections now, gives them the foothold to run for legislative, congressional, and statewide offices in the future. **Make sure you VOTE now!**
Make sure your friends, family, and all common-sense voters in your community **vote!**
---
| [Click here to find Drop Box locations around you >>>](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=921dfa7080&e=6a281f566d "Click here to find Drop Box locations around you >>>")

| The WAGOP has released a **spotlight list of 79 c****ommon-sense conservative school board candidates** to keep your eye on this November. The outcomes of their races can give us an indication of how our conservative message is working in WA communities.

**These are the**** 79 school board races that pundits refer to as "bellwether" races**. Based on political-lean, geography, and impact on future races, the outcome of these races can help predict the future of Washington State's political direction and the movement our Republican Party is making.

These bellwether races are listed below, arranged by region—so you can find the races closest to you. **Click on the buttons below to** **learn more about these important campaigns** either from their campaign website, or from the county GOP website (not all local campaigns have campaign websites). You’ll find **candidate information, campaign event schedules, volunteer opportunities, and contribution** links.
_**Please also look on your county GOP website for voting recommendations in your hometown.**_

These local elections determine if our school boards will be fueled by radical ideologies from the left, or a return to teaching education skills. Radical progressives running for city council will continue to dismantle law enforcement in your neighborhoods, unless we stop them. And allowing radical progressives to win local elections now, gives them the foothold to run for legislative, congressional, and statewide offices in the future. Make sure you VOTE now! subject: Latest update from border patrol
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter, Border Patrol announced over the weekend that migrant encounters last month reached an all-time high ... **_and that __2023 is now officially the worst year on record._**

Not only that, but 169 people on the terrorist watch list have been caught trying to enter our country illegally this year ... _a**nother record high. **_

It's beyond obvious to people like you and me that Biden's border policy - if we can even call it that - isn't working. It's a disaster. It's putting our national security at risk.

The solution is equally obvious...
**I'm calling for an immediate return to the Trump Administration's approach to securing the border. **
The Trump approach worked. The numbers don't lie. _All of the border policies that Biden arrogantly repealed when he took office need to be reinstated ASAP._

[**_If you agree it's time to go back to the Trump-era border policies, will you add your name to our petition so I know you're standing with me?_**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=0cf6616deb&e=86e91e802d)
---
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=711eee1f57&e=86e91e802d "SIGN THE PETITION")
---
| Getting President Biden out of office won't end this crisis. We need to go back to smart, proven, effective border security policies that worked just a few short years ago.

If we're in this together, we can win this election and secure our border now!

I hope you're standing with me,

Max Ukropina

body:

Illegal Immigration At Northern Border Increased 347% In Just One Year

Illegal immigration at the northern border increased roughly 347% from
2022 to 2023, according to recently updated Customs and Border
Protection (CBP) data. The data shows that Border Patrol encounters of
migrants crossing the U.S.-Canadian border jumped from 2,238 in 022 to
10,021 in 2023. Illegal immigration surpassed 2 million encounters
nationwide in each of the aforementioned years.

Michigan State Suspends Employee Who Showed Hitler Image On Football
Videoboard

A Michigan State University (MSU) employee was suspended Sunday after
allowing an image of Adolf Hitler to be shown on the university’s
scoreboard, according to The Associated Press. The video was shown
prior to Saturday’s rivalry football game between MSU and the
University of Michigan, according to the AP.

Encounters Of Chinese Illegal Immigrants At The Southern Border Surged
Over 1100%

Border Patrol encounters of illegal immigrants from China at the
U.S.-Mexico border increased more than 1,100%, according to recently
updated federal data. Encounters of Chinese migrants crossing
illegally jumped from 1,970 in fiscal year 2022 to 24,048 in fiscal
year 2023, according to U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP).

I recently returned from a week-long trip to the Middle East. Over the course of a week in the United Arab Emirates (UAE), I had the opportunity to meet with dozens of bankers, academics, entrepreneurs, government officials, and members of the press. And while most of my conversations were focused on the outlook for the global economy, the anticipated impact of technologies like artificial intelligence, or how the commercialization of space might create investment opportunities, every discussion also touched on the Israel-Hamas war and [my strong conviction that it is a "hot front" in the US-China War](https://substack.com/redirect/c598788e-c2af-47d3-8b8a-89908607de14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| | POLL

[Unclear](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.znqZdLA7al-rNlopuIxlHUI5mZgBin7Tc64eJs68_RM?)
[Probably Not](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.X4tKFGnz-i3NWdeE7Otcn7-stwlmPxjkhvMDwleX2Xo?)
[Very Unlikely](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.oYDD8Iz3nTqQf5wMzHRd0tJ3IAR3bVQeDzwIiRdEx6E?)
Unsurprisingly, the reactions and opinions I heard varied. Many of the Emiratis I spoke with were equally disturbed by both Hamas and Israel, expressing deep concern for the loss of innocent life. Others sided with Israel, and some with the Palestinians. One analogized the situation to a fight between two adults, noting "they should not fight in a playground where innocent bystanders can get hurt..." while implicitly acknowledging legitimate grievance on both sides.
Over the course of the last week, I grew increasingly convinced the Middle East is a powder keg. Despite the relative calm that characterized my time in the region, five specific developments caught my attention and dominated my discussions, making the rapidly rising risks of global war obvious.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0FUnmP6EIEijh-VpXXyNa4prZlNG--rDTE-9EvR9d5Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138173943)
## #1: Blinken Visits the Region; Iran's Reaction
US Secretary of State Anthony Blinken visited the Middle East a week after the Hamas attacks and met with leaders in Bahrain, Qatar, Jordan, Israel, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, the UAE. [In addition to being rushed into a bomb shelter while visiting Tel Aviv, Secretary Blinken also spent a night awake in Saudi Arabia waiting to meet crown prince Mohammed bin Salman ("MBS")](https://substack.com/redirect/3e013dda-4d76-4b39-aca6-7a993c5c218b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the country's de facto ruler. According to the _New York Times_ ,
> _[Reporters traveling with Mr. Blinken were told to be ready at any minute to leave their hotel in the secretary's motorcade for an audience with the crown prince, the region's most powerful Sunni Muslim ruler. The hours dragged on, from midnight to 2 a.m. and then 4 a.m. Finally, the prince agreed to meet Mr. Blinken after 7:30 a.m. on Sunday at his private farm residence...it was a rare and most likely frustrating experience for a sleep-deprived Mr. Blinken, who is used to foreign officials accommodating his schedule.](https://substack.com/redirect/3e013dda-4d76-4b39-aca6-7a993c5c218b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
The most disturbing reaction to the Secretary's visit to the region, however, came from Iran, which basically threatened military escalation. After he left the UAE, Iran's Mission to the United Nations made a public statement: "[If the Israeli apartheid's war crimes and genocide are not halted immediately, the situation could spiral out of control & ](https://substack.com/redirect/cfa2ef5b-7220-424d-a528-5cd60cf55d39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ricochet far-reaching consequences](https://substack.com/redirect/cfa2ef5b-7220-424d-a528-5cd60cf55d39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "(emphasis in original). Iranian Foreign Minister Amir Abdollahian shared a similar view: "[If the Zionist regime's crimes against the Palestinian people and citizens continue, no one can guarantee that the situation in the region will remain the same](https://substack.com/redirect/041b8217-f3af-4d0e-adc8-b169d0b2775b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0FUnmP6EIEijh-VpXXyNa4prZlNG--rDTE-9EvR9d5Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138173943)
## #2: Narrative War Escalates
On October 17th, I received a breaking news alert on my phone indicating that an "Israeli Airstrike on Gaza Hospital" killed more than 500. The news broke as President Joe Biden was en route to the Middle East to meet with leaders in Israel and Jordan. Almost immediately after the news broke, the meetings in Jordan with Palestinian leaders was cancelled, derailing potential diplomatic progress.
Shortly thereafter, reports emerged that the hospital blast may not have beendue to Israeli action but was instead caused by a misfired rocket from Palestian militants in Gaza. Nevertheless, Hamas and Iran continue to push forth the narrative that the hospital explosion was the result of an Israeli attack using American bombs. See the graphic below, which the Permanent Mission of the Islamic Republic of Iran to the United Nations in New York has had on its home page.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b5bd92d2-c907-43e5-b5a9-0339dcbd86d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: Permanent Mission of the Islamic Republic of Iran to the United Nations in New York ([https://newyork.mfa.ir](https://substack.com/redirect/8e1fa501-dab5-4c62-a40d-06861020f0d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
On Saturday, October 21st, _The Wall Street Journal_ [presented compelling video analysis that used geolocation and timestamped recordings from multiple vantage points to show the hospital explosion was from a misfired rocket intended for Israel](https://substack.com/redirect/aca88999-922a-418a-8057-0c21a28d3393?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Despite this and other evidence, including a statement from President Joe Biden from the Oval Office that bluntly stated "[the hospital explosion in Gaza... was not done by the Israelis](https://substack.com/redirect/95af1323-2e96-418a-979e-c9cb778497b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
Regardless, and perhaps most problematically, [the hospital explosion has turned into a narrative war with little attention being paid to facts](https://substack.com/redirect/8f99f5cc-f739-41bf-ad0d-1ce003152baf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Even after the evidence was presented by US and Israeli intelligence services, Jordanian Foreign Minister Ayman Safadi bluntly dismissed the analysis, telling NBC News' Lester Holt that "[Nobody is buying that narrative in this part of the world](https://substack.com/redirect/b3466db2-2836-413f-9663-d8aedd93d3cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." His predecessor told CNN "[The Arab public puts the attack squarely on Israel](https://substack.com/redirect/a92d5556-defd-4566-b1c0-04ebc9617df0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."

## #3: Abraham Accords: Test or Final Exam?
Let's recall that immediately following the October 7th attacks, many nations were reluctant to condemn Hamas and their actions. [Saudi Arabia had, as I noted at the time, issued a statement that explicitly did not condemn the attacks and instead laid the blame on Israel](https://substack.com/redirect/a9fd9228-fede-4895-a71b-bbc95bd0cd2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [The UAE and Bahrain, both countries that had normalized relations with Israel, were quick to condemn the attacks](https://substack.com/redirect/7ecfba80-8aa1-49ba-b604-007b229dfe49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
One of the main reasons for these different reactions was the [Abraham Accords](https://substack.com/redirect/c98fa2f2-8883-4de6-8034-8a09397314b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a collection of bilateral agreements that normalized relations between Israel and the UAE, Bahrain, Morocco, and Sudan that were signed between September and December 2020. The signing of the agreements did not sit well with Hamas. On the very day the Israel-UAE normalization was announced, Hamas spokesman Fawzi Barhoum stated
> _[The US-Israeli-Emirati agreement is dangerous and represents a'free reward' for the Israeli occupation for its crimes and violations of the Palestinian people's human rights. We condemn every form of normalization with the occupation, which we consider a stab in the back of the Palestinian cause. The Israeli enemy benefits from it. [Normalization] will encourage it to commit more crimes and violations of our people's rights and their holy places.](https://substack.com/redirect/42ba5f74-4f8b-413f-bb1a-ce807862279f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
He went on to explicitly condemn the UAE and said it should not "[normalize with the occupation, beautify its face and integrate it in the region](https://substack.com/redirect/42ba5f74-4f8b-413f-bb1a-ce807862279f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." Three years later, as the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia was moving towards normalization with Israel, Hamas attacked Israel and successfully derailed a Saudi-Israel peace treaty.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c2cb12c9-59dd-48bb-9f27-5a6a202b78a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Bahrainis carry anti-Israel placards during a gathering in Manama on October 20, 2023, amid the ongoing war between Israel and the Gaza-ruling Hamas terror group. Source: [https://www.timesofisrael.com/anti-israel-demonstrations-held-across-muslim-world-amid-gaza-war-against-hamas/](https://substack.com/redirect/8744d0d4-4453-4c57-962d-f1a7bc49ba89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
More concerning than the lost opportunity with Saudi Arabia, however, is the [rising risk to the existing Abraham Accords](https://substack.com/redirect/1282a932-2f78-410a-80ed-06363f84abd6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from domestic unrest within Bahrain and Morocco. [Several Bahraini militias, associated with Iran, were quick to offer support for Hamas, praising their efforts and progress at exterminating Israelis](https://substack.com/redirect/ac9871e8-e0d7-405c-a3b1-9c8542e2e2e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And despite an official government statement condemning the Hamas attacks, "[Morocco's Islamist Justice and Development Party, which had a parliamentary majority until the 2021 elections, praised the Hamas attack](https://substack.com/redirect/40dccb0d-096d-421f-88b4-56884c03823f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," noted _Foreign Policy_. To complicate matters further, Sudan, another country that normalized relations with Israel in 2020, last week agreed to exchange official delegations and restore diplomatic relations with Iran.
In terms of hopes for a peaceful resolution to the conflict, it's worth revisiting [The Platform of the Islamic Resistance Movement (Hamas), also know as "The Charter of Allah."](https://substack.com/redirect/67609427-2653-4ed4-87f3-8c3bcb9fb440?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Consider the following sentence that begins Article 13: "[[Peace] initiatives, and so-called peaceful solutions and international conferences are in contradiction to the principles of the Islamic Resistance Movement.](https://substack.com/redirect/67609427-2653-4ed4-87f3-8c3bcb9fb440?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" And perhaps most ominously, "[There is no solution to the Palestinian problem except by Jihad. The initiatives, proposals and International Conferences are but a waste of time, an exercise in futility](https://substack.com/redirect/67609427-2653-4ed4-87f3-8c3bcb9fb440?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." And let's not forget that [Iran has, as its main objective, the destruction of Israel](https://substack.com/redirect/704921ea-ce01-4798-9e0e-c014b8b34709?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

## #4: Belt & Road Birthday Party Highlights Splitting World
While Iran and Israel played with matches in the Middle East tinderbox, [Vladimir Putin attended the 10th birthday party for China's Belt & Road Initiative hosted by his dear friend Xi Jinping](https://substack.com/redirect/b402df14-3b06-4774-b547-f214bae6e664?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). More than two dozen leaders and hundreds of delegations, mainly from emerging markets, descended on Beijing to mark the first decade of [China's signature global development program that launched in 2013](https://substack.com/redirect/55e0a2bf-a17c-4032-b0c1-8b3a208cfe4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). A news headline summarizing the event captured a major takeaway from the gathering: "[Putin touts solidarity with China in Xi's pitch for new world order as crisis grips Middle East](https://substack.com/redirect/b402df14-3b06-4774-b547-f214bae6e664?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e8b2df1c-2c05-468a-98d9-d011ab710b55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [https://www.cnn.com/2023/10/16/china/china-bri-forum-xi-jinping-putin-russia-intl-hnk/index.html](https://substack.com/redirect/325b2749-5f73-4d95-92d8-bf5babbce90d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
One development at the event that I found noteworthy was the change in attendance from the last Belt & Road Initiative Forum, which was held four years ago and had 37 heads of state in attendance, compared to the 24 who trekked to Beijing this year. Noticeable absences included numerous leaders from Europe (Italy, Greece, Austria, Portugal and the Czech Republic) as skepticism about Chinese intentions has grown.
At the event, Putin and Xi reaffirmed their deep friendship. CNN used the opportunity to summarize the depth and duration of the relationship between two of the world's leading autocrats:
> _[The two leaders, who frequently refer to their close friendship, have now met 41 times in the past decade, including three since the start of the war in Ukraine, including this week. During their previous meeting in Beijing, Xi and Putin released a 5,000-word joint statement declaring a partnership with"no limits" and underscoring their deep alignment against the West.](https://substack.com/redirect/325b2749-5f73-4d95-92d8-bf5babbce90d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
What seems increasingly obvious is that the world is bifurcating into two global ecosystems, one led by the United States and the other by China. The Belt and Road Initiative Forum this year made that crystal clear.

## #5: Blurring of Deterrence and Escalation
In the wake of the Israel-Hamas war, military movements into the Middle East have been accelerating at a rapid clip. [The United States has sent the USS Dwight D. Eisenhower and its strike group are heading to the Persian Gulf](https://substack.com/redirect/67e286b7-9b48-4c63-9a6e-a30b9ad9d543?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while the USS Gerald Ford and its strike group are positioned in the eastern Mediterranean, not far from Israel. Both actions drew aggressive commentary from Iran and its proxies warning of escalation if America were to engage in the conflict.
In addition to sending two carrier strike groups to the region, US Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin ordered the 26th Marine Expeditionary Unit to be positioned in the waters off Israel. [The marines in this unit are capable of conducting amphibious operations and crisis response, among other missions](https://substack.com/redirect/5cace814-4a36-4fec-8a85-aef8983a3472?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Additional military resources are also being sent to the region.
While this was happening, the Organization of Islamic Cooperation held an emergency meeting in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia. On the sidelines of that gathering, Iranian Foreign Minister Hossein Amirabdollahian met with Qatar's Minister of State for Foreign Affairs Sultan Al Muraikhi and threatened military escalation: "[The US should understand that there is no way all parties exercise restraint while the Zionist regime is allowed to do whatever it wants with Washington's full backing.](https://substack.com/redirect/0af00896-b51f-4609-a997-1c4eef284738?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" [The Islamic Republic also telegraphed that they'd begin trafficking in ballistic missiles](https://substack.com/redirect/07569d25-4fef-484a-8704-0bec6d73a4cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and as I wrote this piece, tensions between Israel and Hezbollah were rising as rocket fire crossed Israel's northern border and Israel struck locations in Southern Lebanon.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fca2cffd-c86e-45dc-ad4e-6b52428b8cc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [https://www.scmp.com/news/china/military/article/3238536/6-chinese-warships-present-middle-east-over-past-week](https://substack.com/redirect/b6149826-446b-426b-83b7-b32d07e9646e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And perhaps the most concerning military move into the region was the deployment of 6 Chinese warships to the Middle East after Beijing explicitly noted that "[Israel is acting beyond the scope of self-defense](https://substack.com/redirect/0b9e17bb-75e8-4ad9-b648-4f91ce99baf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." While [the People's Liberation Army (PLA) Navy's 44th naval escort taskforce had been conducting routine activities in the region, it stayed in the region to conduct joint exercises with Oman's Navy](https://substack.com/redirect/b6149826-446b-426b-83b7-b32d07e9646e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) before deploying in the Persian Gulf [to visit the Shukwaikh Port in Kuwait](https://substack.com/redirect/60ad66b3-56c9-4814-ae97-a14135565147?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0FUnmP6EIEijh-VpXXyNa4prZlNG--rDTE-9EvR9d5Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138173943)
## SO WHAT?
Secretary of State Anthony Blinken stated that the US expects Iranian escalation: "[We expect that there's a likelihood of escalation by Iranian proxies directly against our forces, and against our personnel](https://substack.com/redirect/a557952c-6d06-451d-bede-e4bf678a802c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," before noting America is taking steps to defend and protect our forces and our people.
While any one of these developments would be the basis of growing concern, the simultaneous occurrence of all five is genuinely alarming. The world appears to be on a path towards greater conflict, and with the arrival of US and Chinese military vessels in an already tense area, the slightest misunderstanding, misinterpretation, or miscalculation could spark a US-China kinetic war. The world is playing with matches in a tinderbox, producing a highly combustible situation that warrants careful and thoughtful consideration from all involved.
| | POLL

clean_body: Are We Headed Into World War III? | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Are We Headed Into World War III? | | | Oct 23 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- I recently returned from a week-long trip to the Middle East. Over the course of a week in the United Arab Emirates (UAE), I had the opportunity to meet with dozens of bankers, academics, entrepreneurs, government officials, and members of the press. And while most of my conversations were focused on the outlook for the global economy, the anticipated impact of technologies like artificial intelligence, or how the commercialization of space might create investment opportunities, every discussion also touched on the Israel-Hamas war and . | | POLL Do you think we are headed towards World War III? | ? ? ? ? ? Unsurprisingly, the reactions and opinions I heard varied. Many of the Emiratis I spoke with were equally disturbed by both Hamas and Israel, expressing deep concern for the loss of innocent life. Others sided with Israel, and some with the Palestinians. One analogized the situation to a fight between two adults, noting "they should not fight in a playground where innocent bystanders can get hurt..." while implicitly acknowledging legitimate grievance on both sides. Over the course of the last week, I grew increasingly convinced the Middle East is a powder keg. Despite the relative calm that characterized my time in the region, five specific developments caught my attention and dominated my discussions, making the rapidly rising risks of global war obvious. #1: Blinken Visits the Region; Iran's Reaction US Secretary of State Anthony Blinken visited the Middle East a week after the Hamas attacks and met with leaders in Bahrain, Qatar, Jordan, Israel, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, the UAE. , the country's de facto ruler. According to the New York Times , The most disturbing reaction to the Secretary's visit to the region, however, came from Iran, which basically threatened military escalation. After he left the UAE, Iran's Mission to the United Nations made a public statement: " "(emphasis in original). Iranian Foreign Minister Amir Abdollahian shared a similar view: "." #2: Narrative War Escalates On October 17th, I received a breaking news alert on my phone indicating that an "Israeli Airstrike on Gaza Hospital" killed more than 500. The news broke as President Joe Biden was en route to the Middle East to meet with leaders in Israel and Jordan. Almost immediately after the news broke, the meetings in Jordan with Palestinian leaders was cancelled, derailing potential diplomatic progress. Shortly thereafter, reports emerged that the hospital blast may not have beendue to Israeli action but was instead caused by a misfired rocket from Palestian militants in Gaza. Nevertheless, Hamas and Iran continue to push forth the narrative that the hospital explosion was the result of an Israeli attack using American bombs. See the graphic below, which the Permanent Mission of the Islamic Republic of Iran to the United Nations in New York has had on its home page. | | ---|---|--- Source: Permanent Mission of the Islamic Republic of Iran to the United Nations in New York () On Saturday, October 21st, The Wall Street Journal . Despite this and other evidence, including a statement from President Joe Biden from the Oval Office that bluntly stated "." Regardless, and perhaps most problematically, . Even after the evidence was presented by US and Israeli intelligence services, Jordanian Foreign Minister Ayman Safadi bluntly dismissed the analysis, telling NBC News' Lester Holt that "." His predecessor told CNN "." #3: Abraham Accords: Test or Final Exam? Let's recall that immediately following the October 7th attacks, many nations were reluctant to condemn Hamas and their actions. . . One of the main reasons for these different reactions was the , a collection of bilateral agreements that normalized relations between Israel and the UAE, Bahrain, Morocco, and Sudan that were signed between September and December 2020. The signing of the agreements did not sit well with Hamas. On the very day the Israel-UAE normalization was announced, Hamas spokesman Fawzi Barhoum stated [The US-Israeli-Emirati agreement is dangerous and represents a'free reward' for the Israeli occupation for its crimes and violations of the Palestinian people's human rights. We condemn every form of normalization with the occupation, which we consider a stab in the back of the Palestinian cause. The Israeli enemy benefits from it. [Normalization] will encourage it to commit more crimes and violations of our people's rights and their holy places.]() He went on to explicitly condemn the UAE and said it should not "." Three years later, as the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia was moving towards normalization with Israel, Hamas attacked Israel and successfully derailed a Saudi-Israel peace treaty. | | ---|---|--- Bahrainis carry anti-Israel placards during a gathering in Manama on October 20, 2023, amid the ongoing war between Israel and the Gaza-ruling Hamas terror group. Source: More concerning than the lost opportunity with Saudi Arabia, however, is the from domestic unrest within Bahrain and Morocco. . And despite an official government statement condemning the Hamas attacks, "," noted Foreign Policy. To complicate matters further, Sudan, another country that normalized relations with Israel in 2020, last week agreed to exchange official delegations and restore diplomatic relations with Iran. In terms of hopes for a peaceful resolution to the conflict, it's worth revisiting Consider the following sentence that begins Article 13: "[[Peace] initiatives, and so-called peaceful solutions and international conferences are in contradiction to the principles of the Islamic Resistance Movement.]()" And perhaps most ominously, "." And let's not forget that . #4: Belt & Road Birthday Party Highlights Splitting World While Iran and Israel played with matches in the Middle East tinderbox, . More than two dozen leaders and hundreds of delegations, mainly from emerging markets, descended on Beijing to mark the first decade of . A news headline summarizing the event captured a major takeaway from the gathering: "." | | ---|---|--- Source: One development at the event that I found noteworthy was the change in attendance from the last Belt & Road Initiative Forum, which was held four years ago and had 37 heads of state in attendance, compared to the 24 who trekked to Beijing this year. Noticeable absences included numerous leaders from Europe (Italy, Greece, Austria, Portugal and the Czech Republic) as skepticism about Chinese intentions has grown. At the event, Putin and Xi reaffirmed their deep friendship. CNN used the opportunity to summarize the depth and duration of the relationship between two of the world's leading autocrats: What seems increasingly obvious is that the world is bifurcating into two global ecosystems, one led by the United States and the other by China. The Belt and Road Initiative Forum this year made that crystal clear. #5: Blurring of Deterrence and Escalation In the wake of the Israel-Hamas war, military movements into the Middle East have been accelerating at a rapid clip. , while the USS Gerald Ford and its strike group are positioned in the eastern Mediterranean, not far from Israel. Both actions drew aggressive commentary from Iran and its proxies warning of escalation if America were to engage in the conflict. In addition to sending two carrier strike groups to the region, US Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin ordered the 26th Marine Expeditionary Unit to be positioned in the waters off Israel. . Additional military resources are also being sent to the region. While this was happening, the Organization of Islamic Cooperation held an emergency meeting in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia. On the sidelines of that gathering, Iranian Foreign Minister Hossein Amirabdollahian met with Qatar's Minister of State for Foreign Affairs Sultan Al Muraikhi and threatened military escalation: "" , and as I wrote this piece, tensions between Israel and Hezbollah were rising as rocket fire crossed Israel's northern border and Israel struck locations in Southern Lebanon. | | ---|---|--- Source: And perhaps the most concerning military move into the region was the deployment of 6 Chinese warships to the Middle East after Beijing explicitly noted that "." Secretary of State Anthony Blinken stated that the US expects Iranian escalation: "," before noting America is taking steps to defend and protect our forces and our people. While any one of these developments would be the basis of growing concern, the simultaneous occurrence of all five is genuinely alarming. The world appears to be on a path towards greater conflict, and with the arrival of US and Chinese military vessels in an already tense area, the slightest misunderstanding, misinterpretation, or miscalculation could spark a US-China kinetic war. The world is playing with matches in a tinderbox, producing a highly combustible situation that warrants careful and thoughtful consideration from all involved. | | POLL Do you think we are headed towards World War III? | ? ? ? ? ? Thankfully, we have some Republicans who aren't drinking the MAGA kool laid. **Jim Jordan is a 3X LOSER, and has never been weaker _—but he has also never been more dangerous._** His one shot at controlling the entire legislative agenda in the House of Representatives failed. He humiliated himself and Ohio. Who knows what he'll do next. clean_body: Jordan’s mobster attempts to coerce GOP votes failed.| | | = Friend, Our long national nightmare is over (probably...sort of). On Friday, Jim Jordan forced a third vote on his bid to become the next Speaker of the House and failed spectacularly, losing more votes than anyone in history. Jordan’s lust for power, attention, and his divisive extremist anti-American persona was his undoing, it’s what ultimately kept him from success. Thankfully, we have some Republicans who aren't drinking the MAGA kool laid. Jim Jordan is a 3X LOSER, and has never been weaker —but he has also never been more dangerous. His one shot at controlling the entire legislative agenda in the House of Representatives failed. He humiliated himself and Ohio. Who knows what he'll do next. We can assume he will double down on his sham investigations. <eye roll> Tamie has been busy pounding the pavement talking with voters as Jordan has been trying to acquire power for himself and his ego. That’s how we’re going to win this race—hard work, listening, and dialogue with voters who are ready for a better life. We’re putting in the work to run the strongest campaign possible to make sure that Jim Jordan doesn’t return to D.C. to terrorize America. = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = | = = = | | Donate= It is an honor standing with you in this fight against Jordan and MAGA extremists. name: Madeleine Dean
subject: PA’s future is on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
**** Peter,

First, I thank you for being on this team – especially as we continue to see unprecedented turmoil in DC.

Despite the DC dysfunction, we are just two weeks away from the November 2023 election where voters will make important decisions about our leadership at the local, county, and statewide levels – and here in Pennsylvania, the stakes are high. We have an open seat on the PA Supreme Court – _the only Supreme Court race on the ballot in 2023 nationwide_ – as well as three additional statewide judicial races.

**The results of these elections could have a direct impact on reproductive rights and access to abortion care here in the Keystone State.**

**We must do all we can to defend the rights of women and girls from far-right attacks on our bodily autonomy.[If you’re still with me, add your name to show our strength and support in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066403/434143538/416169476?refcode=10232023_md_mmfrtyabortion__PA_en_1&refcode2=2f1ca445-db71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFjYTQ0NS1kYjcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D9610U99GTpEFMyBCLoUTzgGnzYQLHBBwwrTlj_DVp4=&emci=2bb14fad-be71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=2f1ca445-db71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)** | | [ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066404/434143539/416169476?refcode=10232023_md_mmfrtyabortion__PA_en_1&refcode2=2f1ca445-db71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFjYTQ0NS1kYjcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D9610U99GTpEFMyBCLoUTzgGnzYQLHBBwwrTlj_DVp4=&emci=2bb14fad-be71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=2f1ca445-db71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)
---
With the U.S. Supreme Court’s 2022 _Dobbs_ decision overturning _Roe_ , states are now the last line of defense when it comes to abortion rights and our bodily autonomy. Here in Pennsylvania, we have the option to elect a Supreme Court justice who believes in freedom of choice – **and we’re the only state with this kind of election on the ballot in 2023.**

**[Today – October 23rd – is the _last_ day for Pennsylvanians to register to vote in this year’s election. Find your polling location, check your registration, and make sure you are ready to cast your ballot on November 7th.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066405/434143540/1892651512?refcode=10232023_md_mmfrtyabortion__PA_en_1&refcode2=2f1ca445-db71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFjYTQ0NS1kYjcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D9610U99GTpEFMyBCLoUTzgGnzYQLHBBwwrTlj_DVp4=&emci=2bb14fad-be71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=2f1ca445-db71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)**

With gratitude,

_Madeleine_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066406/434143541/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=10232023_md_mmfrtyabortion__PA_en_1&refcode2=2f1ca445-db71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFjYTQ0NS1kYjcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D9610U99GTpEFMyBCLoUTzgGnzYQLHBBwwrTlj_DVp4=)

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_
_We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. If you'd like to donate,[**click here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066407/434143542/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=10232023_md_mmfrtyabortion__PA_en_1&refcode2=2f1ca445-db71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFjYTQ0NS1kYjcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D9610U99GTpEFMyBCLoUTzgGnzYQLHBBwwrTlj_DVp4=) If you’d like to volunteer, [**click here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066408/434143543/-410778297?refcode=10232023_md_mmfrtyabortion__PA_en_1&refcode2=2f1ca445-db71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFjYTQ0NS1kYjcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D9610U99GTpEFMyBCLoUTzgGnzYQLHBBwwrTlj_DVp4=&emci=2bb14fad-be71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=2f1ca445-db71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)_

clean_body: ** Peter, First, I thank you for being on this team – especially as we continue to see unprecedented turmoil in DC. Despite the DC dysfunction, we are just two weeks away from the November 2023 election where voters will make important decisions about our leadership at the local, county, and statewide levels – and here in Pennsylvania, the stakes are high. We have an open seat on the PA Supreme Court – the only Supreme Court race on the ballot in 2023 nationwide – as well as three additional statewide judicial races. The results of these elections could have a direct impact on reproductive rights and access to abortion care here in the Keystone State. We must do all we can to defend the rights of women and girls from far-right attacks on our bodily autonomy. | | With the U.S. Supreme Court’s 2022 Dobbs decision overturning Roe , states are now the last line of defense when it comes to abortion rights and our bodily autonomy. Here in Pennsylvania, we have the option to elect a Supreme Court justice who believes in freedom of choice – and we’re the only state with this kind of election on the ballot in 2023. With gratitude, Madeleine = Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress. We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. subject: Time’s up, GOP…

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_logo]
House Republicans held yet another vote Friday in an attempt to elect a new Speaker of the House... and surprise, surprise: far-right extremist Jim Jordan failed to get enough votes for the THIRD time. In case you forgot, Jordan led efforts to overturn the 2020 election. He is absolutely the WRONG choice to lead the House and to say I’m glad he lost the vote would be an understatement.
...That said , we cannot afford to stay in this limbo state too long.
As Speaker, Nancy Pelosi had the same slim majority in Congress that we do today, and she delivered for the American people! And you know just as much as me that any Republican speaker is bad news for the real solutions we need to address: like our economy, health care, homelessness, and our democracy.
We just need five Republicans to cross over and join the Democrats, and elect Hakeem Jeffries as Speaker so we can get things done for our country!
And next year, we need leaders in Congress whose priorities are the people, not electing GOP extremists who want to follow their own selfish agendas...
Will you donate $10 today to help us get there, friend? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_102323_speaker003&amount=10]
Thank you,
- Tim Sanchez for Congress
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_102323_speaker003]

As a proud son of East Oakland, a dedicated father, and a veteran, he knows firsthand the challenges that working families in the East Bay face. He is ready to deliver progress for all of us and continue the tradition of progressive leadership of doing what’s right – even if that means being the lone voice.
...And he’s ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_footeroct]

If you don't know me from my Jimi Hendrix tribute band, **[you might know me from my previous bid for Congress.](http://links.goppatriot.com/u/click?_t=42a94c663c6c423587715e465a367b7d&_m=844ad550765a4801a6f3a3e7822739d1&_e=Ty0koojO5RZvRJ3wVBe3dkMIKaZWpUU85_v27Xz0B404uDzg7O_mXp-jqyihkWJctWA72oNYfM6QHv3FIv5gVZFu1YcMg3UrTS3CgAzTZaKulujHpn5e7ZqoXuxvT9BteE3duj_jABYOhlXCH-JhssLPBZf31JyjTcDybkiTFswY_0Me27ORMQ2-vpPqMHUdd_QO1pYCT7EIYnNFrBY_rWMOZWXxPEpaNK538UC1fFgThgVKHp-7Ha5giTLSOIPsV4VgfS7lVO0cFS9tfZviA4C-vAtgoONScst4fz6cPUS1o23YgNS3Jlut6BqMCTDjPm9VeF1pBdrJvem5tZpub3PXFeVsBEz2ftiP3LVboq-yrXw97FpHM3PyzRBqI-Un "you might know me from my previous bid for Congress.")**

**I ran against a radical extremist who votes with Biden 99% of the time.** I lost my race by just 2,004 votes.**** Democrats spent over**$10 MILLION** to defeat me, **stooping so low as to compare me to a monkey and call me a _" token black Republican."_ **

I don't have time for petty political games, Peter.**I 'm rematching my Liberal opponent **because I want my kids and future grandchildren to have any opportunity available to them, just like my parents wanted for me.
