I'm also a family man, engineer, community leader, and small business owner. I 've done all of this without any government handouts, proving the American Dream is alive and well! My parents left Guatemala and came to the United States of America to live the American Dream and now "I’m running for Congress to defend it for my children. " | | | | | | | | secure.winred.com/george-logan-for-congress/american-dream/ "Support George Logan" If you don't know me from my Jimi Hendrix tribute band, "you might know me from my previous bid for Congress." I ran against a radical extremist who votes with Biden 99% of the time. I lost my race by just 2,004 votes.** Democrats spent over$10 MILLION to defeat me, stooping so low as to compare me to a monkey and call me a " token black Republican." I don't have time for petty political games, Peter.I 'm rematching my Liberal opponent because I want my kids and future grandchildren to have any opportunity available to them, just like my parents wanted for me. I just launched my campaign this month and I want you to be one of my first supporters. body:
This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of 2024, and the stakes couldn't be higher.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=958%2E552475%2Esh8jOf)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231023-1?refcode=em20231023-1&refcode2=958_552475_sh8jOf&akid=958%2E552475%2Esh8jOf)
Hi Peter, it's Tammy Duckworth.
**[I'm respectfully asking if you'll make a contribution to support my friend Bob Casey's re-election campaign. Let me tell you why.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231023-1?refcode=em20231023-1&refcode2=958_552475_sh8jOf&akid=958%2E552475%2Esh8jOf)**
Bob is a fierce advocate for working families in Pennsylvania and across the country and, right now, he's facing the toughest campaign of his career. **This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of 2024, and the stakes couldn't be higher.**
Mitch McConnell and national Republicans have zeroed in on Pennsylvania as a must-win Senate race in their mission to take back the majority. They're preparing to do everything they can to regain Senate control by coming after Bob and flipping Pennsylvania red.
Not only that, but Bob's new opponent, David McCormick, has the ability to self-fund. That means PA could see even more political spending than it did in 2022 -- _and I don't think you need me to remind you that they spent a record-breaking $381 million in PA last time around._
**[We need to stand with Bob to keep a real Pennsylvanian in the Senate, and defend our Democratic majority. Bob is relying on this team to have his back, so I hope you'll chip in a few dollars to support him today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231023-1?refcode=em20231023-1&refcode2=958_552475_sh8jOf&akid=958%2E552475%2Esh8jOf)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231023-1?refcode=em20231023-1&refcode2=958_552475_sh8jOf&akid=958%2E552475%2Esh8jOf)**
Thank you for your support. I truly appreciate it.
All my best,
Tammy Duckworth

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: A tale of dueling headlines: Courier vs. The New York Times
body:
Headlines and the words behind them tell a story of their own.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066902/434145120/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTE1MDNkYWMtZGM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HhvN0KadOgZLUrNldh2ykun0_NF9m0e9NAyQdtoPXe4=&emci=8346e5d1-cf71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=11503dac-dc71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
_The New York Times_ has become so ubiquitous in our media landscape, that it’s often called the “newspaper of record.”
Despite this, the Times’ headlines often miss the mark and fail to tell the whole story.
**So, what happens when news organizations like _The New York Times_ fall short in their headlines? Take a look for yourself: ⬇️**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066903/434145121/641188570?refcode=em20231023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTE1MDNkYWMtZGM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HhvN0KadOgZLUrNldh2ykun0_NF9m0e9NAyQdtoPXe4=)**
**The result:** The Times and other news organizations often write headlines that sand down the sharp edges of the GOP’s extremism and fail to provide the essential context needed to understand a story.
**Unlike the Times and other mainstream outlets, at Courier, we’re committed to writing headlines and stories that _not only_ tell the full story but won’t whitewash the GOP’s extremism. Take a look at the difference:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066904/434145122/641188570?refcode=em20231023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTE1MDNkYWMtZGM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HhvN0KadOgZLUrNldh2ykun0_NF9m0e9NAyQdtoPXe4=)
**[If you're ready to support honest, good journalism that won't water down the truth, can you chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066905/434145123/641188570?refcode=em20231023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTE1MDNkYWMtZGM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HhvN0KadOgZLUrNldh2ykun0_NF9m0e9NAyQdtoPXe4=)**
The Times' timid approach to its headlines spreads far beyond its readership because many other news organizations follow its lead and mimic this misguided approach. It’s this same method that provides an opening to right-wing bad actors and others by allowing them to propagate and spread misinformation.
Our growing network of nine newsrooms nationwide offers an alternative to the mainstream media’s overly sensationalized headlines and profit-driven intent. And we will never compromise our values to make a quick buck. As a result, we rely on grassroots supporters like you to power the reporting that comes from our newsrooms. **[If you're able to, can you pitch in anything you can today to support our values-driven reporting?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066906/434145124/641188570?refcode=em20231023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTE1MDNkYWMtZGM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HhvN0KadOgZLUrNldh2ykun0_NF9m0e9NAyQdtoPXe4=)**
**[Donate now ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066907/434145125/641188570?refcode=em20231023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTE1MDNkYWMtZGM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HhvN0KadOgZLUrNldh2ykun0_NF9m0e9NAyQdtoPXe4=)**
Together,
Courier Newsroom

[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066908/434145126/1416945388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTE1MDNkYWMtZGM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HhvN0KadOgZLUrNldh2ykun0_NF9m0e9NAyQdtoPXe4=&emci=8346e5d1-cf71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=11503dac-dc71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
[**Update Your Information**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72066909/434145127/1324474970?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTE1MDNkYWMtZGM3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HhvN0KadOgZLUrNldh2ykun0_NF9m0e9NAyQdtoPXe4=&emci=8346e5d1-cf71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=11503dac-dc71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
**[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XCUEQN0BTUWWQ1xBmQeS9g2?unsubscribedata=KlpCwy%2BXtiNAhbnadUqSb1IcKhkMyzCkHJwvkIEkhm%2Fk1b1%2FeA7BUqw6Em%2B3%2BYgEge5tXa47ZLYyhOTLWu5JcT%2BAd41HKDUtBxGPwkzSi4QUXdCJ6kSy0J8MkYTFLnAXRZmXpZAY%2BtaSi%2BDFUxPKixlvm8PhjtgxBUMeafK5bHdOXSvCM5EtbBiCwagOWaxUFdsYrRW5NyQqZ2EwyahRkFCKnsMA1AOAeMW2aI7CFDOFXLo7iQHLN5oc0ui6GJUCpV2knBNdWWwTo50UrWTc8%2BzQq0V2MgYMN0BzYRcyRKAajYetCogjxQVHS8N6Ho0HrEqkzQ0kIc5vbNbrqyFhEWA6tu9ADAkSJ%2F%2Fq9ZPB0OZX0bxOjJV%2F4WrTctHaXiMAtzNkzdvP8etbR%2BnLU2IZhRhcP0qovIaS6ZUe%2BIlaAdZxzf11Png7kxT2IRznRRKs)**

body:
Democrats are racing to undermine election integrity ahead of the most important election of our lifetimes.
If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY.
| |

---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=ebbec7ee4aba48ce80372b2f83d536c1&_t=-bow6J44HKgrhI2CuZSDHBI4BrFOYCQ79Elv4qLOfG86eYD0mAbUlF7wxklTNj0MVyUt3arQuh9XNsWnFMrIb4X62rITzCDscSvYWxIJ8sU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=ebbec7ee4aba48ce80372b2f83d536c1&_t=-bow6J44HKgrhI2CuZSDHBI4BrFOYCQ79Elv4qLOfG86eYD0mAbUlF7wxklTNj0MVyUt3arQuh9XNsWnFMrIb4X62rITzCDscSvYWxIJ8sU%3D)

| Friend -

Democrats are racing to undermine election integrity ahead of the most important election of our lifetimes.
- **FIRST:** Deep-blue cities like New York and DC made it LEGAL for non-U.S. citizens to vote in local elections.

- **THEN:** Joe Biden SUED red states for enforcing voter identification laws.

- **NOW:** Democrats are filing LEGAL ACTION to gut strong election integrity measures in the swing state of North Carolina.
_If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections ... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY._

_**[I'm personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ebbec7ee4aba48ce80372b2f83d536c1&_e=unQO72KyAes_EOmEjEfG-hWMd8nz3-AQGHZseJbdiV7GyBpFX2acOpaUnN9iZLibT_OqEEik3YgftYUcnxItGUgiyqDbVvfFpGB3NKK5lWSLTJm9q9EWRfrWSH1FKAQ2paR88kFU1nzVPjqzIIp8Ju2hEb5DFzYfaQfCPryGUnRUVj0JtUABzFZUCsh4pgs4I0XIXsoyK6I5jCIFz8GwE-tm0k5lj5_kjVlY8abTRcDLpfyN-_rnM5aKT25KV4GrJBI8BFFXpNTiv_fisy3eOdjWYxHlbZkJUqbny91yrAkmgxxjVGjEGvjCI4Fzi_bM-u09efQeq7oyrfC2-kpRZNmZyi1Ujfzzz-7nNOUeMSo3Kcl2XM-qUaJkQjLqJx80t_AOi2tm_N0OTUABvLA4fDRVKlyddDVFpsABIcwU45c%3D "I’m personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.")**_
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME: FEDERALLY MANDATE VOTER ID LAWS](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ebbec7ee4aba48ce80372b2f83d536c1&_e=unQO72KyAes_EOmEjEfG-hWMd8nz3-AQGHZseJbdiV7GyBpFX2acOpaUnN9iZLibT_OqEEik3YgftYUcnxItGUgiyqDbVvfFpGB3NKK5lWSLTJm9q9EWRfrWSH1FKAQ2paR88kFU1nzVPjqzIIp8Ju2hEb5DFzYfaQfCPryGUnRUVj0JtUABzFZUCsh4pgs4I0XIXsoyK6I5jCIFz8GwE-tm0k5lj5_kjVlY8abTRcDLpfyN-_rnM5aKT25KV4GrabdNav2dffSsPv_KMwplXU19pVnoolGFrmieKsFrsCmjm5-ZghJpk6dHPbeBbM5rZfmaZu-mD_kQQb-mS1ygPXV-rjyDrxs9fyLYB_SVnPUpqEJ2rQTf33dvGcvUHi6RVOtdy7GJxxAG7h51ZleUmENGbtA6K0kubPLeRJjiiyE%3D "ADD YOUR NAME: FEDERALLY MANDATE VOTER ID LAWS")
---
Look:

Last time the Democrats were in power, they attempted to fast-track an election-rigging scheme that would have irreparably undermined the security of our elections. They wanted to use your tax dollars to fund their campaigns, federalize our elections, and destroy voter ID laws NATIONWIDE.

**They called their election-rigging scheme HR 1 - meaning helping prevent Conservatives from winning elections was their FIRST PRIORITY when they controlled the House.**

If they think the American People are willing to turn a blind eye to this critical issue, it would only empower them to push harder.

**That 's where you come in.**

_**[We're pleading with every Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws. Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections once and for all.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ebbec7ee4aba48ce80372b2f83d536c1&_e=unQO72KyAes_EOmEjEfG-hWMd8nz3-AQGHZseJbdiV7GyBpFX2acOpaUnN9iZLibT_OqEEik3YgftYUcnxItGUgiyqDbVvfFpGB3NKK5lWSLTJm9q9EWRfrWSH1FKAQ2paR88kFU1nzVPjqzIIp8Ju2hEb5DFzYfaQfCPryGUnRUVj0JtUABzFZUCsh4pgs4I0XIXsoyK6I5jCIFz8GwE-tm0k5lj5_kjVlY8abTRcDLpfyN-_rnM5aKT25KV4GrpEaY_9jQkvuZEjsT3Lu8-UihHHew2CXriv9cPayJbGkxsth7YbQN2H50GVRE6KIa421ZEYrBsTN3nq8Hp0mXqhnDZcmRid4uKk9sDGQ4nmlF4L3U8JWpWMiGDOyaBXEu8YytMzI0KDKo35Es54zLHGwmgjLVF5N54Nrs6xth1KE%3D "We’re pleading with every Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws. Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections once and for all.")**_

Can I count on seeing your name? _I hope so._

For America,

Steve Scalise

clean_body: Democrats are racing to undermine election integrity ahead of the most important election of our lifetimes. If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY. | | | | | | Friend - Democrats are racing to undermine election integrity ahead of the most important election of our lifetimes. - FIRST: Deep-blue cities like New York and DC made it LEGAL for non-U.S. citizens to vote in local elections. - THEN: Joe Biden SUED red states for enforcing voter identification laws. - NOW: Democrats are filing LEGAL ACTION to gut strong election integrity measures in the swing state of North Carolina. If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections ... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY. "I’m personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America." | | | "ADD YOUR NAME: FEDERALLY MANDATE VOTER ID LAWS" Look: Last time the Democrats were in power, they attempted to fast-track an election-rigging scheme that would have irreparably undermined the security of our elections. They wanted to use your tax dollars to fund their campaigns, federalize our elections, and destroy voter ID laws NATIONWIDE. They called their election-rigging scheme HR 1 - meaning helping prevent Conservatives from winning elections was their FIRST PRIORITY when they controlled the House. If they think the American People are willing to turn a blind eye to this critical issue, it would only empower them to push harder. That 's where you come in. "We’re pleading with every Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws. Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections once and for all." Can I count on seeing your name? I hope so. For America, Steve Scalise | AMAZING news! You're only 1 GIFT AWAY from receiving a coveted spot in Steve Scalise's Majority Leader Founding Circle! There is no minimum donation to join, even $5 will snag your place in this premier digital membership of elite grassroots supporters. | | "button" | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003

name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: Climate-Smart Ag Conversation with Congresswoman Salinas - You’re Invited!
body:
| | | Dear Peter, Join OLCV and our partners at PCUN (farmworker union) and Friends of Family Farmers to host a **Climate-Smart Ag Conversation with special guest Congresswoman Andrea Salinas.** Hear from our expert panel about climate-smart agriculture practices, farmworker rights, and improvements to the federal Farm Bill that will benefit small farmers, farmworkers, and the climate. [RSVP here!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72067547/434147670/1717855909?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhMWY3N2M1LWRlNzEtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=coewRGwbv6BxEVjNBkhCjCKAthpfzZzd_oiXQuivZeg=&emci=ba074b60-d271-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=1a1f77c5-de71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) **WHEN:** Thursday, November 2nd from 12 - 1:15 PM
**WHERE:** Zoom ([RSVP to receive the link](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72067550/434147674/1717855909?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhMWY3N2M1LWRlNzEtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=coewRGwbv6BxEVjNBkhCjCKAthpfzZzd_oiXQuivZeg=&emci=ba074b60-d271-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=1a1f77c5-de71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)) Climate change, agriculture and farming, and farmworker rights are all interconnected. From crop yields reduced by drought to dangerous working conditions due to extreme weather and wildfire smoke-- the way we farm and grow our food impacts our climate, and our climate should influence our practices. Join us to learn more about these connections and how farmers, farmworkers, and climate activists can work together to adapt and find solutions. Our special guest Congresswoman Andrea Salinas will also share about her role on the House Committee on Agriculture and how she’s working to make positive and climate-smart improvements to the federal Farm Bill. [**RSVP and submit a question for our expert panel and the Congresswoman today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72067553/434147677/1717855909?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhMWY3N2M1LWRlNzEtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=coewRGwbv6BxEVjNBkhCjCKAthpfzZzd_oiXQuivZeg=&emci=ba074b60-d271-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=1a1f77c5-de71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)
I hope you can make it!
Lindsey Scholten
Executive Director, OLCV |

body:

Folks, After three failed attempts to make Jim Jordan Speaker, the GOP has a new slate of contestants _**\- and seven out of nine are election deniers that voted against certifying election results in Arizona, Pennsylvania, or both.**_ **❌ Rep. Kevin Hern (R-OK)
❌ Rep. Dan Meuser (R-Pa)
❌ Rep. Gary Palmer (R-Ala)
❌ Rep. Pete Sessions (R-TX)
❌ Rep. Mike Johnson (R-LA)
❌ Rep. Jack Bergman (R-MI)
❌ Rep. Byron Donalds (R-FL)** Get the point, folks? Election deniers are officially in the driver’s seat of the Republican Party, and are showing no signs of backing down. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Friend, what's on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I want to know what’s on your mind, what keeps you up at night, and what you want Democratic leaders to focus on most.
| | |
---
Friend,
My name is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. You might know me as a former Congresswoman from Florida, as a gun safety advocate, or as the Democrat running to defeat GOP Sen. Rick Scott and flip the Sunshine State blue.
I’m in this race because the fate of our democracy is on the line. I believe we deserve better than Rick Scott and the many other extremists in Washington.
Families like yours are at the heart of my campaign. That’s why I’m reaching out: **I want to know what’s on your mind, what keeps you up at night, and what you want Democratic leaders to focus on most.[_So please, will you take my exclusive Democratic strategy survey before midnight tonight? Your feedback is incredibly important to me and will help shape our 2024 strategy._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72067809/434148604/-685092938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk239-su-nd&refcode=jtk239-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1YjY3NzUtZGY3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DJm3cY5jhOw81UdJsoqesiqbDJHvXPZp8v4_NDok0ME=&emci=63d62d47-8f6f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=185b6775-df71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=3969733)**
| | [Take the Survey Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72067810/434148605/-685092938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk239-su-nd&refcode=jtk239-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1YjY3NzUtZGY3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DJm3cY5jhOw81UdJsoqesiqbDJHvXPZp8v4_NDok0ME=&emci=63d62d47-8f6f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=185b6775-df71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=3969733)
---
For the past few years, I’ve watched a minority of extremists push my state down a path of right-wing extremism and divisiveness, all while attacking our cherished democratic institutions.
The far-right leadership in my state has banned books, created an elections police unit to scare voters, attacked LGBTQ+ youth, and left families defenseless against gun violence. In Washington, Rick Scott has pushed for a nationwide ban on abortions, an end to Social Security, and higher taxes on working families.
Unfortunately, this is a trend that’s happening across the country. **It keeps me up at night — wondering what kind of country we’ll leave behind for our children. And I know I’m not the only one.**
But if Democrats like you and me all stand together, we can defeat this dangerous extremism and leave behind a better, kinder country for our children. That’s why your input is so important as we iron out our campaign strategy. **[_So please, will you respond to my new survey before midnight tonight to help me build a winning strategy and flip Florida blue in 2024?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72067811/434148606/-685092938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk239-su-nd&refcode=jtk239-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1YjY3NzUtZGY3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DJm3cY5jhOw81UdJsoqesiqbDJHvXPZp8v4_NDok0ME=&emci=63d62d47-8f6f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=185b6775-df71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=3969733)**
| | [Take the Survey Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72067812/434148607/-685092938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk239-su-nd&refcode=jtk239-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1YjY3NzUtZGY3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DJm3cY5jhOw81UdJsoqesiqbDJHvXPZp8v4_NDok0ME=&emci=63d62d47-8f6f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=185b6775-df71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=3969733)

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

clean_body: Hold the Line. | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden's open border policies have created an unsustainable crisis fueled by record-high numbers of illegal border crossings, human smuggling, and Mexican drug cartel activity. In response to Biden 's refusal to take responsibility for the crisis he created and secure the border, Texas has taken matters into our own hands. Under Governor Abbott's leadership, Operation Lone Star continues to take unprecedented action to SECURE the border and keep Texans - AND Americans - safe. But instead of thanking Texas for filling the dangerous gaps Joe Biden created with his open border policies, his Administration is infringing on Texas' fundamental right to defend our sovereign border. Can you believe that? Texas will not back down, Fellow Conservative. Texas will use every tool and strategy to protect Texas and our nation from Biden's border crisis. Show Governor Abbott you support his historic fight to defend our Texas border. Remember: Governor Abbott is not just fighting for Texas, Fellow Conservative. He 's doing what it takes to keep ALL Americans safe! Thank you, Team Abbott ******** POLITICAL AD PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT PO BOX 308, AUSTIN, TEXAS 78767

clean_body: [] The lack of a House Speaker is crippling the Nation's business [] CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] Michigan's 1st district needs a representative focused on unity and progress. The government must function. This standstill has to stop. Four weeks remain before the U.S. defaults on its debts. Without Congressional intervention, federal firefighters will see significant pay cuts. We need to save Social Security. The Farm Bill's fate is uncertain. Ukraine and Israel are at war. These conflicts could quickly grow. We need bipartisan immigration reform. * We need comprehensive healthcare reform (Medicare for All) We elect representatives to work for us. Our side knows that when America’s energy sector thrives, America thrives.

body:

We’re in this race for the long haul. But it’s going to be tough. With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), Montanans deserve someone who will crack down on the special interests and corruption in Washington, not play political games and cut backroom deals. We need to fight to lower costs for hardworking families, create good-paying union jobs, and ensure rural communities have what they need, like reliable internet and hospitals within driving distance.

Peter, I’m not a career politician. I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. **I still farm the same land my grandparents homesteaded 100 years ago, and I try every day to do what’s right for the people of Montana and across the country.**

Because of that, I don’t have much patience for the fancy billionaires and shady super PACs a lot of other politicians rely on. Instead, I depend on grassroots supporters like you.

That’s why I’m so grateful you even opened this email. Emails like this one make up a big part of our budget. $5 here and $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours.

**So, here’s the part where I ask:[_Can you make a split contribution of $17.77 (our average online donation) today to Fight for Progress and my campaign to meet our October goal? My finance team just called me to let me know we’re still $23,736 short of our October fundraising goal—this is especially bad news because national Republican groups are attacking me earlier than ever before. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = We’re in this race for the long haul. But it’s going to be tough. With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), Montanans deserve someone who will crack down on the special interests and corruption in Washington, not play political games and cut backroom deals. We need to fight to lower costs for hardworking families, create good-paying union jobs, and ensure rural communities have what they need, like reliable internet and hospitals within driving distance. Peter, I’m not a career politician. I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I still farm the same land my grandparents homesteaded 100 years ago, and I try every day to do what’s right for the people of Montana and across the country. Because of that, I don’t have much patience for the fancy billionaires and shady super PACs a lot of other politicians rely on. Instead, I depend on grassroots supporters like you. That’s why I’m so grateful you even opened this email. Emails like this one make up a big part of our budget. $5 here and $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours. name: Hill Harper HQ
subject: We’re not backing down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Disruption is the name of the game when it comes to the status quo.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231023&t=1&akid=475%2E62735%2EPUuQs5)
Peter, one thing has been clear since we first launched this campaign for the U.S. Senate in Michigan: **We’re up against the establishment.**
We’re fighting this campaign the right way, by relying on people power, because it’s a core value of our fight.
This is about more than one election. This is about ushering in transformative change to Michigan and beyond._Including:_
🌍 **_Climate justice._**
✊ **_Pro-worker and pro-union policies._**
🧑⚖️ **_An end to the filibuster._**
🏥** _Universal Healthcare._**
**_And more!_**
Hill Harper is a single father, an active (and striking) union member, a small business owner, and exactly the type of representative we need in Congress.
[**Can you help us elect Hill now by contributing $5 or anything you can to our end-of-month goal of $11,000 from online digital donations? We could really use your help!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231023?amount=5&refcode=em20231023-475&refcode2=475_62735_PUuQs5&akid=475%2E62735%2EPUuQs5)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231023?amount=5&refcode=em20231023-475&refcode2=475_62735_PUuQs5&akid=475%2E62735%2EPUuQs5)**
We don’t need any more of the same cookie cutter politicians who are beholden to corporate money and interests. **It’s time to elect someone for the people!**
**[Can we count on your support today as we strive towards our $11,000 goal? We’re building this movement for U.S. Senate with people power — not corporate cash infusions. And that means we really need every small dollar donation we can get.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231023?amount=5&refcode=em20231023-475&refcode2=475_62735_PUuQs5&akid=475%2E62735%2EPUuQs5) **
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231023?amount=5&refcode=em20231023-475&refcode2=475_62735_PUuQs5&akid=475%2E62735%2EPUuQs5)**
Thanks for your support,
Team Hill Harper
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231023&t=2&refcode2=475_62735_PUuQs5&akid=475%2E62735%2EPUuQs5)**

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Need to fill you in on the situation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our team at Fetterman HQ juuuust wrapped up our weekly team call.
#
Derek,
Our team at Fetterman HQ juuuust wrapped up our weekly team call and I realized that _we've only got a little over 2 months left in 2023._ **[We'll need grassroots support to keep up with our 2023 goals, so if you can chip in now, thank you.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231023-1?refcode=em20231023-1-8633&refcode2=8633_434096_oYRWrG&akid=8633%2E434096%2EoYRWrG)** 🙏
We keep this campaign running year-round because your donation (of *any* amount) now goes further than in the heat of the election. That's because it allows us to keep up our campaign's infrastructure, build relationships with folks all over PA and the country, and help defend Democratic seats across the country that support the work John does in the Senate.
But I have some news from our call: **We're behind where we should be on our October fundraising targets.**
We really don't want to change our plans, so I'm hoping we can get back on track today if just about 1 in 8 people who read this chip in.
**[Derek, can you donate your first $5 right now to help us close the gap?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231023-1?refcode=em20231023-1-8633&refcode2=8633_434096_oYRWrG&akid=8633%2E434096%2EoYRWrG)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231023-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231023-8633&refcode2=8633_434096_oYRWrG&akid=8633%2E434096%2EoYRWrG)**
Your support was critical to making sure John represents the working people of Pennsylvania in the Senate. Every one of us is so glad you're part of this team.
Thanks for your help! 💙
Eric
Eric Stern, Senior Advisor
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231023-8633-footer&t=1&refcode2=8633_434096_oYRWrG&akid=8633%2E434096%2EoYRWrG)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Make Your Commitment to Vote Now!
| Team, with Ohio's pivotal ballot measure on reproductive rights gaining momentum – and early ballots already being cast – we have one question for you: **Have you voted yet?** Time is of the essence, and the countdown to Election Day is on.******[Will you commit to vote for Issue 1 on or before November 7?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72069113/434153449/1157415401?refcode=odp_em_231023_1&ms=odp_em_231023_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGRiMDA0OC1lNTcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VIYZh07ZOH4U4cCfV4KQ3_EfX8aOudl9_FD64HG6LMw=&emci=4ccd63f0-cd71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=14db0048-e571-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25291327)** Here's the deal: Anti-choice extremists are pouring substantial resources into their efforts to undermine Issue 1. They're worried and fighting hard to tear it down and advance their own extremist anti-choice agenda. ** ** **They’ve seen what we’ve seen: Across the country, voters have streamed to the polls in support of reproductive rights – and now it's Ohio's turn to make a stand for these rights.** We can't stress enough that your vote matters. Your voice is a powerful tool, and we're not just asking you to cast your vote. We're asking you to champion this cause, rally your friends, family, and neighbors, and remind them of the critical importance of this election. **[Sign our petition now to commit to voting in support of Issue 1, and then if you can, make a contribution to help us reach every voter in Ohio and ensure we can protect a full range of reproductive rights in our constitution>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72069114/434153450/1157415401?refcode=odp_em_231023_1&ms=odp_em_231023_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGRiMDA0OC1lNTcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VIYZh07ZOH4U4cCfV4KQ3_EfX8aOudl9_FD64HG6LMw=&emci=4ccd63f0-cd71-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=14db0048-e571-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25291327)** Your action today can make a world of difference. body:
Last week, Texas Republicans unveiled House Bill 1, the latest effort in their aggressive campaign to attack public schools and reduce fair access to education. | | **_The Texas Tribune:_
“Texas House Republicans Unveil Priority Voucher Bill”******

Last week, Texas Republicans unveiled House Bill 1, the latest effort in their aggressive campaign to attack public schools and reduce fair access to education.

**[If you agree with Dr. Brian Williams that Texas needs to support ALL public schools, not vouchers, add your name to this petition>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72069339/434154198/-464456256?ms=em23_231023_SVP_fnd_gq_act___TW_ettx&refcode=em23_231023_SVP_fnd_gq_act___TW_ettx&source=em23_231023_SVP_fnd_gq_act___TW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231023_SVP_fnd_gq_act___TW_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=UciRoeTipG0Hg+xfwu4GpEunypqRPYUt6Ua58nL19ldl5dzmXhsKY1S3hGAhwgyZAioHNIeScwO1StOMuiLiVXxWmeAASu4wfYQKrwHq7RYyhVeQS0NKGJ4EC6JUlNsM3RIB+lV6SweXAdyy4/9eow==&refcode2=c87156b7-e671-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzg3MTU2YjctZTY3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CfyUyBqxxBtodBCdrFfDCMGFuXfsQByFJ6A_HEFYOBU=&emci=e0452b77-d071-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=c87156b7-e671-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)**

Peter —

Dr. Brian Williams is the proud product of public schools. Growing up, he and his sister received a quality public education that would eventually guide his path toward a career as an engineer for the Air Force and later as a trauma surgeon in Texas.

Now more than ever, he believes that a strong public school system with well-qualified, well-paid teachers is an investment in our future. Public funds belong in public schools. Period.

Voucher schemes divert taxpayer dollars from our already-underfunded public education system to support private institutions. **These policies disproportionately hurt rural schools, exclude students with disabilities, and increase segregation in the Texas school system.**

With Texas teachers' salaries already over $7,000 _below_ the national average, bills like HB1 would further slash teacher’s salaries and threaten the very survival of underserved school districts around Texas.

Dr. Brian Williams believes that every child in Texas deserves a quality education and an equal opportunity to thrive. **[That’s why he stands against HB1 and other “voucher bills.” Are you with him? clean_body: Last week, Texas Republicans unveiled House Bill 1, the latest effort in their aggressive campaign to attack public schools and reduce fair access to education. | | The Texas Tribune: “Texas House Republicans Unveil Priority Voucher Bill”** Last week, Texas Republicans unveiled House Bill 1, the latest effort in their aggressive campaign to attack public schools and reduce fair access to education. | Peter — Dr. Brian Williams is the proud product of public schools. Growing up, he and his sister received a quality public education that would eventually guide his path toward a career as an engineer for the Air Force and later as a trauma surgeon in Texas. Now more than ever, he believes that a strong public school system with well-qualified, well-paid teachers is an investment in our future. Public funds belong in public schools. Period. Voucher schemes divert taxpayer dollars from our already-underfunded public education system to support private institutions. These policies disproportionately hurt rural schools, exclude students with disabilities, and increase segregation in the Texas school system. With Texas teachers' salaries already over $7,000 below the national average, bills like HB1 would further slash teacher’s salaries and threaten the very survival of underserved school districts around Texas. Dr. Brian Williams believes that every child in Texas deserves a quality education and an equal opportunity to thrive. Thank you, Team Williams = | | Click to unsubscribe from our email list. Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Veteran, trauma surgeon, and Democrat running for Congress in Texas' 32nd district to fix our broken systems and create life-saving change. * Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress Dr. Brian Williams for Congress PO Box 180725 Dallas, TX 75218 United States

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: What we're working on
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

These are the issues Powered by People is working on this week:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

EARLY VOTING STARTS

Early voting in the November 2023 elections begins today. Every ballot in
Texas will have 14 constitutional amendments to vote on. Depending on
where you live, your ballot may also include important local races for
school board, mayor, and more.

* [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59247?source=ema20231023-233801&t=1001&akid=233801%2E444211%2ESbjr5i ]Learn what’s on your ballot and find your polling place.
* [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59254?c0=20231023.jZQ0v5&c1=233801.q-Xfic&t=1002&akid=233801%2E444211%2ESbjr5i ]Read about the constitutional amendments on the ballot.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

THE PLAN TO SAVE OUR SCHOOLS

As Abbott continues his push for a voucher scam that would defund public
schools to subsidize private education for the wealthy, Democrats have a
plan to stop him and to fully fund our schools.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59249?source=ema20231023-233801&t=1003&akid=233801%2E444211%2ESbjr5i ]Watch this TikTok where I break down where things stand in this fight:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59249?source=ema20231023-233801&t=1004&akid=233801%2E444211%2ESbjr5i ][IMG]

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59249?source=ema20231023-233801&t=1005&akid=233801%2E444211%2ESbjr5i ]WATCH

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

TEXAS BORDER LEGISLATION

Several harmful border bills are on the verge of passing the Texas
Legislature this week. They would allow state and local police to separate
families at the border, illegally imprison asylum seekers, and subject
Latino border residents to racial profiling by law enforcement.

These bills are nothing more than political stunts that will only worsen
the challenges at our border. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59250?si=jIfdjpGhmRubHI-s%3Fsource%3Dema20231023-233801&t=1006&akid=233801%2E444211%2ESbjr5i ]If you’re interested in the real
solutions to this humanitarian crisis, you can listen to a conversation I
recently hosted with Andrea Flores, an immigration expert at FWD.us.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59250?si=jIfdjpGhmRubHI-s%3Fsource%3Dema20231023-233801&t=1007&akid=233801%2E444211%2ESbjr5i ][IMG]

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59250?si=jIfdjpGhmRubHI-s%3Fsource%3Dema20231023-233801&t=1008&akid=233801%2E444211%2ESbjr5i ]WATCH

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

LOCAL ABORTION ATTACKS

This week, Lubbock County and the City of Amarillo are considering
ordinances to ban women from traveling out of state to seek an abortion,
which would empower vigilantes to stalk, harass, and sue women traveling
on local roads.

If you live in these areas, you still have time to fight back:

* LUBBOCK: Contact your County Commissioners and urge them to REJECT the
anti-abortion measures on Item #4 on today’s agenda. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59253?t=1009&akid=233801%2E444211%2ESbjr5i ]You can find
their contact info here.

* AMARILLO: City Council will meet TOMORROW at 3 PM to consider these
measures. If you can, show up to the meeting in the Council Chamber of
City Hall (601 S. Buchanan Street, 3rd Floor) and wear green to show
your opposition. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58665?source=ema20231023-233801&t=1010&akid=233801%2E444211%2ESbjr5i ]If you can’t make it, you can submit public
comments on agenda item #11.A here.

If you live elsewhere in Texas and are aware of similar measures being
considered in your community, please respond to this email so that we can
work together to fight back.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

I hope it’s a great week for you.

— Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1011&akid=233801%2E444211%2ESbjr5i

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Team Sepi
subject: Waiting to hear from you, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Friend — did you see Sepi's email?

Our communities have been overlooked and ignored by the political system for too long. When Sepi says she'll be a champion for all of us, she means it.

But to do that, we need to hear from you. Will you take two minutes to tell us what matters to you, friend?

Just reply to this email — we'll read every response, and your answers will help shape our campaign priorities.

Thank you for being part of our movement.

Team Sepi

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mayor Sepi Shyne < info@sepishyne.com [info@sepishyne.com] >
Date: Fri, Oct 20, 2023 at 2:33 PM
Subject: Your voice in Congress
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Friend,

If you know me, you know some of the issues that brought me to public service — women's rights, workers' rights, protection for immigrants and refugees, affordable healthcare, and LGBTQ+ rights, just to name a few.

But this campaign isn't about me. It's about our community. It's about making sure that all of us have a voice in Congress, especially those of us who have been underrepresented and unheard for far too long.

That's why I want to hear from you, friend. Will you take a quick minute to reply to this email with your top three policy priorities?

I'd love to hear your perspective on issues like health care, our environment, reproductive rights, and more. My team and I will read every single response!

Thanks so much, friend.

With gratitude,

Mayor Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103922/images/Copy%20of%20Sepi%20high%20res%20headshot-min.jpg]
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=06dae400-e771-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=06dae400-e771-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]
PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sqaIzVkaz0K_jaO3jvOJ8Q2?unsubscribedata=Kh6Fdr%2BBXnDnba6esoHBo1JHI5G4QWAnIVdDRrB1zC0MZmqv1jR9r16lrwGFGyNSwQdmRCY6c7IXfYqHalqFwP9cKtec04%2FCkiKfCGefiI6asyT9IO1AxBIvriQICGrdr1R4GZ9LV6qJ6rOu%2BPL4kgtG5FIpO5w9XUHJVf90%2BuHjWiB8qc4BiU8k7nIE9N0U1S6vop1I1sLyQjXU5A1iPAi4qR8SxCZSdAaDKEFupS0oyJ0TzzFN3CGbMFz3pYtg8cvA4b3yvgKaoyLdKgfoF9nLD6qOXR%2BNgHgaoPdGTn06e71rCJW%2FGXJvyKIJdteewBc3In0j2%2BGQ2yxRXs%2F90PJ%2FcY%2F%2B8FEU87OKrwHeRPpcFCMpCmK4y2clbH%2FvOtZAvstE%2BvbwIHLyqmSZNBM%2FfFu5y3al1BWij6mu7xt%2FpPZoCMcw4Pyu6%2B4o8rJcjxuE] . name: Rhena Hicks
subject: Read My Op-Ed About How I Won't Stop Fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Hello Peter -
Freedom Virginia is committed to lowering the cost of medicine here in Virginia. Thanks to President Joe Biden and the implementation of the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA), our country is taking a step to lowering the cost of prescriptions but there is still more to be done! We must still pass a Prescription Drug Affordability Board to lower costs for ALL Virginians.
Read my Op-Ed in the Virginia Dogwood discussing the Inflation Reduction Act and its impact on Virginia and a future PDAB below: [https://vadogwood.com/2023/10/17/op-ed-virginia-general-assembly-must-build-on-the-cost-savings-of-the-ira/]
https://vadogwood.com/2023/10/17/op-ed-virginia-general-assembly-must-build-on-the-cost-savings-of-the-ira/ [https://vadogwood.com/2023/10/17/op-ed-virginia-general-assembly-must-build-on-the-cost-savings-of-the-ira/]
Voters across Virginia will decide on November 7th what they’d like for the future of our Commonwealth. There is a distinct opportunity for us to build on the work that was done by the IRA if we elect champions to the General Assembly that are dedicated to lowering the cost of prescription drugs.
Thank you for your support,
Rhena Hicks
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva]
Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc.
Freedom Virginia
PO Box 10102
Norfolk, VA 23513
United States

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72069435/434154963/417269932?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RRFC_20231023_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDZmZGI0MjMtZTc3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rTf56XrFmmLlrbmKPsZ4yhx4fwuJ9b9G3eS7JmliN2g=) Folks,

Have I ever told you how I got into public service?

**I grew up the son of hardworking farmworkers.** My family lived in a small trailer in rural California where my brother and I shared a bed that in the daytime converted into a kitchen table.

When I was a teenager, I walked in the desert heat to different businesses asking them to invest in our community by investing in me and my dreams of a college education. I made them a promise that I would come back to the Coachella Valley to serve our community as a physician in return for their trust in me.

I not only returned to serve as an emergency physician, but eventually was elected to serve my community in Congress. For more than a decade, I’ve fought every day for my family, friends, and neighbors who dream the same dream my parents had for me.

**Those memories have come flooding back lately.** Because I’ve spent the last week listening to the MAGA circus go round after round, attacking each other, blaming Democrats, and doing everything they can _EXCEPT_ serving the American people.

**And that’s part and parcel for the extreme MAGA caucus.** Instead of doing the hard work of reaching across the aisle to build consensus, they grind our government to a halt to play partisan games.

Instead of building progress and promise for the next generation of Americans, they desperately scratch and claw their way to their own power, everyone else be damned. **They’re not public servants – they only serve themselves, and I’m sick of it.**

**They need to get their house in order. They need to end the chaos. They need to do their jobs. But I’m not waiting around for them, team, I’m taking action.**

[**I’m taking a lesson from my teenage self here – together we can defeat the MAGA chaos caucus and win back control of the House. But I can’t do it alone. So I’m counting on you here, friend. Can you pitch in $10 (or anything you can afford) toward our 1,000 donation goal today and help us take back our House Majority and end the MAGA chaos? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72069439/434154968/417269932?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RRFC_20231023_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDZmZGI0MjMtZTc3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rTf56XrFmmLlrbmKPsZ4yhx4fwuJ9b9G3eS7JmliN2g=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72069491/434155025/417269932?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=RRFC_20231023_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDZmZGI0MjMtZTc3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rTf56XrFmmLlrbmKPsZ4yhx4fwuJ9b9G3eS7JmliN2g=)

clean_body: | Hello there! Emails are our best tool to keep in touch with supporters, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you no longer want to receive emails from us, please . = = Folks, Have I ever told you how I got into public service? I grew up the son of hardworking farmworkers. My family lived in a small trailer in rural California where my brother and I shared a bed that in the daytime converted into a kitchen table. When I was a teenager, I walked in the desert heat to different businesses asking them to invest in our community by investing in me and my dreams of a college education. I made them a promise that I would come back to the Coachella Valley to serve our community as a physician in return for their trust in me. I not only returned to serve as an emergency physician, but eventually was elected to serve my community in Congress. For more than a decade, I’ve fought every day for my family, friends, and neighbors who dream the same dream my parents had for me. Those memories have come flooding back lately. Because I’ve spent the last week listening to the MAGA circus go round after round, attacking each other, blaming Democrats, and doing everything they can EXCEPT serving the American people. And that’s part and parcel for the extreme MAGA caucus. Instead of doing the hard work of reaching across the aisle to build consensus, they grind our government to a halt to play partisan games. Instead of building progress and promise for the next generation of Americans, they desperately scratch and claw their way to their own power, everyone else be damned. They’re not public servants – they only serve themselves, and I’m sick of it. They need to get their house in order. They need to end the chaos. They need to do their jobs. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Karine Jean-Pierre
body:
The White House is sending a loud, clear message

| |
---
| | Friend, Joe Biden's White House just changed the requirements for a journalist to obtain hard-pass credentials. The result... ...effectively banning our client, Simon Ateba, and more than 440 reporters from the White House Briefing Room. The White House is sending a loud, clear message: if you don't work for CNN, _The New York Times_ , or another legacy media outlet, and if you refuse to mindlessly lob soft balls to Karine Jean-Pierre about Joe Biden's ice cream du jour, you don't belong in the White House Press Corps. Because this White House doesn't respect the freedom of the press. **[Which is why I'm asking you for an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help fund Simon's lawsuit against the White House and Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88cc432d77a44955ab2495ecbc30148b&_e=BV-erQut5wqVXEHioZ1tlGqL5IZ-KqzobxhM-HWIJrKSeY_b73yCg0HsIC7ltU97SC5-Gaxl0h22r8GmRNzMsVx-TxT61rWjSC9ifyAKg7JHZYlIJ6caQumUWZswOkYOLvP4sK-J3xUeEqO6ig31a29HWLrdhh5gW8a3yJN1xTjrDkSFKF0fAOCGaxE-voXQZeNxJuB_bdFpP_Tfy_62ZV8rcWV4-tD94wUM_zwE1cFU5bacdyKwCv7o7OL-HuDuVYgn3ZPmxP22NKLZm7G1v2zVHdkgRgI_KPV0bZddC6MZTMy2x1_qwAuQAG7OmTgTj9aFkAaHrm5OmMMfHBm_aSq34UvvMH09kKSBfk4EmuV6l-2UTa5XMXCuhbGldBAI)** This White House has a terrible record of censoring journalists whose stories make the White House look bad. We all remember how the Biden Administration pressured "Big Tech" to censor journalists questioning the efficacy of the COVID-19 vaccine. Now, the White House is shifting its attention to our client, Simon Ateba. Simon Ateba is a journalist and White House correspondent with Today News Africa, a small a news organization focusing on ties and interactions between Africa and the United States. Simon frequently challenges Karine Jean-Pierre's non-answers, inaccurate information, and demands transparency and the truth. In response to Simon's insistence on getting the truth, the White House and Jean-Pierre changed the rules, I believe, to specifically target Simon and other journalists like him who want nothing more than to do their job as _real_ journalists. **That 's right - the White House rewrote the rules to shut out hundreds of hardworking reporters. ** And that's why we're suing the White House and Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre on behalf of reporter Simon Ateba. **[Will you send an urgent donation $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today to support our lawsuit on behalf of Simon Ateba and his fight for justice?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88cc432d77a44955ab2495ecbc30148b&_e=BV-erQut5wqVXEHioZ1tlGqL5IZ-KqzobxhM-HWIJrKSeY_b73yCg0HsIC7ltU97SC5-Gaxl0h22r8GmRNzMsVx-TxT61rWjSC9ifyAKg7JHZYlIJ6caQumUWZswOkYOLvP4sK-J3xUeEqO6ig31a29HWLrdhh5gW8a3yJN1xTjrDkSFKF0fAOCGaxE-voXQZeNxJuB_bdFpP_Tfy_62Za54RHVQkRIMvhCfwpbmlCk1lSUyctRyvZskvUwD7TwQbqvJxU2sEweNRHuW15wIqLBcnO3uUoOkRQiYWjkzwffxDXqoibtVa_m0sk0_5KDOVqE37GzfKZTBhZfkR2AbHTHD1xlnNFTB3BBnhLmdQK42vtjXRTS1127RKReMsEUX)** You and I know the White House's actions here are a clear violation of the freedom of the press. This is bigger than Simon or any one journalist, Friend. Because the Biden Administration doesn't just want to shut up Simon... ... it wants to censor every journalist who challenges the White House's lies, corruption, or abuse of power. We need your help right away. **[Which is why I'm asking you for an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help fund Simon's lawsuit against the White House and Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88cc432d77a44955ab2495ecbc30148b&_e=BV-erQut5wqVXEHioZ1tlGqL5IZ-KqzobxhM-HWIJrKSeY_b73yCg0HsIC7ltU97SC5-Gaxl0h22r8GmRNzMsVx-TxT61rWjSC9ifyAKg7JHZYlIJ6caQumUWZswOkYOLvP4sK-J3xUeEqO6ig31a29HWLrdhh5gW8a3yJN1xTjrDkSFKF0fAOCGaxE-voXQZeNxJuB_bdFpP_Tfy_62ZZdmUcxdxxxgoUvhwgJQjYpd5wb8avsUH4SSmoXosnrIZ-dYnzTD3Q8zDsEP1BeLnOlzZnFkT8HIEm1A2aLI3LNs--4qF7PkNAdIf5yKY7PbU2O8x2YNYr58i10RVan9FqH7Nh5hpxiBW153rdDWTfqncwg9z8OSiUqNQZ_Q1WL0)** **That 's why we've taken on Simon Ateba's legal battle - and why I hope you will step up and help us win this important battle.** Simon needs you, our attorneys need you, and your country needs you. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|

Because the Biden Administration doesn't just want to shut up Simon... ... it wants to censor every journalist who challenges the White House's lies, corruption, or abuse of power. We need your help right away. That 's why we've taken on Simon Ateba's legal battle - and why I hope you will step up and help us win this important battle. Simon needs you, our attorneys need you, and your country needs you. Thank you in advance for your support. | | Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Before I came to Congress:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Folks — Before coming to Congress, I spent my entire adult life as a labor activist, fighting to get hardworking people the pay and safe working conditions they deserve. I fought alongside firefighters, first responders, meatpackers, and grocery store workers to ensure they had the power to collectively bargain for better wages and benefits. From teachers to autoworkers and even writers in Hollywood, the power of organized labor has been on full display as workers come together to win the contracts they deserve. **But we need to do more for our workers.** Just last month, without notice or recourse, U.S. Steel pink-slipped hundreds of workers at the blast furnaces at its Granite City plant, blaming the “softening demand from the automotive industry during the United Auto Workers strike.” No company should be allowed to lay off their employees without notice, and I will never stop fighting in Congress until working-class people across our country have the protections they deserve. **[Will you show your support for my efforts to stand with workers and protect the hardworking families of Illinois by adding your name below?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72069665/434155481/183892196?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231023_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjY0YWQ1MS1lNzcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xn3tVoTbArEYsmSQF4txLr6Kfl0k9HHp4EMKmz3FbHI=&emci=21cb7c4a-e771-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=8264ad51-e771-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)** | [STAND WITH WORKERS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72069666/434155482/183892196?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231023_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjY0YWQ1MS1lNzcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xn3tVoTbArEYsmSQF4txLr6Kfl0k9HHp4EMKmz3FbHI=&emci=21cb7c4a-e771-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=8264ad51-e771-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)

I’m their target.

**This latest round of spending against me brings their total investment in this race to $866k.**

As I wrote to you last month, it’s obvious that we’ve struck a nerve with DC liberals. They know I will defeat Jon Tester and are looking to sling whatever mud they can my way.

| Peter:
---
| | I'm thrilled to share some incredible news with you.

**Former U.S. Congressman Steve King,** a true conservative champion, has just endorsed our campaign for NV-03! This endorsement means the world to me and signifies the momentum we're building together.

Former U.S. Congressman Steve King shared:

_"I’m pleased to endorse Elizabeth Helgelien for Congress... Elizabeth will not sell out... She is the candidate who will pull Congress to the Right, who won’t go woke and won’t spend us broke."_

---
| [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=20a5c0432e&e=54a81bd33c)

| His words resonate deeply with me. We have both experienced _["Walking Through the Fire"](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=0c59d8ff67&e=54a81bd33c)_ at the hands of an unfair press and political establishment. Receiving the endorsement of another America First Warrior is a testament to the movement we're building.

But, as you know, with big endorsements come bigger challenges. The establishment is taking notice, and they're gearing up to push back against our grassroots momentum.

That's why I'm reaching out to you today. [Can you chip in $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can to help us stand strong against the establishment onslaught?](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=54b469602e&e=54a81bd33c)
[Chip in $25 now

Donate another amount](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=c9a755c6a0&e=54a81bd33c)
Your support means everything. [Every dollar will help amplify our message, reach more Nevadans, and ensure our America First vision resonates across the district.](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=4ed819120a&e=54a81bd33c)

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

[ ** Join Bernie ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f2b51f38e2df4b7ebe49da78a5950497&_e=4tTSWwtpIALI7X1MDPjq7Z8nGaBbpH0ahLH_pHt02uzX3_a5TwUvYMVaQazW4MnOr8biXIfEjyKX94k5-kkUxT8syY9pKbZw_U6DPPlGUlONKy4pTqTqJu201sqCs-_6a9GJ0GqVsJXbvakU9-YEEAXe1l091EjGG1vsSAcBKalLZ6psTaiM-HkV9A0U-_ZaaevGL6geEw8jlQL13ScCqfivqvDwfotFCI1ooPd_sMkAbmSSfPUPPV7uL12jo3Lq-zCv9ACIK4K_HVWK6RigcJgr0dt_Itah8pyBLVIrxSpYxxATNZCI8wDGNM3E0f55gEDy7N6FvRkbg60jGHbfzsFpr-LSABSIl4CoMZT0MnTNWEq78j5lwlK7QH74D88bLZwtE1Vo0r8x6Ox3-tYXxqcCiaAF5CI-HcJT0FQculeBHa6Id150GXPKOv16qgbv9PRIhdSQMMZVh6eOZrVj2xnAXwyP4Hj7bZDRRbdUv1S9-C0x0RIkafitPIFL6OQa9oZJpgDj7gr1AFV668jMqyOzafDfm_LAiyQ6y1p0U9xsOh3Ze_TsAzvBVjd3q61e)

clean_body: | | | | Catch up on the latest news from Mike Lawler! Good evening, Peter! On this chilly autumn night, why don't you take a moment to catch up on the latest news from Congressman Mike Lawler? | UPCOMING ELECTION Reminder: there will be an election on Tuesday, November 7th, 2023 Today is the last day to request an absentee ballot online. Go to for more information. You can also check your registration status and find out when, where, and how you can vote at | REP. LAWLER IN THE NEWS | via Forbes Breaking News CBS News via Forbes Breaking News via PIX11 News via FOX News | TOP SOCIAL MEDIA POSTS | | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- =

**\----Original Message----**
**From:** Gloria Johnson
**Date:** Fri, Oct 20
**Subject:** I have a question for you...
> Y’all –
> I’m so grateful to this grassroots team. With your help, our campaign is shattering expectations – even setting a fundraising record for Democrats in our state right off the bat!
> We’re proving that a team of committed people can build a movement capable of taking on an entrenched Republican in a historically red state like Tennessee.
> But this is just the start. These first few months of our campaign are absolutely critical to ensuring we have the resources we need for the long haul.
> Your contribution _today_ will go that much further than a contribution made in October of 2024.
> That’s why, to express my gratitude for my earliest donors, I’ll be calling a few supporters directly next week to thank them for their contribution. I want to make sure you have a chance to be on that list.
> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72070357/434157676/209297649?refcode=ea.b10bdf3e-e971-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.b10bdf3e-e971-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTBiZGYzZS1lOTcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kDobg1v5zMmUrC56qtWbW1lvcqQDxIH5hhs51ktVxOw=)

> Unlike Marsha Blackburn who is backed by wealthy donors and corporate special interests, I rely on regular folks who give $5 or $50 at a time. Whether or not we get a chance to talk directly on the phone, I want you to know how much I appreciate your financial support.
> Thanks,

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

clean_body: Will your name be on Gloria’s list? | Hey y’all – We wanted to bump Gloria’s email to the top of your inbox! We’ll be randomly selecting a few donors from the past few days for Gloria to call and thank personally. It’s a great chance for Gloria to hear directly from supporters – and for supporters to learn more about Gloria and her ideas for rebuilding the middle class and strengthening our democracy. = | = \- Team Gloria \----Original Message---- From: Gloria Johnson Date: Fri, Oct 20 Subject: I have a question for you... Y’all – I’m so grateful to this grassroots team. With your help, our campaign is shattering expectations – even setting a fundraising record for Democrats in our state right off the bat! We’re proving that a team of committed people can build a movement capable of taking on an entrenched Republican in a historically red state like Tennessee. But this is just the start. These first few months of our campaign are absolutely critical to ensuring we have the resources we need for the long haul. Your contribution today will go that much further than a contribution made in October of 2024. That’s why, to express my gratitude for my earliest donors, I’ll be calling a few supporters directly next week to thank them for their contribution. I want to make sure you have a chance to be on that list. = = = --- Unlike Marsha Blackburn who is backed by wealthy donors and corporate special interests, I rely on regular folks who give $5 or $50 at a time. Whether or not we get a chance to talk directly on the phone, I want you to know how much I appreciate your financial support. Thanks, Gloria = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. name: Katie Porter
subject: A sponge and a story about corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
even before Kevin McCarthy was ousted and Republicans couldn't choose a replacement, Congress was messy.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31936%2E3422442%2EKqVl7D)
As I cleaned up the kitchen this morning with my favorite sponge **[(you can get your own by clicking here!)](https://act.katieporter.com/go/18980?t=2&akid=31936%2E3422442%2EKqVl7D)** I was reminded that even _before_ Kevin McCarthy was ousted and Republicans couldn't choose a replacement, Congress was messy.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/18980?t=3&akid=31936%2E3422442%2EKqVl7D)
When I got to Congress in 2019, I was used to mess—I was a single mom of three who had just flipped a Republican held seat blue. But I quickly saw just how entrenched privilege and corruption were in Washington.
A prime example of that corruption is congressional stock trading. **Members of Congress have routinely profited from trading stocks based on information they learn in private briefings.** We saw it during the early days of the COVID pandemic. And we’ve seen it from members of both parties, who trade fossil fuel or insurance company stocks as they regulate (or fail to regulate) those very industries.
My bill, the STOCK ACT 2.0 would effectively ban congressional stock trading and create real punishments for those who break the rules. **But resistance from folks on both sides of the aisle has kept this from becoming law.**
**Cleaning up corruption will be one of my top priorities in the Senate.[Can you chip in today to help me get there?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231023-1?refcode=EMAM23_1_COR_20231023_V1_F&refcode2=31936_3422442_KqVl7D&akid=31936%2E3422442%2EKqVl7D)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231023-1?refcode=EMAM23_1_COR_20231023_V1_F&refcode2=31936_3422442_KqVl7D&akid=31936%2E3422442%2EKqVl7D)
Thanks a ton,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM23_1_COR_20231023_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=31936_3422442_KqVl7D&akid=31936%2E3422442%2EKqVl7D)**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: the odds are stacked against me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Friend, it's Sen. Sherrod Brown. In a minute, [_I'm going to ask you to split a contribution of $25 between my campaign and Zak Malamed’s to help me reach my $25,000 midnight fundraising goal_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-sb-split?amount=25?source=em231023-zm-sb-split&refcode2=528_8507_kH27Ay&akid=528%2E8507%2EkH27Ay) – but first, I wanted to tell you why this race is so important.

I'm fighting for the Dignity of Work in the Senate, and that means all work. Whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, raise children or care for an aging parent, I've got your back.

The thing is, **the odds are stacked against me in this race:** My ultra-wealthy Republican opponents are writing their campaigns huge, million-dollar checks to buy this seat. And, a Trump-allied dark-money group is running attack ads against me because they know this seat will determine which party wins Senate control!

I know what it takes to beat the odds and win because I've fought tough races before, so believe me when I say that grassroots fundraising will make or break this campaign. **$25 might not sound like much, but when hundreds of dedicated Democrats donate, it adds up quickly.**

[That's where you come in, folks. If you – and everyone reading this email – split just $25 now between my campaign and Zak Malamed’s, I can reach my midnight goal and have the resources to fight back against the GOP's vicious attacks.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-sb-split?amount=25?source=em231023-zm-sb-split&refcode2=528_8507_kH27Ay&akid=528%2E8507%2EkH27Ay)

[_So please, I'm personally asking: Will you split $25 or more right now between my campaign and Zak Malamed’s – every dollar you can spare – so we can reach our mid-month goal, win in Ohio, and defend the Senate?_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-sb-split?amount=25?source=em231023-zm-sb-split&refcode2=528_8507_kH27Ay&akid=528%2E8507%2EkH27Ay)

clean_body: Friend, it's Sen. Sherrod Brown. In a minute, – but first, I wanted to tell you why this race is so important. I'm fighting for the Dignity of Work in the Senate, and that means all work. Whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, raise children or care for an aging parent, I've got your back. The thing is, the odds are stacked against me in this race: My ultra-wealthy Republican opponents are writing their campaigns huge, million-dollar checks to buy this seat. And, a Trump-allied dark-money group is running attack ads against me because they know this seat will determine which party wins Senate control! I know what it takes to beat the odds and win because I've fought tough races before, so believe me when I say that grassroots fundraising will make or break this campaign. $25 might not sound like much, but when hundreds of dedicated Democrats donate, it adds up quickly. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: With gratitude, Sherrod Brown

The latest court decision on DACA came down — and it wasn’t a good result. | | | Peter: The latest court decision on DACA came down — and it wasn’t a good result. Judge Hanen doubled down on his decision to halt new applications, leaving millions of immigrant youth stuck in limbo without protections. It has been years of waiting from court case to court case to know our fate. Years of temporary protections when we need permanent solutions. Years of living renewal to renewal, with no guarantee DACA will still be around after the next court decision. 🙃 **We’re done waiting.
