The truth is that for hundreds of thousands of immigrant youth who were shut out of the program after Judge Hanen’s ruling in 2021 — and millions more undocumented people who were never eligible — **DACA was never enough.** ❌
United We Dream Action is leading the charge to win a pathway to citizenship for immigrant youth and all undocumented people. The advocacy efforts of immigrant youth and allies culminated in winning DACA. Even despite its shortcomings, **DACA is still a reminder of the power our community has to win real change.**
In our ongoing fight for permanent protections, we’ll need to come together and work even harder to win our demands — 📣 hosting Weeks of Action across the country, 🤝 meeting with members of Congress and the Biden administration, 🗣 and __ doing _whatever it takes_ to secure a pathway to citizenship.
We can’t do this without the support of grassroots allies like you, NAME/friend, which is why I’m asking:
**Will you donate now to United We Dream Action to help us secure a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients and ALL undocumented people before it’s too late?**

The advocacy efforts of immigrant youth and allies culminated in winning DACA. Even despite its shortcomings, DACA is still a reminder of the power our community has to win real change. In our ongoing fight for permanent protections, we’ll need to come together and work even harder to win our demands — 📣 hosting Weeks of Action across the country, 🤝 meeting with members of Congress and the Biden administration, 🗣 and doing whatever it takes to secure a pathway to citizenship. We can’t do this without the support of grassroots allies like you, NAME/friend, which is why I’m asking: Will you donate now to United We Dream Action to help us secure a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients and ALL undocumented people before it’s too late? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your allyship — we are stronger together. ✊ Carolina, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today:** | |

Peter, if you know me, you know that asking for campaign donations is probably my _least favorite_ part of the job.
And that's not to say that grassroots donations like yours don't matter, because they do _– so much_ more than I can ever articulate. In fact, it's thanks to grassroots donors like you that I'm even able to hold the most powerful and corrupt forces in the nation accountable –**because I know that, no matter how many millions of dollars they spend slandering me, I have an unwavering base of supporters behind me. **
I hate asking for money because I don't want to be distracted from my work – but with fights as large and vital as ours, I just can't afford to fall short of my fundraising goals. So I have to ask: [**Please, will you chip in right now to power my fight for progress in New York and beyond? name: VoteVets
subject: “Some of the dumbest people I’ve ever met in my life.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Our Active Duty can’t defend themselves from Traitor Trump. Our fallen can’t defend themselves from him. But VoteVets can.
#
Add that to the list, Derek.
On multiple occasions, Trump not only disparaged our fallen Troops, but insulted those wounded in battle.
He said he didn't want to go to an American Cemetery in France because: "It's filled with losers."
He said the nearly 2,000 Marines who fought and died in Belleau Wood were "suckers."
He didn't want to be seen with service members who had amputated limbs because "it doesn't look good for me."
On the hallowed grounds of Arlington National Cemetery he said: "I don't get it. What was in it for them?"
And our Active Duty — the Soldiers, Sailors, Airmen, Marines and Guardians serving to protect our country? He doesn’t think much of them either.
This month, Trump called senior officers, “...some of the dumbest people I’ve ever met in my life,” Derek. That is a direct quote.
There is never a time where it is acceptable for a former Commander in Chief to publicly disparage our Military like this, and especially not when they are running to become Commander in Chief again.
Our Active Duty can’t defend themselves from Traitor Trump. Our fallen can’t defend themselves from him. But VoteVets can.
We will mobilize Veterans, Gold Star Families, and National Security experts to tear Trump apart. VoteVets was one of the largest outside spending organizations in 2020, pivotal in Trump’s defeat. We are ready to do whatever it takes to beat Trump again. But we need your help.
**[Please rush a $5 contribution directly to VoteVets to help us hold Trump accountable for his comments about our Active Duty, our wounded Veterans, and those killed in battle.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231023-1-30-nor&t=1&akid=17555%2E3013755%2ERhXCHW)**

| | Friend, Despite being a dyed-in-the-wool grassroots Republican who could win a popularity contest, the swamp [sunk Jim Jordan’s shot](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4b213a611c704c4e83562dfd1ae68b34&_e=QTZxYpyfoox-UHxC0iP_ndeoF-CKWrHueqjG7D3XUwo8NeFjKgMGSiA46s34gH0K0yBboY6Q5r2UewF6Z7yhaKYvlUEvUE6PVnHqx2x0xiKop8MDV22Qr8DESVxeHe-WvKrX-imfBq1a4uUHGSDS6J4EK4BXRlIzlGUXxpa_gdXO4CaPV0_PeOz74U-6SIgfrJYf6csz_ARuPFDUdEt4Pj5tbLzGsWJoGuhd2J4FaM8DDaqJ3lI630FWlwQk4ZLdN16ESt6cUf0iZODLa39tTQ%3D%3D) at becoming speaker of the House. Why? Because they’re desperate to prove they know better. Let me be clear: Those of us who voted for much-needed change are ready to roll up our sleeves and get back to the dadgum work we were sent here to do, but the swamp monsters want to throw a wrench in the process to make us pay. Knowing this, we willingly put ourselves on the [offering table](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4b213a611c704c4e83562dfd1ae68b34&_e=QTZxYpyfoox-UHxC0iP_nbA5fDBnuRyF8wVQHg0Q0dMnCGH4H_vPcyJKFvsSJAwmCegY0BmH1SHOp9jeH9mZ0q2Brehc0GZs18hkdyD2HpkjwDrgQe1aFIRKl9vsFDWSBUgy5hDyUOdM4tx7JzpjY-Tt9j_XuCNoQy35nILEKhfajOf_REj4ltx_8gk_EI-ji5z3SEf-XyJ88EUIOEaczhG4GKcmyXuKO4uTzAB9zAWBGziJLhIX4ls_E_1ZUagGeQyUFzFdTUjyBU2zB538MRFcjE3yKOg9kTGVELhfhcT5gUSw5Vr941zSmpFTp-Mm) last week in an attempt to move the needle. But I want to make one thing known... The eight of us who stood up for what’s right didn’t break __ anything. How do you wreck something that’s [$33 trillion](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4b213a611c704c4e83562dfd1ae68b34&_e=QTZxYpyfoox-UHxC0iP_nW7xRG8Vj5AMY0mQhBuj-XEq61HkFMwRXGmwpG53pQv8KnTd04h33d7xEyM37e5pEmOlelyLYnEUMtxLPgbcsM9cpqdonNWlO0CWjsijv5AzsU8m_zswQ75jCH6tpHTcJPSQW8Esm-bGeClpAhYS4D8dh9oHyt9qt10HWJuSqmiaTz3ZY-WkYuTD3K0A8Wm5zHr1V-4QpMiTnmMhF9fTdsFjT5YBykzF8TtP_EC4VoR-G2Bozk8Xhdps-sEWu79U8w%3D%3D) in debt? All this drama is a tiny blip on the radar if our entire financial system collapses due to reckless spending. I would dare say no one in leadership was focused on that—and _that_ is why we’re in this situation. While we stand by our decision, I want to make it known that this is not about us—and it never was. **The actions we took were to change Washington for the better.** Electing a speaker who can get our fiscal insanity in order should be the top priority. **[When all is said and done, we need someone who isn’t a part of the Washington machine, friend. Do you stand by me on this?](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4b213a611c704c4e83562dfd1ae68b34&_e=QTZxYpyfoox-UHxC0iP_nflWZl0VoNBswVNfnu_ifMybUISt38RuZ0edz3jtinHDLIvf3ZAYu2ns8Nux_CHUHaaZ3Fr2bfg8bm2mfle9oMhcu1jmCKpgdv1x6Zpfei45COrTdAT9utnIYrlirVbet7jZ70IcEGbeF5zrDzn9mhlhOM9js6hsnd568hSqaQz4XavxOZPA0bExeRham8EcwBR7tF-I73T_N5bJAEAJq-26oy90f_mvpYmmh3STHayDkt4nWC-ZpQGQItkyoP7wU90KgVqwgdbCa0wpOw1CzvGwYNvOryctjlyRDINfIHaj6O8fYQYhxQP33tMQAT8HUaH7gAKgXKkrQbO1_J0jgbk%3D)** We’re gearing up for another vote, and there are [nine highly capable folks](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4b213a611c704c4e83562dfd1ae68b34&_e=QTZxYpyfoox-UHxC0iP_nUQBIhUEfYQ2X0A5-Vv7Dpy_UaI41cF39BAlrrDxUw2XedZN2BOsASX7fsEm_joq04m5rhhmTjloJnGlqzls91J66hN4vT4iPPOFOYZOWN9rnSm4qjN-CAfq15Ehalzm-nrZkze4Lx1ANL7KPPyNmJQWd5QqFAti8EwBzoVQQ0t2Sb8ite9lfSXGLXx8lJCNNTCgYccia6N-_Ux7wT3kvXjyJfufLKWg8wYdgeCq83MMBBPSZukuXTXdq4MmQungqA%3D%3D) in the running. No matter what happens, my commitment to conservative values is still rock-solid. I’m a proud Republican, and I’ll keep fighting for what’s best for our country. Sincerely, Tim Burchett

**Here’s the latest on mifepristone, Peter:** Independent pharmacies are starting to dispense the pill directly to patients, as per recent protections for the drug put in place by the Biden administration. But all could soon be reversed, as the Supreme Court is very likely to take up the case this term — and as you know, the Justices have been extremely hostile to reproductive rights in the past. If SCOTUS upholds the previous restriction by a lower court, mifepristone will no longer be available by mail, and will only be available in the first seven weeks of pregnancy (before many women realize they are pregnant) —**including in states where abortion remains legal. ** [_**We still have time to fight back against this possibly disastrous decision. If there's one thing the last two weeks have made clear, it's that we MUST flip PA-01 blue and take back the House in 2024. name: Team Andy Kim
subject: Senator Menendez’s no good very bad month.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
One month ago, Andy launched his campaign for Senate against indicted Senator Bob Menendez. A lot has happened in the last month:

- FIRST: Bob Menendez was in court to address his indictment on federal corruption charges that he received hundreds of thousands of dollars in bribes, along with receiving gold bars.
- THEN: Senator Menendez was indicted again for acting as an unregistered agent of a foreign government — leading multiple elected officials to urge a vote expelling him from the Senate.
- NOW: A new poll showed that if re-nominated, Senator Menendez could lose this Senate race for Democrats. Extremist Republicans are already thinking about what this means for them. Even the National Republican Senatorial Chair said: "New Jersey could become a competitive race."

84% of New Jerseyans think our politicians are either a little, somewhat, or very corrupt, and with Senator Menendez's track record, it's no surprise why.

Andy has spent his entire career in Congress working to end corruption and restoring people's trust in their government. We also know that a poll said Andy would beat any Republican in a general election. If Bob Menendez is the nominee, this seat could be at risk.

We can't let that happen.

It's time to clean up the corruption and restore good-faith governance to this Senate seat. Join us by pitching in $3 and help elect Andy Kim to represent the good people of New Jersey. clean_body: One month ago, Andy launched his campaign for Senate against indicted Senator Bob Menendez. A lot has happened in the last month: - FIRST: Bob Menendez was in court to address his indictment on federal corruption charges that he received hundreds of thousands of dollars in bribes, along with receiving gold bars. - THEN: Senator Menendez was indicted again for acting as an unregistered agent of a foreign government — leading multiple elected officials to urge a vote expelling him from the Senate. - NOW: A new poll showed that if re-nominated, Senator Menendez could lose this Senate race for Democrats. Extremist Republicans are already thinking about what this means for them. Even the National Republican Senatorial Chair said: "New Jersey could become a competitive race." 84% of New Jerseyans think our politicians are either a little, somewhat, or very corrupt, and with Senator Menendez's track record, it's no surprise why. Andy has spent his entire career in Congress working to end corruption and restoring people's trust in their government. We also know that a poll said Andy would beat any Republican in a general election. If Bob Menendez is the nominee, this seat could be at risk. We can't let that happen. It's time to clean up the corruption and restore good-faith governance to this Senate seat. Join us by pitching in $3 and help elect Andy Kim to represent the good people of New Jersey. [] Donate Now [] Thank you, Team Andy Kim Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: $5 [] $15 [] $25 [] $50 [] Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey

body:
Democrats are racing to undermine election integrity ahead of the most important election of our lifetimes.
If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY.
| |

---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=c4bd0fc59dd94adb93de39128bf207ca&_t=M8M5AENB_EG3flCuYVAESo78_SZ2qiJFFUMI73bc_cUOCJScSfUaXI1aTNWA4Q5FGXXnQYJeJ2JcTjy6KseX00GrIDUUghx8QPYfRwl_ttM%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=c4bd0fc59dd94adb93de39128bf207ca&_t=M8M5AENB_EG3flCuYVAESo78_SZ2qiJFFUMI73bc_cUOCJScSfUaXI1aTNWA4Q5FGXXnQYJeJ2JcTjy6KseX00GrIDUUghx8QPYfRwl_ttM%3D)

| Friend -

Democrats are racing to undermine election integrity ahead of the most important election of our lifetimes.
- **FIRST:** Deep-blue cities like New York and DC made it LEGAL for non-U.S. citizens to vote in local elections.

- **THEN:** Joe Biden SUED red states for enforcing voter identification laws.

- **NOW:** Democrats are filing LEGAL ACTION to gut strong election integrity measures in the swing state of North Carolina.
_If you believe only U.S. citizens should vote in U.S. elections ... If you believe in one person, one vote... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID... Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY._

_**[I'm personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c4bd0fc59dd94adb93de39128bf207ca&_e=Q18SC39LntL0TEurWeBCFW1ZYMMBJ7nTFqJWPIF7K2JSHyWQBwyfpgAOYXBsbg3z1hpG62r_aMfhC_KqPw0jp11RABZoY2dJiLZz7h-Cz5iKV1iGQcFADjy49AIaGHIDIFUXSZohADxwDNafwuiFnpJrwM5hRTAZX8KITelzr7FRxbaMC3BrsIyz1plotBLz4WQvihGAruHz-or3LJV9vbY2AVejJ2cZ9eNKoFisJAWEd5Kz83tHkCGHSRE-7zPCwqzkqKNdVMghxEp8Ugm1IB3YNqfzi4EkZHflXBTIdB5tYp5vkGPHA_ptRNZ3ctOmrNLuGJdK5FIZVKdZCzGDkT6U3_ow-nn3D_erWuI6w9xoiHT0vhb24Mksjt17tdm7fVk0JZSaGJf5r9fpM_eScfkI6mdYJEbeQxRiubYnfss%3D "I’m personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.")**_
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME: FEDERALLY MANDATE VOTER ID LAWS](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c4bd0fc59dd94adb93de39128bf207ca&_e=Q18SC39LntL0TEurWeBCFW1ZYMMBJ7nTFqJWPIF7K2JSHyWQBwyfpgAOYXBsbg3z1hpG62r_aMfhC_KqPw0jp11RABZoY2dJiLZz7h-Cz5iKV1iGQcFADjy49AIaGHIDIFUXSZohADxwDNafwuiFnpJrwM5hRTAZX8KITelzr7FRxbaMC3BrsIyz1plotBLz4WQvihGAruHz-or3LJV9vbY2AVejJ2cZ9eNKoFisJAWEd5Kz83tHkCGHSRE-7zPCpEs29K70SRU9690kEXoN9dAP81cFOVVOU5AJzfmIhj7XoEpbD_iWJbJPir61_njNGAd1llT7g_xYXqk5huy2WeSLIXl0B2FVBwgeq84m2CvlmgB7w-XQXALy093eraEf7tryYDTbxPJA230RQrtNQYgn7H3D7FOhJ85oMcVcNVc%3D "ADD YOUR NAME: FEDERALLY MANDATE VOTER ID LAWS")
---
Look:

Last time the Democrats were in power, they attempted to fast-track an election-rigging scheme that would have irreparably undermined the security of our elections. They wanted to use your tax dollars to fund their campaigns, federalize our elections, and destroy voter ID laws NATIONWIDE.

**They called their election-rigging scheme HR 1 - meaning helping prevent Conservatives from winning elections was their FIRST PRIORITY when they controlled the House.**

If they think the American People are willing to turn a blind eye to this critical issue, it would only empower them to push harder.

**That 's where you come in.**

_**[We're pleading with every Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws. Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections once and for all.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c4bd0fc59dd94adb93de39128bf207ca&_e=Q18SC39LntL0TEurWeBCFW1ZYMMBJ7nTFqJWPIF7K2JSHyWQBwyfpgAOYXBsbg3z1hpG62r_aMfhC_KqPw0jp11RABZoY2dJiLZz7h-Cz5iKV1iGQcFADjy49AIaGHIDIFUXSZohADxwDNafwuiFnpJrwM5hRTAZX8KITelzr7FRxbaMC3BrsIyz1plotBLz4WQvihGAruHz-or3LJV9vbY2AVejJ2cZ9eNKoFisJAWEd5Kz83tHkCGHSRE-7zPCCSrc6SsMYsT-4C8NWDakCSnm6FIQZrSaHKMwCMcjGPQD4TSruhpJD9iL44FRPxUrX40eTf9Tap58IuYqYyPeXbLqna-SLR_kZq0EEd6aBuCKf8kyPfbvx2tyR6Oou5t8wCXYHQAlZ80NNfRD4JTcBzi5E2XCL5Damkk7eRh5ebM%3D "We’re pleading with every Conservative in America to back our efforts to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws. Adding your name to my petition today is the first step to securing our elections once and for all.")**_

Can I count on seeing your name? _I hope so._

For America,

Steve Scalise

Peter,

Campaigning in West Virginia isn’t easy. We’re one of the most mountainous states in the Country.

Reaching voters in every town can take hours on long-winding country roads, eating up thousands of dollars in gasoline. That’s why gas for our cars can take up a large segment of our campaign costs.

If our campaign volunteers and staff don’t have the money to gas up their tanks, we can’t personally reach the voters we need to win this election.

The average price of gasoline in West Virginia is $3.50 per gallon. | **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

clean_body: Political experts called Anthony D’Esposito the 2nd most vulnerable Republican in the country. | = | Peter, Our October fundraising deadline is just 8 days away, and we need all hands on deck to reach our $15,000 fundraising goal. = | = Political experts called Anthony D'Esposito the 2nd most vulnerable Republican in the country. This proves that the path to retake the Democratic House majority runs right through our district. And I’m ready to get to work on DAY ONE in Congress and put the priorities of Long Islanders first. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s flip our district blue, Laura Gillen * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Gillen for NY PO Box 774 Rockville Centre, NY 11571 United States | = If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: The environmental movement needs to act, but it has to be NOW
body:
__Triple your impact for the environment. |
---

|
Peter -- this is truly urgent. MAGA House Republicans are wasting precious time, repeatedly failing to pick a new Speaker of the House.

Without a new Speaker to move a spending bill forward, a government shutdown will occur just weeks from now. This will halt critical services, including nutrition assistance programs for children and salary for military service members.

While Republicans squander time that they could be using to protect their constituents' health and livelihoods, here's what all of their candidates for Speaker have in common:

**-- Each of them signed on to completely gut funding for programs that ensure we have clean air to breathe and clean water to drink.

-- Each of them is prioritizing polluter profits over the health and safety of their constituents by pushing a mandate to force dirty drilling on public lands.

-- Each of them is trying to block clean energy projects that would reduce climate emissions and create good-paying jobs -- even in their own districts.**

Bottom line: No matter who they pick, it will be bad for people and the planet. We need to be ramping up pressure NOW.

But here's the good news: The environmental programs and clean energy plan they're looking to cut are incredibly popular, even in red states.

We can put pressure on each and every one of these lawmakers to protect these critical programs while keeping the government open -- but we need to do it NOW.

To protect critical environmental programs, we need **you, Peter.** [The best thing you can do for the environment right now is to power our campaign by renewing your membership today. And for a limited time, you'll make 3x the impact -- even $5 makes a big difference right now.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XB9g-~)

| | **
** **FOR IMMEDIATE REVIEW**

**Supporter Record:** Peter Willis
**MATCH STATUS:** [_TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE -- RENEW NOW >>_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XB9g-~)

**Deadline:** 11:59 pm, October 31, 2023
**Fundraising Goal:** $30,000

**STATUS:** [Renew now -- it only takes $5 >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XB9g-~) |
---|---|---

LCV teams are on Capitol Hill every day, pushing back against cuts to clean energy progress and funding for environmental protections. _But we need to ramp up the pressure in a major way.**Here 's why we need your support:**_

We're gearing up to run more ads targeting vulnerable Republican lawmakers, holding their feet to the fire and letting them know that if they choose to side with Big Polluters instead of the people in their districts, voters will remember.

The truth is, this work is expensive -- and with all the attacks on the environment happening in Congress from extreme MAGA Republicans this year, our resources are running low. _What we need most of all is your support._

[Please don't wait until this triple match offer expires. Renew your membership today. Even $5 can have a huge impact >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XB9g-~)

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters
__
__

---

Washington, DC 20005

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: A ceasefire vote is imminent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrats-endorsed Representative Cori Bush introduced a
resolution in Congress calling for an immediate ceasefire in Israel and
Palestine and for humanitarian aid to be delivered to the people of Gaza.

We need to rapidly build more support if we’re going to get this passed in
the U.S. House and Senate. A congressional vote on this resolution is
imminent and could happen as soon as this week — so we need to act fast!

Will you call your Senator and Representative right now and urge them to
support a ceasefire? [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140231?source=em20231023-31496&t=1001&akid=31496%2E1203867%2EbW_jqL ]You can find their phone numbers and a suggested
call script here from our allies at the U.S. Campaign for Palestinian
Human Rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140231?source=em20231023-31496&t=1002&akid=31496%2E1203867%2EbW_jqL ]CALL NOW

We condemn Hamas’s attacks on Israeli citizens, demand the safe return of
all hostages, and mourn every innocent Israeli and Palestinian life taken.
We also know that collective punishment against 2.2 million Palestinians
is NOT the answer.

We are witnessing Israel commit genocide against the people of Gaza in
real time — we cannot waste this opportunity to speak up and stop it.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140231?source=em20231023-31496&t=1003&akid=31496%2E1203867%2EbW_jqL ]Please join us by calling your elected officials and demanding a
ceasefire now →

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231023-31496-footer&t=1004&refcode2=31496_1203867_bW_jqL&akid=31496%2E1203867%2EbW_jqL

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=31496%2E1203867%2EbW_jqL

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: The wheels are officially off this clown car
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
I won’t hold my breath for the GOP to get their act together. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72072406/434164714/-1238421288?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODljMDI1Ny1mMTcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=18n66W-28925pCzccXkXDaJsMRHC-E03S37nMhBvCgo=)
This is getting painful to watch, folks. Last week, Steve Scalise officially withdrew from the Speaker race. Jim Jordan then made us sit through not one, but _three_ votes — _and lost support each time._ They’re in such chaos, Republicans are wheeling the clown car around to bail them out. **Now,_nine_ Republicans are officially up for consideration as the third GOP Speaker nominee in less than a month.** Desperate times, desperate measures, I guess. But if Republicans think that restarting this search with _nine_ candidates when we’re already 20 days without a Speaker will result in _less_ GOP infighting, **they’re on a fool’s errand.** **[Friend, two international conflicts continue to rage on, a government shutdown is increasingly imminent, and after almost three weeks, Republicans _still_ can’t clean up their act. clean_body: I won’t hold my breath for the GOP to get their act together. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = This is getting painful to watch, folks. Last week, Steve Scalise officially withdrew from the Speaker race. Jim Jordan then made us sit through not one, but three votes — and lost support each time. They’re in such chaos, Republicans are wheeling the clown car around to bail them out. Now,nine Republicans are officially up for consideration as the third GOP Speaker nominee in less than a month. Desperate times, desperate measures, I guess. But if Republicans think that restarting this search with nine candidates when we’re already 20 days without a Speaker will result in less GOP infighting, they’re on a fool’s errand. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Republicans are promising a new nominee by tomorrow, but we’ve heard that one before — and I won’t be holding my breath. — Eric | | | = = Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! name: Ruben Gallego
subject: 9 months ago today.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I’m still running to take back Sinema’s seat, to be clear. But the stakes are higher now.
#

Peter, check out this picture.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231023-2&t=1&akid=1369%2E734936%2ErmJYWo)
This was a great day — our campaign launch in Phoenix. We kicked this thing off 9 months ago today.
When I was making the decision to run for Senate, one reason stuck out more than all the others: To take back Arizona’s Senate seat from Kyrsten Sinema and replace her vote for the billionaires and the hedge fund managers with a vote for working families and the middle class.
I knew it was going to be an uphill battle, but that was reason enough for me. This state is my home, and it would be an honor to serve it.
But earlier this month, Kari Lake jumped in the race. One of the most dangerous politicians in the country. A direct threat to our democracy.
I’m still running to take back Sinema’s seat, to be clear. But the stakes are higher now.
The Marine in me will always fight for our democracy. I was ready to fight for it on January 6th at the Capitol. And with Kari in this race, I’m ready to fight for it again.
But I won’t lie to you: I’m feeling the pressure right now. We’re coming up on our end-of-month deadline fast. And with everything that has happened this month, I could really use your help.
[**Can you contribute $3 to our campaign today? We need a ton of people to add their donations, because that’s the only way we’ll hold the Senate. That’s the only way we’ll defend it from Kari Lake.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231023-2&t=2&akid=1369%2E734936%2ErmJYWo)

---

| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-oct23.GsFzby&refcode=em231023-2&t=24&akid=1369%2E734936%2ErmJYWo)**

There’s an old motto in the Marines: “First to Fight.” I’m not going to back down, Peter. You can trust me on that.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
DeSantis has gone too far this time...
| **_BREAKING from THE NEW YORK TIMES:_
"DeSantis Wants to ROLL BACK Press Freedom"** [](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20231023_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=2038%2E564421%2ExtXjsT) We're boiling with rage at Ron DeSantis right now.

**The NYT just reported that DeSantis is going all-out DICTATOR in his attempt to destroy the Freedom of the Press.**

He wants to sue, bankrupt, and jail reporters who fight against him!

Listen, DeSantis is praying that good people like you don't take action to stop him.

[Our team has been fighting DeSantis since DAY ONE, and now we're launching a brand new petition to show public anger against his plot. We need to see 10,000 signatures to defend the press by 10:00 P.M. or else DeSantis will become a full-blown dictator!!](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20231023_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=2038%2E564421%2ExtXjsT) | [SIGN IMMEDIATELY: ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH THE PRESS AGAINST RON DESANTIS »](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20231023_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=2038%2E564421%2ExtXjsT)
---
We know you're busy... but please, take a moment to read these key excerpts from the article:
"Over the course of an hour, Mr. DeSantis and his guests laid out a detailed case for **revisiting a landmark Supreme Court decision protecting the press from defamation lawsuits**."

"The decision set a higher bar for defamation lawsuits involving public figures, and for years it was viewed as sacrosanct. **That standard has empowered journalists to investigate and criticize public figures without fear that an unintentional error will result in crippling financial penalties.** "

"Mr. DeSantis, a likely Republican presidential candidate, **put the effort at the center of his war against the mainstream media.** "

"**Two justices on the conservative-majority Supreme Court, Clarence Thomas and Neil M. Gorsuch, have indicated their willingness to roll back the ruling** in written dissents in recent years..."
---
As you can see, this situation is becoming more dire by the day – the MAGA Supreme Court could be ready to back DeSantis!!

[We need to fight back against wannabe Dictator DeSantis – NOW. Please do the right thing, and add your name to this petition standing with the Free Press immediately! »](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20231023_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=2038%2E564421%2ExtXjsT)

name: Eddie Barron
subject: The power of organizing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102323_eddiereup [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102323_eddiereup]
Hi Peter, it's Eddie here, Raquel's husband.
A while back I shared the story about how Raquel and I met. Believe it or not, I met her at my doorstep. She was doing what she does best: organizing our community despite the 100+ degree summer heat.
Now, Raquel’s running for Congress and we need your help. We’re building a movement here and we need the resources to hire organizers, train volunteers, and talk to voters throughout the district. Before you read about our story below, can you chip in a few bucks to help? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102323_eddiereup]
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Eddie Barron <info@raquelteran.com>
Date: Thu, Sep 14, 2023 at 3:01 PM
Subject: This is how I met Raquel
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102323_eddiereup [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102323_eddiereup]
Hi Peter,
I’m Eddie Barron and for more than 7 years, I’ve had the honor of being married to my favorite person and an agent of change, Raquel Terán. Her love and care for our community has brought her from her roots as a community activist to a political organizer, to an elected official, and now a candidate for Congress.
Running for Congress takes resources, and Raquel’s campaign is building a grassroots donor program so Raquel can spend more time knocking doors, engaging with voters, and listening to our community – and not stuck on the phone dialing for dollars. Will you help make sure we have those resources by contributing $10 or whatever you can afford today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102323_eddiereup&amount=10]
I know first-hand how persuasive Raquel can be knocking on doors because that’s how we met! It was during the 2012 campaign season. She was the only candidate that knocked on my door that summer, while others either took for granted or didn’t care about my vote. Her genuine approach about the issues I cared about and the change I wanted to see is why I voted for her during that election, and the same reason I fully support her campaign for Congress. [https://apps.azsos.gov/apps/election/eps/op/]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102323_eddiereup [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102323_eddiereup]
I was one of thousands of voters she reached out to during the summer with temperature easily above 100 degrees. I’ll never forget the drive and determination she had to deliver real change for our communities. That same drive for change doesn’t stop on Election Day for Raquel – she has always brought that same energy, empathy, and drive to her work as an elected official and community organizer as well.
That’s exactly why we need her in Congress. But to win, we need her in our community, knocking on doors, and meeting donors. Please join me in support of my wife, Raquel Terán, and get her elected as the first Latina representative from Arizona. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102323_eddiereup]
Muchas Gracias,
Eddie Barron
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102323_eddiereup]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102323_eddiereup [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102323_eddiereup] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.
For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102323_eddiereup]
Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States
Paid for by Terán for Congress

There are 9 ( yes, NINE) candidates.

| | After three rounds of votes, Jordan finally dropped out of the Speaker race. **After a secret ballot within the GOP Conference, he could only muster 86 votes to stay in the race.** _He lost 112 votes._ So now, the GOP is going to hear from 9 (yes, NINE) candidates tonight vying for the GOP's nomination. If everything goes according to plan, they will make a nomination and potentially face a floor vote tomorrow. Not-so-fun-facts? Only five of their nine candidates voted for the continuing resolution to avert a government shutdown, and only two voted to certify the 2020 election results. Democrats remain united behind Hakeem Jeffries. He has been solid and thoughtful throughout the process. And what a process. I am about done living in unprecedented times. I am ready to get back to _precedented_ times. Perhaps, we will be back to work on Tuesday. I continue to work.**Just this week, Team Larsen:**
1. Introduced the Clean Water Act of 2023 to protect the water we depend on for families, businesses and our communities;
2. Held a hearing on funding the repair and building of roads, bridges, and highways for our future;
3. Researched how we can leverage the nearly $1 billion in funds available to our state to do the hydrogen hub;
4. Began surveying communities in our district on how we can help fight the fentanyl epidemic.

As you know — there is plenty more to do. But first, we must tackle Tuesday! _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

**We can’t wait until 2024 to fight for our essential rights.** Abortion access, and every health care need it touches, is on the ballot THIS November.**It’s never been more urgent for Democratic women to lead, so we need your support right now.**
With _Roe v. Wade_ overturned, **MAGA Republicans in the commonwealths of Virginia and Kentucky are hellbent on stripping their constituents of their reproductive rights** and escalating this crisis statewide. Sign on now to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231023_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20327%2E4449941%2ERbIlCb)
---
Look, Jamie Raskin is 100% right — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_**Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College.**_

Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.

_But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

**[_So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Jamie Raskin & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away!_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231023_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20327%2E4449941%2ERbIlCb)**

---

body:
I am open about my faith to show how compatible it is with the new political home we built in West Michigan.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72073276/434167848/664569766?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231023-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTcwZDk2Zi1mNDcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6d9FFWyJn0bsDfEFZ1hJLs94iMcjODenEdwfm7q3Cl0=)
---
| _**I am open about my faith to show how compatible it is with the new political home we built in West Michigan.**_ I’m committed to creating a community where everyone can show up as their full and authentic selves. So often, extreme factions within the Republican party want to claim Christianity as a justification for their extreme politics. Well, I think it’s about time we dispel the myth that Republicans own Christianity or that Christianity means one must be anti-choice and anti-LGBTQ+.

My faith is a cornerstone of my personal and political life. Christianity heavily informs the values with which I lead. I believe that we should treat every individual with love and decency, regardless of their background. I believe in the sanctity of life, which means we have to protect a woman’s access to life-saving healthcare. I believe in a loving God who could not care less about the gender of who you love.

That is what Christianity means to me. That is how I choose to live a faith-guided life. I won’t cherrypick bible verses to fuel a message of hate like some extremists in our country will. Instead, I choose to live a life inspired by the empathy, kindness, and compassion that defines Christianity.

[_**If you believe that West Michigan deserves a representative who is guided by faith, compassion, and empathy, I hope you will consider contributing to my reelection campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72073287/434167869/664569766?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231023-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTcwZDk2Zi1mNDcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6d9FFWyJn0bsDfEFZ1hJLs94iMcjODenEdwfm7q3Cl0=)

Joe Biden **_FINALLY_** agreed to finish _part_ of the wall in South Texas.
---
[**THANKS JOE!**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=6450c0fd68df4b92a8ea0a7b25a1305c&_e=eJbuYY75XNNBKg2GXG_rbdmd3un9mIV7Ij4ug7YLggGygZBcxbAKsZ3bV2hmwy_DjD_rYxvcVe8c_etGMsz-VQPXGfrHVKmWyTZ7Uk3NArzvI2ywwN0D3otriKv5hJakYc67sgk2cWDxXmeTChkBvQeE3P0srFz9sc9f6U2COL4J0zcKNAytg1s0WIgsIIwiX3fQXkqxCuph7UiZ_iOQBJIyI-bgAues5RofwQv64EK7FGFx1lKucjwcj1BAnoXwHrEzZxB9T3Ve-rs9eyvNkuHP-MA9TIXNpDFnzlLbywzF-ulm1KIkMNho45zATP8jDEq53NhO7Z5Gf1t44P22OFgj4Kp5fSkoQ0rGzaSR78E%3D)

But not so fast— Just as news broke, Biden’s DHS Secretary was quick to clarify that “a border wall is not the answer” and they are only using money appropriated during the prior administration that the law requires them to use. | We just got some breaking news, Peter:

**A multimillionaire Republican celebrity just jumped into our top-two “jungle primary” in the U.S. Senate race.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72073700/434168846/1087077422?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20231023_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjNmJjYmQwLWY1NzEtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LvyoE9HlfSLKfTGU_2A_fGQVRST60RPmUB85IwoLWi4=) Steve Garvey was a first baseman for the Dodgers and Padres, and apparently he’s ready to take up the fight for everyone born on third base thinking they hit a triple. Go figure.

[**If that’s all you need to hear, I’m personally asking you to split a donation of any amount between Upset the Setup and my Senate campaign to help us respond. Our new Republican opponent is sure to have big money behind him, and we need to be ready for the inevitable wave of attacks — because that’s not the only recent twist in this Senate race.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72073701/434168847/1087077422?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20231023_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjNmJjYmQwLWY1NzEtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LvyoE9HlfSLKfTGU_2A_fGQVRST60RPmUB85IwoLWi4=)

Garvey appears to be taking a cue from another celebrity Republican with no political experience, Donald Trump. And given Trump’s determination to make sure I don’t become California’s Senator next year, I wouldn’t be surprised to see Trump and MAGA world get solidly behind Garvey. I will need your help to ensure Garvey and Trump feel the sting of losing on March 5, 2024.

And there’s one more wrinkle in this race: **I’m now running in _two_ concurrent elections — a special election for the remainder of the late Sen. Dianne Feinstein’s term, and a general election for a full Senate term.** Two elections happening on the _same ballot,_ on the _same day._ Twice.

With millions of Californians preparing to see my name on their ballot for the very first time, we’re going to have to invest a tremendous amount of resources to educate voters and meet them across the state.

[**And it’s even more urgent with today’s news. Can you rush in a split donation of any amount between Upset the Setup and my Senate campaign to respond to the entry of our new opponent and help ensure we win this race?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72073702/434168848/1087077422?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20231023_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjNmJjYmQwLWY1NzEtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LvyoE9HlfSLKfTGU_2A_fGQVRST60RPmUB85IwoLWi4=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72073703/434168849/1087077422?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=UTS_20231023_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjNmJjYmQwLWY1NzEtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LvyoE9HlfSLKfTGU_2A_fGQVRST60RPmUB85IwoLWi4=)

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: I lost the election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American,

There is nothing more humbling than losing an election. Back in 2018, Democrats poured all of their resources into my district, and at the end of the race, I had to call my opponent and congratulate her on her win.... It was absolutely devastating. Who was I to think I could win a historically BLUE district in the heart of a major city? But I refused to give up. **In 2020** , my message was received by the voters, and I _FLIPPED_ my district RED! The people had spoken. They wanted freedom and opportunity - not the Democrats’ socialist agenda of power and control. **Now** , I’m ready to win again, but the Democrats never forgot my triumph...they are coming after me yet again. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, There is nothing more humbling than losing an election. Back in 2018, Democrats poured all of their resources into my district, and at the end of the race, I had to call my opponent and congratulate her on her win.... It was absolutely devastating. Who was I to think I could win a historically BLUE district in the heart of a major city? But I refused to give up. In 2020 , my message was received by the voters, and I FLIPPED my district RED! The people had spoken. They wanted freedom and opportunity - not the Democrats’ socialist agenda of power and control. Now , I’m ready to win again, but the Democrats never forgot my triumph...they are coming after me yet again. Democrats are prepared to spend MILLIONS against me. I do NOT want to call my opponent and concede ever again. Republican’s House Majority may come down to us holding this district, and keeping it RED. | | | | | | This is going to be the biggest Congressional race in America and grassroots support will decide the winner. Together, I know we can win this thing, and I can’t wait to celebrate with you on Election Day. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar | | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72073862/434169330/1436736915?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM1ZWRhOTktZjc3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZdBtKG-gBLSigJjWeZTlQP8zc-0zI8wf3_Y5ZH93xa0=)
Hi Peter, the last few weeks have been huge for our grassroots campaign.

We officially kicked off our ground campaign to mobilize Orange County Democrats ahead of the March primary election. We’ve also amassed a number of major endorsements -- including from the Orange County Young Democrats, the Democratic Club of Seal Beach, CA Lt. Gov. Eleni Kounalakis, CA Controller Malia Cohen, Anaheim Mayor Ashleigh Aitken, and many more.

Below are some highlights from the trail I wanted to share. And as we begin this next critical phase of our campaign, I have to ask: **[Will you chip in $3 to power our efforts to mobilize Democrats at the ground level?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72073863/434169331/1436736915?refcode=em-10.23.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM1ZWRhOTktZjc3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZdBtKG-gBLSigJjWeZTlQP8zc-0zI8wf3_Y5ZH93xa0=)**

Joanna

* * *
**This weekend, we held our Volunteer Kickoff event!** I am humbled to have so much community support from volunteers willing to lace up their sneakers with me on the campaign trail.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72073865/434169333/1436736915?refcode=em-10.23.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM1ZWRhOTktZjc3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZdBtKG-gBLSigJjWeZTlQP8zc-0zI8wf3_Y5ZH93xa0=)
**Over the past few weeks, I have attended several forums and club meetings including the Seal Beach, Laguna Woods, and Laguna Beach Democratic Clubs.** I am thankful for the constituents who shared their stories and offered feedback on the issues that matter most to them. I look forward to continuing to work alongside members of our OC community.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72073866/434169334/1436736915?refcode=em-10.23.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM1ZWRhOTktZjc3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZdBtKG-gBLSigJjWeZTlQP8zc-0zI8wf3_Y5ZH93xa0=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72073867/434169335/1436736915?refcode=em-10.23.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM1ZWRhOTktZjc3MS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZdBtKG-gBLSigJjWeZTlQP8zc-0zI8wf3_Y5ZH93xa0=)

subject: ICYMI: Andy's message to you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Did you see Andy's message from earlier today? Peter — Just making sure that you saw Andy's message from earlier today.

_Andy's right._ We need all the support we can get in the next couple weeks. We can't afford to slow down one bit.

[**Before the last reporting deadline of the election, donate any amount to Andy's re-election campaign to help him keep making progress for Kentucky >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72074030/434170343/1286826882?refcode=em23_231023_ddln10_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231023_ddln10_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e994dde3-f771-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTk0ZGRlMy1mNzcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CA-GRJh5R5o2R4l7ln6t8DlaUBngQVD5QleKZUkDbVA=) \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Andy Beshear <info@andybeshear.com>
Date: Mon, Oct 23, 2023
Subject: The finish line is in sight. Hey team,

On November 7, Kentuckians will head to the polls to decide the future of our Commonwealth. The choice is simple: Keep moving Kentucky forward, OR undo the progress we've made.

Between now and Election Day, I need all the support I can get to compete with my opponent's millions in spending to win this close race.

Please — This is our LAST major reporting deadline of the election. Chip in whatever you can afford before midnight to help me keep moving our Commonwealth forward → [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oct-23?link2=personal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72074031/434170344/1286826882?refcode=em23_231023_ddln10_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231023_ddln10_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e994dde3-f771-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTk0ZGRlMy1mNzcxLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CA-GRJh5R5o2R4l7ln6t8DlaUBngQVD5QleKZUkDbVA=)

We can do this!

— Andy

| PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR

Peter,

Campaigning in West Virginia isn’t easy. We’re one of the most mountainous states in the Country.

Reaching voters in every town can take hours on long-winding country roads, eating up thousands of dollars in gasoline. That’s why gas for our cars can take up a large segment of our campaign costs.

If our campaign volunteers and staff don’t have the money to gas up their tanks, we can’t personally reach the voters we need to win this election.

The average price of gasoline in West Virginia is $3.50 per gallon. [**For the small contribution of just $7 you will be providing a volunteer with 2 gallons of gas to reach several more voters.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=96634f3102f74bca92caca77338abcdd&_e=fGHmtY8QOZkBVe7zGO9ee2JqWVyPTUpIvQNiiLr6OG12FDU-5ZiBE67vltrI76rIB7ol8AMwoeSuIdW6fy3wcnqeebjma1p5ho9ESkjSxP3bzn14iGVcGsplWUVVtR4aejVJJ4qsMVIHiTcmYiglMRfNdrSE82fNxj7eU-WFoycT_LSOBJ8oWdbF5_NhDDE_oU36h0cLJ8DW6rtj-6LkWRka4K0i3TJJYrLSxiMSYxnPO0X-p4RSXhKt8Xfqzcb7LJ6rmtNsbYQm5ucctJkVPxCRAU0qXCk17vm0bTT4003F3pRSwFr_dlTjlGuXFIgnFroeYfG3EH50DwQveri2-vU--li9QPIZ9xMK4JY-cYENmPgY8Jz6wJg1nBnfHmYQ-P7ng_6iyaas3kvlKF3hwg%3D%3D)

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

| | Friend, Our team had another exciting week out on the campaign trail!We had a packed event at the home of Dr. Tara Levesque in Nashua on Thursday where supporters gathered for some delicious treats and heard from Kelly’s plan to keep New Hampshire safe, prosperous and free. Kelly had the opportunity to tour Tuscan Village in Salem with Joe Faro — including the new Artisan Hotel opening this week. Joe is a phenomenal entrepreneur and he and his team have done an amazing job with this transformational project at the old Rockingham Park! Kelly praised Governor Sununu’s creation of the Northern Border Alliance Task Force which will direct resources to keep New Hampshire safe, as the Biden Administration continues to allow dangerous criminals and drugs to flow into our state Keep up with all of our campaign updates on our [Facebook](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/dcOjDVL8M/c?w=lfn-E0GsxXhyaJUOe5cDxZCvATnskvoacfqea2Lh0XQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0tlbGx5QXlvdHRlRm9yTkgiLCJyIjoiZmM3MGMxYzktMWNjNy00ODNhLTlmMDYtYmI2NDg3ZmYxMjNiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMmIwOGU3MDMtYTYyNy00NmYzLWJlOGEtNWQ1NjU0NDI2MjAyIn0) page. Best, Team Kelly

| | News Highlights

| |

| | “I’m thankful that Governor Sununu and our law enforcement community are working hard to secure our northern border and direct resources to keep New Hampshire safe, as the Biden Administration continues to allow dangerous criminals and drugs to flow into our state,” Ayotte said in a statement. [Read the full article in the Union Leader here.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/dcOjDVL8M/c?w=H-tqYZoNuOuJUsgvImbtxls6QSxTXllx0PxCrY1qrG8.)
---
| | |

| | Letter to the Editor Highlight
---
| |
---
| | “Kelly Ayotte was a great attorney general for our state. As our attorney general, Kelly made sure that when criminals were arrested, they would face real jail time for their crimes. She worked with law enforcement across New Hampshire to ensure we had the resources to keep our towns safe. She excelled at this position, and she was renominated by two governors from different parties. In the United States Senate, Kelly Ayotte fought for fiscally responsible budgets to keep more money in our own pockets." [Read the full LTE in the Valley News here.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/dcOjDVL8M/c?w=QqkN0PQdIMx4TlO8hBjLplsuRtFOROJ8jB_M3oGvQss.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm5ld3MuY29tL1ZhbGxleS1OZXdzLUZvcnVtLWZvci1PY3QtMjMtMjAyMy01MjcwOTcwNCIsInIiOiJlYzQ1ZWRlMC0yMTNjLTQ5ZTgtYmMxOS03Yjg1NGZkOThiYzciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyYjA4ZTcwMy1hNjI3LTQ2ZjMtYmU4YS01ZDU2NTQ0MjYyMDIifQ)

clean_body: Friend, we'll be honest: | | | Friend, we'll be honest: If we had a dollar for every voter Colin has met on his Texas tour, we wouldn't be writing this email. = We don't have to tell you that Colin's race to defeat Ted Cruz was already super competitive. But right now, 14% of Texas voters are still undecided. That means whoever can reach the most undecided voters will win this election. That's why Colin has been on the road nonstop these past few weeks, giving every speech, having every important conversation and meeting voters where they are whenever he's able to. But, as Colin hits every corner of Texas to shake hands and win over voters, the costs are adding up FAST – and if we don't raise $50,000 by our midnight fundraising deadline, our voter outreach efforts could be impacted. We can't let this happen – not when Ted Cruz has MILLIONS to fund his voter outreach. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being such a critical part of Team Allred. – Allred Road Team |

Why Chris Christie:
---
---
Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

Scott Perry tried to throw out millions of votes to overturn the 2020 election — including yours — and was a key figure in the January 6th insurrection.

Now, he’s staunchly supporting fellow insurrectionist and Freedom Caucus member Jim Jordan to replace Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House. He's even downplaying death threats received by those who've opposed Jordan. This is disgraceful.

**_The facts speak for themselves:_** I’ve spent my career advocating for truth and integrity. Scott Perry has spent his career spewing conspiracy theories and falsehoods.

PA-10 is a make-or-break district when it comes to taking back the House majority for Democrats.

This poll shows that we have a real shot at flipping this district blue — but it’s going to take a war chest to take down Scott Perry. That’s why we need supporters like you to step up now and help us keep this momentum going.

[If there’s ever been a time to step up and fight back, it’s now. subject: Demand de-escalation and a ceasefire now

body:
We’re calling on members of Congress to join the call for a ceasefire and stop further escalation from costing the lives of more civilians. | | | Peter,
**Thousands of Palestinian civilians have now been killed by Israeli military strikes since October 7th, with the number growing by the day. 1** The number of lives lost or changed forever is only expected to climb further — as Israeli military forces intensify attacks ahead of a ground invasion that could be potentially even deadlier. **We’re calling on members of Congress to join the call for a ceasefire and stop further escalation from costing the lives of more civilians.** [**Will you join our National Phonebank For A Ceasefire Now! this Wednesday, October 25th at 2PM to urge your member of Congress to demand a swift de-escalation and a ceasefire now? clean_body: We’re calling on members of Congress to join the call for a ceasefire and stop further escalation from costing the lives of more civilians. | | | Peter, Thousands of Palestinian civilians have now been killed by Israeli military strikes since October 7th, with the number growing by the day. 1 The number of lives lost or changed forever is only expected to climb further — as Israeli military forces intensify attacks ahead of a ground invasion that could be potentially even deadlier. We’re calling on members of Congress to join the call for a ceasefire and stop further escalation from costing the lives of more civilians. Right now, the role of the United States should be to use diplomacy to work toward peace, not fan the flames of violence. Immediately, that means pushing for a ceasefire and de-escalation. Americans have learned the lessons of 9/11. Cynical political leaders leveraged the collective grief of our nation to launch wars that left many innocent people dead and gave rise to more extremism and violence. More than twenty years later — can we say anyone is any safer because of it? There is no military solution to this conflict, and there never has been. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , The Washington Post, Oct. 23, 2023. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: House Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
We've got to retake the House from the Republican wrecking-ball crew

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=112%2E4032634%2Ea_9cUF)
---
There are plenty of real issues where we need our government to take action. Like affordable housing. And child care. And climate change. But instead of getting to work for the American people, Republican House members have spent more than two weeks going back and forth (and back and forth some more) about who should replace Kevin McCarthy as Speaker — with nothing to show for it yet. They think that creating chaos in our government right now is going to hurt our democracy and help Donald Trump get re-elected. **I’m pushing back against extremist MAGA Republicans to protect our democracy and get our government working for working people. And I’m running for re-election to keep holding them accountable. But I can’t do it alone.** [**If it makes sense for you right now, can you chip in $28 or any amount to power this re-election campaign, fight back against the GOP’s extremist agenda, and make our government work for working people?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/825?amount=28&t=8&akid=112%2E4032634%2Ea_9cUF)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---

---

---
Side by side, we can hold the line against GOP extremism. We’ll fight to retake the House from the Republican wrecking-ball crew, protect and expand our Senate majority, and hold onto the White House. But we won’t stop there. We’ll keep fighting to push our country forward and deliver the big, bold action that working families need — from universal child care to affordable housing to building on our progress against the climate crisis and much, much more. [**I’m running for re-election to get all this done — and much more. And I’m asking if you can make a donation to help strengthen our campaign and power this fight. Any amount makes a real difference.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/825?t=14&akid=112%2E4032634%2Ea_9cUF) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

The bellwether election for 2024 is in Virginia — and it’s in just 15 days. = Will you contribute to my leadership PAC today so we can support candidates across the Commonwealth going into these final weeks before the election? name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Last email I’ll ever send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=77d9a05f47694b118dabb2448d918bd4&_e=NUDi97heySbIYE3-JCbGSEfiMlM5TewgsIMUF8u2Bf39dof-U4ksQM12oagOuVeBQq8wuANaovrYIFbo_Z0aXpn4fEtNFzS8l_e7RAgsWyKjGSRJUc855g6x2MYM5UxuAaG9J9zbz4tz9OAnY8vZ2y3-44XgfNyqlDA1BQJu14gA9yI0KD7UrWxzQrVauqf_q6IjfEk171FKFGEj9qPi8U_gBskiwqtVuaywqCjNy_vagjr1m3DVr9QYyi6n2RcLDuowiv0ASzcmTqUf_RbnT7P2rnwNNZ2mnWjQtMerHvjgPEKP-kVQwLQ5TdNDWAxfmqego_qtQRNh3ZN_-apkjoqCFityj0nvSz-SEldSiTg%3D)
---
Fellow American, This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC, a district that WILL decide who controls Washington. **

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.
---
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=77d9a05f47694b118dabb2448d918bd4&_e=NUDi97heySbIYE3-JCbGSEfiMlM5TewgsIMUF8u2Bf39dof-U4ksQM12oagOuVeBQq8wuANaovrYIFbo_Z0aXpn4fEtNFzS8l_e7RAgsWyKjGSRJUc855g6x2MYM5UxuAaG9J9zbz4tz9OAnY8vZ2y3-44XgfNyqlDA1BQJu14gA9yI0KD7UrWxzQrVauqf_M2iyMzfKp_LEx5JM9FO03zDQTTMjMSIlg7lt-ijRHSYRy26BBT2VUXnZyApf8YFIEvDjz7ObdJHV3Ix4tcu5IziK5oO2dSlrekBXxDR0958QfcWSHwynhWskzHz0qNG1rIEUVWYEsAjuXvxJUtBpxhx0veca3hYLSj9Mnj7EOf8%3D)
---
The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before...

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough. **

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

[Please have my back on this one:](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=77d9a05f47694b118dabb2448d918bd4&_e=NUDi97heySbIYE3-JCbGSEfiMlM5TewgsIMUF8u2Bf39dof-U4ksQM12oagOuVeBQq8wuANaovrYIFbo_Z0aXpn4fEtNFzS8l_e7RAgsWyLoFP4axaICsif1MHcHuOFc3UDMkBI87fyx_Uj_dzY633hMyZ6ik0jTZuvcTySes_CDOMSxRzChLXVMm3KmyH08KOvl-AFgg9RLk5weK33rXEJ7uRj5HxQ01H__J9t7-pTthN9QsgDJl86_nQ-yzY-d0HZH16l8VFuA7w5HpWxWFQ%3D%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $10**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=77d9a05f47694b118dabb2448d918bd4&_e=NUDi97heySbIYE3-JCbGSEfiMlM5TewgsIMUF8u2Bf39dof-U4ksQM12oagOuVeBQq8wuANaovrYIFbo_Z0aXpn4fEtNFzS8l_e7RAgsWyKjGSRJUc855g6x2MYM5UxuAaG9J9zbz4tz9OAnY8vZ2y3-44XgfNyqlDA1BQJu14gA9yI0KD7UrWxzQrVauqf_0_yqjuI65JAA8UfGnTlGbD50a2l3GLYyGQnyW3XH3MIH17Vrauysddt9keNMZLRHW8OyDiGLkLhPcliMHIOPEGzPNEsLyrcaUk6njsXBnv8PDn_IUMJoaUDrYHvaaKdTCTgzTRUFadud7uD2efH1OKjN6Qgs5i8zbVsjslNquSY%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $20**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=77d9a05f47694b118dabb2448d918bd4&_e=NUDi97heySbIYE3-JCbGSEfiMlM5TewgsIMUF8u2Bf39dof-U4ksQM12oagOuVeBQq8wuANaovrYIFbo_Z0aXpn4fEtNFzS8l_e7RAgsWyKjGSRJUc855g6x2MYM5UxuAaG9J9zbz4tz9OAnY8vZ2y3-44XgfNyqlDA1BQJu14gA9yI0KD7UrWxzQrVauqf_2PokMCIhdOx2-mQThIAx0H7tZV5eb-FT5EFLDjNR_NTagZizU0N4Db5nJlbRswKXVytUsKfVuuHgH_UmcQ2UaHWUKZDO1fjGPvRcNzb_54tjtWi1_kvUt5hqWOAKUHHfFgUGpcOWGk09TXiDT3sg_UQ_arloktNT67KHKzWwPQk%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $50**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=77d9a05f47694b118dabb2448d918bd4&_e=NUDi97heySbIYE3-JCbGSEfiMlM5TewgsIMUF8u2Bf39dof-U4ksQM12oagOuVeBQq8wuANaovrYIFbo_Z0aXpn4fEtNFzS8l_e7RAgsWyKjGSRJUc855g6x2MYM5UxuAaG9J9zbz4tz9OAnY8vZ2y3-44XgfNyqlDA1BQJu14gA9yI0KD7UrWxzQrVauqf_cYYHSRVQEh5XFiKXTuFusEgC2JwSkmh38jjDqrbfKudlt2HT1jksbYuX-gcVs6OzzQ_soaTs6dYkYOvO6YPmJ71Iiw5w_AdwgzKYvweUIbIik9HOP6HVO_-XpsJY_p6AgRDVjC0U168nZfK_UWQMDulpD8tQc6RU1DqJ1NU30Sw%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $100**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=77d9a05f47694b118dabb2448d918bd4&_e=NUDi97heySbIYE3-JCbGSEfiMlM5TewgsIMUF8u2Bf39dof-U4ksQM12oagOuVeBQq8wuANaovrYIFbo_Z0aXpn4fEtNFzS8l_e7RAgsWyKjGSRJUc855g6x2MYM5UxuAaG9J9zbz4tz9OAnY8vZ2y3-44XgfNyqlDA1BQJu14gA9yI0KD7UrWxzQrVauqf_VOdsrnllxrr1pvRZLHPz9kz57dNqshsniVfbdK6DJ3ZBc4f89OGFnTMkEacLyv-Ymw4ROd_aXTbBvJp-oB-sSCC0P_a6NwqVSmaVJI9jeJY3KsuLwQwUGh6T-lez6EtifvwyphJ5j3EWC8SCctJYgtnsLT_0WN0kFkxPF_gCErE%3D)
---
Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.

I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud.

Thank you & God bless.

**Pat Harrigan**
GOP Conservative Candidate
North Carolina's 14th District
